## 1. 3 ways Gen AI will impact the way we work this year

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/3-ways-gen-ai-will-impact-way-we-work?hl=en

# 3 ways Gen AI will impact the way we work this year

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/3-ways-gen-ai-will-impact-way-we-work?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# 3 ways Gen AI will impact the way we work this year

February 15, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hybrid_Work_and_Generative_AI_Kristina_Beh.max-2600x2600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hybrid_Work_and_Generative_AI_Kristina_Beh.max-2600x2600.png)

##### Kristina Behr

Vice President, Product Management, Google Workspace

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

Editorial note: This article [originally appeared in Fast Company](https://www.fastcompany.com/91017250/ways-gen-ai-impact-work-2024) and has been edited for length.

*Google Workspace’s Kristina Behr says businesses of all sizes—from mom-and-pop shops to global enterprises—will hone in on their top prompts to help improve everything from creating content for email marketing campaigns to drafting and refining customer support responses.*

---

In 2024, generative Artificial Intelligence will grow to be a potential part of work at every small business, every team in a bigger company, and every individual worker. What does that mean for how we’ll work?

Since last year, we’ve seen people work with gen AI across our own products in Google Workspace. Sometimes it’s improving existing skills, as when writers smooth their work with a virtual editor, or designers brainstorm new ideas. Or sometimes it’s adding new skills to someone’s tool belt, like when a spreadsheet novice taps into AI to become a spreadsheet power user.

There is a lot of technology innovation under the hood when it comes to generative AI, but what matters to solo business owners or employees at small businesses is the impact of the output and how well it frees up desperately needed time, keeps them on their best game, or improves customer interactions. This year, we’ll see the effects in three big ways.

### Multimodal AI models will improve SMB processes

In 2024, we’ll start seeing the power of multimodal AI—that is, AI that understands information across text, images, video, and more—help propel organizations of all sizes, including small and medium-size businesses.

Not only does it deliver more powerful results, but it offers the ability to work in several modalities at once. Results of a spreadsheet calculation might go in the content of an email, written with reference to previous customer interactions, for example, perhaps accompanied by an appropriate diagram or illustration.

It’s a benefit for organizations of all sizes, but especially for small businesses, where one person may be doing the job of many. For example, the owner of a local bike shop could get a photo from a customer about a problem, and multimodal AI will be able to understand the image and describe the problem.

This is business AI as a kind of auxiliary capability, allowing customers to best represent themselves and their work by drawing on a diverse range of expressions. And, with the conversational interactions of AI attuned to how individuals work, people can sharpen their internal and customer communications for a more personal touch.

### SMBs will hone in on their top prompts

The two most important things about gen AI in the workplace are how people work with it, and how it works with people.

In 2024, businesses of all sizes—from mom-and-pop shops to global enterprises—will hone in on their top prompts to help improve everything from creating content for email marketing campaigns to drafting and refining customer support responses.

For a small business, this might be crafting a customer email that presents a special offer, talks about previous purchases, and evokes a voice that accurately represents what’s special about working with this provider. Or perhaps it’s drafting or refining the content or monthly newsletters, or even suggesting a response to an unanswered email from a vendor.

Here are a few tips for prompt writing to help deliver more helpful results:

- Use natural language
- Be clear and concise
- Provide context
- Use specific and relevant keywords
- Break down complex tasks into separate prompts

### Collaborating with Gen AI will become a new must-have rhythm at work

One of the most striking things about gen AI is that it’s a natural interaction with exceptionally powerful computation. You talk or type a prompt, and in the background millions of computer interactions deliver what you need in the blink of an eye. Ideally, gen AI products should get better over time, securely and privately working with people and their data to help them create, communicate, and collaborate better.

In 2024, we’ll see even more powerful dialogs with people and gen AI, as machines get better and people ease into the rhythm of this new type of working. Unlike many previous types of writing and productivity applications, much activity will happen within the flow of creation, perhaps with suggestions that hasten work, or open up new workflows or processes that were previously unknown.

Equally, AI is getting better at reading situational needs inside a business, and will be able to suggest the highest-value workflows it can invoke in a given moment. These conditions might be at a meeting, where it might offer to summarize the conversation and send that to an interested party. It might be in personal work, where it can suggest which tool or image to work with while designing a new offering.

Gen AI gets its power from data, so the most powerful expressions will likely come from cloud-based services where privacy and security are built-in versus legacy applications that store data on laptops with files shared as attachments without access controls. Cloud-based systems have the power to change the working world with suggestions that are personalized and relevant, and leverage the context of your work, such as emails or files stored in the Cloud in a way that respects your privacy.

The real dialog, however, the one that matters most, is between you and your colleagues, your company, and your customers. I’m excited for all that’s in store for you, the users who will benefit from generative AI in 2024 and beyond.

## 2. 5 ways Gemini for Workspace keeps sellers and marketers customer-focused and in sync

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/5-ways-gemini-workspace-keeps-sellers-and-marketers-customer-focused-and-in-sync?hl=en

# 5 ways Gemini for Workspace keeps sellers and marketers customer-focused and in sync

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/5-ways-gemini-workspace-keeps-sellers-and-marketers-customer-focused-and-in-sync?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# 5 ways Gemini for Workspace keeps sellers and marketers customer-focused and in sync

October 22, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GWS_Productivity_Gemini_Blog_header_2436x1.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GWS_Productivity_Gemini_Blog_header_2436x1.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Kelly Anderson

Product Marketing Manager, Google Workspace

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

With so many emails, chat messages, and file update notifications, it can be hard for sellers and marketers to keep up with their colleagues, partners, and customers. In fact, more than a third of workers say they’ve dealt with missing or lost files at work due to communication problems.\*

Thanks to generative AI, there is now a better way for sellers and marketers to stay in sync and get more done. Let’s take a look at five ways Gemini for Workspace can help.

### 1. Collaborate in real-time on the same document

Because Workspace runs in the cloud, sellers and marketers don’t have to attach or share versions of files when they’re collaborating. Unlike traditional office productivity solutions, you can work with people within or beyond your organizations, on the same document and in real time, keeping everyone in sync and reducing the time it takes for feedback and approvals. Workspace runs on virtually any device and from virtually any location, so teams can edit documents or reply to comments in real-time using a web browser or a mobile app, even on the go.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_1.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_1.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_1.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_1.gif)

Collaborate in real-time on one file.

“Not having to fight to figure out the latest version of a file and not having to pay per minute anymore to just talk about work as much as we wanted – that was truly a game changer in our company and our culture.”  — **Michelle Araujo**, **Senior Director**, **Digital Employee Experience Business Technology**, [Workday](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p6E1vnQS2lY)

### 2. Automate repetitive tasks to focus on bringing your customers quality content and driving revenue

Sales teams spend big chunks of their workday writing and answering emails. Whether you’re reaching out to a new prospect, ironing out the details of a contract, or coordinating next steps internally, Gemini in Gmail can quickly create first drafts of emails that incorporate the relevant context of an existing conversation. With Gemini, sellers can also quickly get a summary of previous email threads, convert a meeting transcript into action items, or draft a personalized email response. You can use follow-up prompts to adjust the length or tone of the email.

Marketers can also collaborate with Gemini to speed up their work on routine tasks. For example, creating new content can be one of the most time-consuming tasks for marketing teams. But Gemini can generate a first draft of blog posts, email campaigns, and social media posts in just a few seconds. And with Gemini in the side panel of Docs, you can even write prompts that reference existing materials in Drive, like messaging frameworks or pitch decks, to generate new content so all of their content feels consistent and cohesive.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_2.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_2.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_2.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_2.gif)

Automate routine tasks, such as replying to an email, creating a slide, or building a project tracker.

“Gemini undoubtedly helps Adore Me’s bottom line. It saves us time, it saves us money. It makes people work faster, more efficiently, more collaboratively…[we can] just do things that, in the past, we never would have been able to do.” — **Ranjan Ray**, **VP of Strategy**, [Adore Me](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/return-employee-fueled-generative-ai-googleworkspace-90sge)

### 3. Conduct market research and build content faster to reduce time to market

If a company is launching a new product or trying to move into a new market, marketers can collaborate with the Gemini app ([gemini.google.com](http://gemini.google.com)) to improve their understanding of target audiences and export those results into Docs. Gemini can help you conduct market research across demographics, interests, pain points, online behavior, and more, in minutes instead of hours or days. Plus, because Gemini prompts are iterative, you can ask follow-up questions to define key terms or dive deeper on specific topics.

Then, you can prompt Gemini to turn your findings into a brief and then use the Help me write feature in Gmail to draft an email that shares a link to the brief with anyone who would benefit from the insights. Gemini can also create articles, blog posts, and social media updates, so marketers can generate awareness in the market for their products faster.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GIF_3.max-2100x2100.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GIF_3.max-2100x2100.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GIF_3.max-2100x2100.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GIF_3.max-2100x2100.jpg)

Gemini.google.com can identify a target audience’s demographics, interests, pain points, online behavior, and more, in minutes.

"AI-powered ads were not just more efficient to create, but they outperformed legacy ads with a 31% better cost-per-purchase, a 80% higher click-through-rate, and 46% more engaged site visitors."\*\* — **Andy McDonald**, **Vice President of Technology**, [Monks](https://www.monks.com/case-studies/hatch-dreams-to-reality-monksflow)

### 4. Respond to customer needs faster to build loyalty and trust

Preparing for calls and customer meetings can be challenging and time-intensive, but you can push past the blinking cursor with Gemini in Docs. From generating potential prospect questions to creating custom scripts and presentations, Gemini can help you create high-quality materials for customer meetings faster so you can focus more deeply on addressing customer needs.

Gemini can even help you make complicated technical information more accessible to prospects and customers. In Docs, simply highlight the technical language from an existing document that you want to reference, then ask Gemini to convert it into simpler terms. Once you have a draft, you can ask Gemini to reduce the length or refine the tone with prompts like “make it more conversational.”

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_6.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_6.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_6.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_6.gif)

Collaborating with Gemini in Slides

“Having a tool that can transform our loosely-written ideas into content that is presentable both internally and to customers is a super power added to our organization.” – **Caitlin Carey**, **Senior Vice President**, [WebFX](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-webfx-uses-duet-ai?e=48754805)

### 5. Work with confidence in a distributed and global workforce

Gemini in Google Meet helps sellers put their best foot forward during introductory video calls, product demos, and presentations. When slow internet or noisy environments get in the way of the conversation, Gemini enhances audio and video quality to keep customers engaged.

Sellers can also generate a custom background that reflects a customer’s interests and to look professional no matter where they take the meeting. And with Gemini’s real-time translated captions, connecting with global customers or colleagues who speak different languages is simpler than ever before. Once your meeting is over, Gemini in Gmail can turn automatically generated transcription summaries into a follow-up email.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_5.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_5.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_5.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GIF_5.gif)

Meet offers real-time translations and closed captions to video calls to remove language proficiency barriers.

“Google Meet has been extremely transformative for us with regards to bringing people together and collaborating. Now, with Gemini in Meet in preview, we’ve been really   
impressed with how it can take meeting notes, from bulletizing to capturing action items. I don’t even need to make edits to what comes back in Google Docs.” — **Gene Mallory**, **Vice President of Global Workplace Strategy and Technology**, [Trellix](https://cloud.withgoogle.com/next/session-library?session=COL112&utm_source=copylink&utm_medium=unpaidsoc&utm_campaign=FY24-Q2-global-ENDM33-physicalevent-er-next-2024-mc&utm_content=next-homepage-social-share&utm_term=-)

To increase your sales and marketing performance, check out the following resources to help you get the most out of Gemini for Workspace:

- [Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/) to get started with a free trial
- Gemini for Workspace [sales](https://services.google.com/fh/files/misc/gws_gemini_sales_handbook.pdf) and marketing handbooks
- Gemini for Workspace prompt guide for [sales](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai/prompts-for-sales/) and [marketing](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai/prompts-for-marketing/)

## 3. 5 ways to unlock a culture of experimentation with gen AI

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/5-ways-to-unlock-a-culture-of-experimentation-with-gen-ai?hl=en

# 5 ways to unlock a culture of experimentation with gen AI

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/5-ways-to-unlock-a-culture-of-experimentation-with-gen-ai?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# 5 ways to unlock a culture of experimentation with gen AI

September 26, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI_newsletter_Unlocking_a_culture_of.max-2300x2300.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI_newsletter_Unlocking_a_culture_of.max-2300x2300.jpg)

##### John MacDonald

Global Director of Google Workspace Growth Strategy & Solutions

Innovation usually isn’t a lightning strike. More often than not, it’s the result of careful iteration. The first mobile phone weighed more than two pounds with just 30 minutes of talk time. Years of experimentation and iteration produced today’s lightweight, pocket-sized computer/camera/phone combos — and they’re continually evolving.

Generative AI can help organizations of all sizes build a culture of experimentation that drives innovation. Tools like Gemini allow employees to quickly try new approaches, learn from their mistakes, and keep pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. By helping people build on each other’s discoveries, gen AI can be a major force multiplier.

Here are 5 ways to unlock a culture of experimentation with gen AI.

### **1. Create the right mindset**

Turn “failed” experiments into learning opportunities. Consider setting up an internal forum or Google Chat space where your teams can drop in “dead end” prompts or AI misfires, with lessons learned, to reinforce the idea that iteration ultimately drives success. Naturally, you also want to share the big wins when a team uncovers a genuine breakthrough. Some teams at Google send out a weekly digest of AI wins and lessons learned for the week. (Learn more about [creating a Google guides program to boost AI adoption](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-google-guides-program-to-drive-adoption-workspace-gemini?e=48754805).)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI-newsletter-Unlocking-a-culture-of.max-2000x2000.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI-newsletter-Unlocking-a-culture-of.max-2000x2000.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI-newsletter-Unlocking-a-culture-of.max-2000x2000.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5458c_LI-newsletter-Unlocking-a-culture-of.max-2000x2000.jpg)

Sharing info about your AI journey encourages others to join in on experimentation.

### **2. Invest in education, training, and cross-team collaboration**

A McKinsey study found that [48% of employees rank training as the most important factor for gen AI adoption](https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/mckinsey-digital/our-insights/superagency-in-the-workplace-empowering-people-to-unlock-ais-full-potential-at-work#/). Yet less than half feel they’re receiving moderate or less support. When Avery Dennison — the world's largest base of Gemini pilot testers— brought AI to thousands of employees, they focused on enterprise-wide training and “humans in the loop.” Their Digital Workplace Services team created a training program and executed a change management plan to upskill both IT and non-technical employees. They used a mix of development days, user training, and a regular stream of AI tips to help ensure all employees were empowered to take advantage of the new technology. From there, the company held functional interviews to brainstorm the best business use cases that could benefit from AI usage.

### **3. Identify the right workflows and use cases before scaling**

Building the muscle for experimentation takes time, even when AI is embedded within your workflows. Some AI usage involves a small, incremental change. For example, writing better and more relevant emails with nudges from Gemini is something all employees can do to boost personal productivity. But when it comes to larger-scale processes, like contract approvals or customer service communications, it’s important to identify the specific use cases and places in the workflow where AI can make a difference.

Based on submissions from their employees, Avery Dennison’s Digital Innovation Center of Excellence created 21 gen AI pilot projects designed to improve productivity for all users and enhance business processes, including maintenance, operations, customer engagement, and workplace safety. For example, by applying AI to predictive maintenance in one of the company’s India plants, the company was able to reduce unplanned downtime by 25%, while improving operational schedules and customer satisfaction and decreasing maintenance costs.

### **4. Create recipes for experimentation**

Some teams struggle to work out when to turn to AI when tackling a specific problem. Consider putting together recipes that guide them through each step and the relevant tools within a hypothetical or real business use case. Unlike blueprints, recipes allow for substitutions and tweaks that make the results more targeted for a specific team. The recipe might give sample prompts and typical responses, while guiding teams on how to get the best out of AI while navigating research, brainstorming, analysis, generating insights and more.

### **5. Evaluate results, create feedback loops, reinforce safety in experimentation**

Periodically check in with teams on the progress they’re making with gen AI. You might send out an anonymous survey or schedule a feedback session that should always include both wins and lessons learned. Evolving your use of gen AI relies on tight feedback loops — not only between the individual user and Gemini, but between your broader AI community and across the whole organization. And as you celebrate building a culture of experimentation, reinforce the ground rules for using AI tools that keep your organization’s data private, secure, and under your control.

### **Empower gen AI innovation**

Creating a culture of experimentation with gen AI can unlock innovation, but it’s not as simple as “turning on the AI switch.” Working closely with users and stakeholders to identify the right use cases, investing in training, and sharing information and resources are all part of laying the foundation for the “humans-in-the-loop” approach that brings out the best in AI.

### How AI is giving small businesses a major advantage

There is a lot of hype about the promises of how AI will revolutionize work, *but how exactly?* With Google Workspace, Gemini is intuitively built into each app, helping you write better emails and documents, bring ideas to life in slides, have more productive meetings, and so much more.

Download this practical guide with examples and use cases for each app, and start using AI in your everyday work.

This guide includes:

- Top 3 AI features for each app, including Gmail, Docs, Drive, Sheets, Slides, Meet, Chat, Vids, NotebookLM, AppSheet, and Gemini app
- Real customer examples of use cases and value
- Information security overview, including data confidentiality and protection, compliance standards, and IT controls

## 6. AI consulting firm Devoteam rolls out 4,000 Gemini for Workspace licenses across all business units

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/devoteam-rolls-out-4000-gemini-workspace-licenses?hl=en

# AI consulting firm Devoteam rolls out 4,000 Gemini for Workspace licenses across all business units

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/devoteam-rolls-out-4000-gemini-workspace-licenses?hl=en

Customer Stories

# AI consulting firm Devoteam rolls out 4,000 Gemini for Workspace licenses across all business units

September 5, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_Image__devoteam.max-2500x2500.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_Image__devoteam.max-2500x2500.png)

##### The Google Workspace Team

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

“This large investment in Gemini for Google Workspace reflects our belief in the transformative power of generative AI. And by embracing Gemini in our own operations, we’ll be able to expertly guide our customers on their own AI journeys.” **—Sébastien Chevrel, Devoteam’s Group Managing Director**

---

### All in with Gemini

[Devoteam](https://www.devoteam.com/), an AI-driven tech consulting company and a leading Google Cloud Premier Partner across several product and engagement models, has announced a significant investment in artificial intelligence (AI) for its workforce by obtaining 4,000 Gemini Enterprise licenses for Gemini for Google Workspace.   
  
Devoteam’s substantial investment in Gemini for Google Workspace demonstrates the company’s commitment to being at the forefront of AI innovation. By empowering employees with Gemini for Google Workspace's advanced features, Devoteam is not only enhancing internal productivity and collaboration but also strengthening its position as a go-to AI partner for their customers across EMEA.

 “Our deep investment in security is one of the many reasons customers choose Google Workspace. Devoteam's significant investment in Gemini for Google Workspace showcases its commitment to innovation and trust in Google Cloud's AI technology," said **Tara Brady**, **President of EMEA**, **Google Cloud**. "We're excited to collaborate with Devoteam as it empowers its workforce with generative AI and helps customers embrace AI-powered productivity.”

### Helping more than 1 million people harness the collaborative power of Google Cloud and Workspace

The choice of Gemini was natural for Devoteam, which already had an abiding trust in the security of Google technology: Among its 11,000 employees in more than 25 EMEA countries is its Google Cloud team division. This team of more than 600 Google experts has helped more than one million people at hundreds of organizations harness the collaborative power of [Google Cloud](https://cloud.google.com/) and Google Workspace.

But Devoteam will be rolling out Gemini across its entire organization — not just its Google Cloud division. This strategic direction underscores the company's recognition of AI's potential to revolutionize workflows across various functions. This comprehensive rollout will foster a culture of AI-driven collaboration, enabling employees to work smarter, faster, and more creatively.

“We do not only give people access to the technology, but also make sure that everyone is able to use Gen AI in the most effective and ethical way,” said Gert Jan van Halem, CTO at Devoteam. “That is why, next to the investment in the technology, we also invest in a training program for all our employees to learn how to embed Gen AI in their daily work.”

“By fully embracing Gemini in our own operations, we’ll gain insights that will help us guide our customers on their own AI journeys,” adds Valon Rexhepi, Devoteam G Cloud’s Global VP. And this expertise will be key: A [recent survey](https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/quantumblack/our-insights/the-state-of-ai) reports that 75 percent of global executives predict generative AI will lead to significant or disruptive change in their organization.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_2024-02-15-devoteam-by-lukasneasi-.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_2024-02-15-devoteam-by-lukasneasi-.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_2024-02-15-devoteam-by-lukasneasi-.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_2024-02-15-devoteam-by-lukasneasi-.max-2200x2200.jpg)

Collaboration in action at Devoteam

### Looking ahead

As the adoption of Gemini for Google Workspace proliferates at Devoteam, Rexhepi expects to increase its license count, concluding, “We are known as an AI trailblazer in our industry, and our adoption of Gemini will solidify that reputation.”

Learn more about how Devoteam AI-enables workforce with global Gemini for Google Workspace partner adoption [here](https://gcloud.devoteam.com/news-and-pr/devoteam-ai-enables-workforce-with-global-gemini-for-google-workspace-partner-adoption/).

- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

## 7. AI for email marketing

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-email-marketing?hl=en

# AI for email marketing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-email-marketing?hl=en

# AI for email marketing

Gemini can help you personalize content and craft email copy that converts.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_email_marketing-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_email_marketing-hero-en)

![Gemini creates copy from a prompt with âhelp me writeâ, shown with a man on phone](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/J5Cxiivp6hREKZaLy__W_uFfMsigrSgv5PuZKmyaAvnN9YePLmEpyTWMW47YbVVs3AomUspwjs7uqJTIf-UHf6TX0oPERnrrVEs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

### Enhance your email marketing strategies with AI

Use AI to quickly scale your email marketing efforts to work smarter, not harder. You can use [Gemini](http://gemini.google.com/) as your research analyst, capable of helping you review large amounts of customer data stored in [Google Drive](https://workspace.google.com/products/drive/). Help boost engagement by using Gemini to assist in creating personalized email content tailored to your audience.

###### 1. Boost engagement and conversions

Personalization paves the path to conversions. Gemini can [help you write](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing/) engaging email content for different audience segments. Tap into Geminiâs ability to organize and summarize large quantities of customer data at-scale, transforming information around user behaviors and preferences into customized content.

###### 2. Write like a pro

Get help creating high-converting email copy in minutes with Gemini as your writing coach. Quickly generate text for email campaigns for different audiences and initiatives â from awareness campaigns to upcoming events, and product launches. Use Gemini to create multiple subject line variations tailored to your recipients. Leverage [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) to organize data such as open rates, conversion rates, and more so that you can easily measure what content connects with your customers.

![Person on laptop uses Gemini to help write an email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u21xNJSwZn_MmPtq885AJPvXydos5MOwOdxLoWZfHrIdLfRlrIG1DmUM_3pqFUpwrUO3p_avTC9AUunOGuGL4l3Op2rmipRtfLuKDA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

###### 3. Save time and resources

Gemini can help you work more efficiently, automating the tedious tasks of creating email marketing campaigns. Leverage Gemini as a research assistant to help you analyze large amounts of data to improve personalization and optimize campaigns in real-time, eliminating the manual work involved. Workspace also integrates with other [third-party email marketing tools](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/category/business-tools), allowing you to leverage AIâs automation capabilities in existing workflows. Clean up subscriber lists, automate responses, and more.

### How to use Gemini in Gmail for email marketing

Gemini makes it easy to kickstart your email marketing efforts. In the top right corner, Ask [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) to help you by choosing from a list of existing prompts. Or [create detailed prompts](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14200040) to segment campaigns by the audience, personalized copy, and more. Take your email marketing capabilities even further by [integrating Google Workspace with Salesforce](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/app/salesforce_connector_for_gmail/1085601474281) or other third-party applications in the [Google Workspace Marketplace](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/).

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## Try AI for email marketing

## 8. AI for email marketing

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-email-marketing?hl=en

# AI for email marketing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-email-marketing?hl=en

# AI for email marketing

Gemini can help you personalise content and craft email copy that converts.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_email_marketing-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_email_marketing-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini creates copy from a prompt with 'Help me write', shown with a man on phone](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/J5Cxiivp6hREKZaLy__W_uFfMsigrSgv5PuZKmyaAvnN9YePLmEpyTWMW47YbVVs3AomUspwjs7uqJTIf-UHf6TX0oPERnrrVEs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

### Enhance your email marketing strategies with AI

Use AI to quickly scale your email marketing efforts to work smarter, not harder. You can use [Gemini](http://gemini.google.com/) as your research analyst, capable of helping you to review large amounts of customer data stored in [Google Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/drive/). Help boost engagement by using Gemini to assist in creating personalised email content tailored to your audience.

###### 1. Boost engagement and conversions

Personalisation paves the path to conversions. Gemini can [help you to write](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-writing/) engaging email content for different audience segments. Tap into Gemini's ability to organise and summarise large quantities of customer data at scale, transforming information around user behaviours and preferences into customised content.

###### 2. Write like a pro

Get help creating high-converting email copy in minutes with Gemini as your writing coach. Quickly generate text for email campaigns for different audiences and initiatives â from awareness campaigns to upcoming events and product launches. Use Gemini to create multiple subject line variations tailored to your recipients. Leverage [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) to organise data such as open rates, conversion rates and more so that you can easily measure what content connects with your customers.

![Person on laptop using Gemini to help write an email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u21xNJSwZn_MmPtq885AJPvXydos5MOwOdxLoWZfHrIdLfRlrIG1DmUM_3pqFUpwrUO3p_avTC9AUunOGuGL4l3Op2rmipRtfLuKDA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

###### 3. Save time and resources

Gemini can help you work more efficiently, automating the tedious tasks of creating email marketing campaigns. Leverage Gemini as a research assistant to help you analyse large amounts of data to improve personalisation and optimise campaigns in real time, eliminating the manual work involved. Workspace also integrates with other [third-party email marketing tools](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/category/business-tools), allowing you to leverage AI's automation capabilities in existing workflows. Clean up subscriber lists, automate responses and more.

### How to use Gemini in Gmail for email marketing

Gemini makes it easy to kickstart your email marketing efforts. In the top-right corner, ask [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/) to help you by choosing from a list of existing prompts. Or [create detailed prompts](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14200040?hl=en-GB) to segment campaigns by the audience, personalised copy and more. Take your email marketing capabilities even further by [integrating Google Workspace with Salesforce](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/app/salesforce_connector_for_gmail/1085601474281) or other third-party applications in the [Google Workspace Marketplace](https://workspace.google.com/marketplace/).

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## Try AI for email marketing

## 10. AI for project management

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/project-management?hl=en

# AI for project management

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/project-management?hl=en

# AI for project management

Discover how you can use Gemini to keep your team on track. Streamline communication, create task lists, build project timelines, and more.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en-CA)

![A person in a Google Meet call. Around them, Gemini is taking notes from the call, drafting an email, and creating a daily summary of unread emails.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/IjjM1M8Nmrk4dyNP0mojG-sGdRDbMfG8HCIIbO2pySmR0EXQ0949s8dwuvGvNIvkxHSwKvTs2d3hZPsCJXQSLUqO7xbVxxNiZUs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Automate tasks, gain insights, and achieve more

![A Gemini prompt window for Google Sheets that reads, âHelp me organize my project by listing tasks, assignees, and due dates,â and a Google Docs prompt that reads, âHelp me write a project report.â](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-cyv2bggl57JDaeylN_yjiF-zs4V4_UAVh25cqhmYsMuyz__3yXrEWuVDsQKOFhFL7GO6Xhjhu-8VY3PyRHfZZP0osMPni7DGEuD=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Simplify project tracking and data analysis with Gemini

Do your best work faster with AI built into the apps you use every day. Go from a blank page to a project plan in moments with [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/), helping you draft proposals and align your team. Once the project kicks off, [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) makes it easy for you to create project plans, track budget, and analyze data.

## Drive project momentum with AI-powered meetings

Drive project momentum and stay fully engaged with [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-for-meetings/). Stay focused during meetings with automated note-taking, instant in-meeting summaries, and real-time speech translation for global teams. Ensure everyone leaves the discussion aligned and ready to execute with [AI-generated notes](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking/) delivered directly to your inbox.

![A person in a Google Meet video call with Gemini taking notes. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/U9WtdcWbV24svaoIDFxZMqxdbW0UPOiaiNdhwO6u3fgOZpTWTtrD4PA1GuQxr8xGNRcXrG_H5jH5omdfTKcUovFeYu9CVRmZ0KFKDQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![A prompt box reads, âAfter a meeting, send action items to the team in Chat summarizing next steps.â Next to it, a button reads, âCreate with AI.â](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/GTrvkH2AuKOkekWfCOwV7XpK0xdWkuJo9svTQ-4ZuJr-UUOX9f1-m445LSFdbBGoxqgYSYAmi-9ZD8_ToNK1UsshXvdRq64xFYtW=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Automate custom workflows with Workspace Studio

Streamline everyday tasks with AI-powered workflows â no coding required. [Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/studio/) uses natural language prompts to build custom workflows. Leave a client call in Meet and get an instant recap in Docs sent to attendees via Gmail. Build flows in minutes with pre-configured steps.

## Power your project strategy with AI

![Document icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3ng1Mzrv9raB74u0TJKlAh-d8d13d3cf3f1297df078bba82e8e9057-Document.svg)

Turn documents into insights

Eliminate the manual effort of synthesizing project data with [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/notebooklm/). Transform complex plans and transcripts into clear summaries with citations or instant Audio Overviews to keep stakeholders informed on the go.

![Table icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6FVSrxmK0jUhJUnsU8UAsm-1bbded04c4c1e968b08ed7ee5dfbd04e-Table.svg)

Keep your team aligned

Have fewer meetings without losing touch. Create engaging updates that teams can view anytime. Share your message with [Google Vids](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/vids/) using AI-generated scripts, avatars, and professional voiceovers.

![Communication icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1MrQS8sI1J2BdiXM9fcH2s-ab4a4d89079788b6e73b96e86dac6668-Communication.svg)

Streamline communication

Quickly pull insights from lengthy email chains with [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/ai/). Turn them into action item lists to keep projects on track.

![Gemini Spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-22uVDjO6l6LZ2XyE5KvJJx-f37b5f564ae7f48e1a2519d03662b9d3-Gemini_Spark.svg)

## Master complex projects with Gemini Enterprise

Deploy advanced AI agents that sit alongside your Workspace tools to automate complex workflows and unify cross-functional coordination.

[Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?hl=en-CA)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- AI helps project managers plan more effectively, automating repetitive tasks like reporting, generating project plans and task lists. This gives project managers more time to devote to strategic elements to drive projects forward.
- Gemini simplifies scheduling projects. Using historical data, Gemini can help you more accurately analyze project requirements, allocate resources, and create detailed timelines with milestones assigned to team members and stakeholders.
- No. Your private data is never used to train public AI models. Google Workspace and Gemini do not share any of your data outside your organization without your permission. Gemini Enterprise offers commercial data protection so that your proprietary data stays private. Your existing Workspace protections are automatically applied to any project data used in Gemini Enterprise.
- Workspace with Gemini and Gemini Enterprise can work with third-party project management tools via custom agents and integrations. This open ecosystem approach links intuitive Workspace tools your team already uses with project management-specific tools to streamline workflows. For example, you can build custom agents that track ticket status updates in Jira from Google Chat, pull prospect data from Salesforce into Google Sheets, or sync tasks from Asana.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## Power your project strategy with AI

![Document icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3ng1Mzrv9raB74u0TJKlAh-d8d13d3cf3f1297df078bba82e8e9057-Document.svg)

![Table icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6FVSrxmK0jUhJUnsU8UAsm-1bbded04c4c1e968b08ed7ee5dfbd04e-Table.svg)

Keep your team aligned

Have fewer meetings without losing touch. Create engaging updates that teams can view at any time. Share your message with [Google Vids](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/vids/) using AI-generated scripts, avatars and professional voiceovers.

![Communication icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1MrQS8sI1J2BdiXM9fcH2s-ab4a4d89079788b6e73b96e86dac6668-Communication.svg)

Streamline communication

Quickly extract insights from lengthy email chains with [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/). Turn them into action item lists to keep projects on track.

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-22uVDjO6l6LZ2XyE5KvJJx-f37b5f564ae7f48e1a2519d03662b9d3-Gemini_Spark.svg)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- AI helps project managers plan more effectively, automating repetitive tasks like reporting and generating project plans and task lists. This gives project managers more time to devote to strategic elements to drive projects forward.
- GeminiÂ forÂ Workspace simplifies scheduling projects. Using historical data, Gemini can help you more accurately analyse project requirements, allocate resources and create detailed timelines with milestones assigned to team members and stakeholders.
- No. Your private data is never used to train public AI models. Google Workspace and Gemini do not share any of your data outside your organisation without your permission. Gemini Enterprise offers commercial data protection so that your proprietary data stays private. Your existing Workspace protections are automatically applied to any project data used in Gemini Enterprise.
- Workspace with Gemini and Gemini Enterprise can work with third-party project management tools via custom agents and integrations. This open ecosystem approach links intuitive Workspace tools that your team already uses with project management-specific tools to streamline workflows. For example, you can build custom agents that track ticket status updates in Jira from Google Chat, extract prospect data from Salesforce into Google Sheets or sync tasks from Asana.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## 12. AI for project management

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/project-management?hl=en

# AI for project management

Source: https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/project-management?hl=en

# AI for project management

Discover how you can use Gemini to keep your team on track. Streamline communication, create task lists, build project timelines, and more.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en)

![A person in a Google Meet call. Around them, Gemini is taking notes from the call, drafting an email, and creating a daily summary of unread emails.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/IjjM1M8Nmrk4dyNP0mojG-sGdRDbMfG8HCIIbO2pySmR0EXQ0949s8dwuvGvNIvkxHSwKvTs2d3hZPsCJXQSLUqO7xbVxxNiZUs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Automate tasks, gain insights, and achieve more

![A Gemini prompt window for Google Sheets that reads, âHelp me organize my project by listing tasks, assignees, and due dates,â and a Google Docs prompt that reads, âHelp me write a project report.â](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-cyv2bggl57JDaeylN_yjiF-zs4V4_UAVh25cqhmYsMuyz__3yXrEWuVDsQKOFhFL7GO6Xhjhu-8VY3PyRHfZZP0osMPni7DGEuD=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Simplify project tracking and data analysis with Gemini

Do your best work faster with AI built into the apps you use every day. Go from a blank page to a project plan in moments with [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/), helping you draft proposals and align your team. Once the project kicks off, [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) makes it easy for you to create project plans, track budget, and analyze data.

## Drive project momentum with AI-powered meetings

Drive project momentum and stay fully engaged with [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-for-meetings/). Stay focused during meetings with automated note-taking, instant in-meeting summaries, and real-time speech translation for global teams. Ensure everyone leaves the discussion aligned and ready to execute with [AI-generated notes](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking/) delivered directly to your inbox.

![A person in a Google Meet video call with Gemini taking notes. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/U9WtdcWbV24svaoIDFxZMqxdbW0UPOiaiNdhwO6u3fgOZpTWTtrD4PA1GuQxr8xGNRcXrG_H5jH5omdfTKcUovFeYu9CVRmZ0KFKDQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![A prompt box reads, âAfter a meeting, send action items to the team in Chat summarizing next steps.â Next to it, a button reads, âCreate with AI.â](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/GTrvkH2AuKOkekWfCOwV7XpK0xdWkuJo9svTQ-4ZuJr-UUOX9f1-m445LSFdbBGoxqgYSYAmi-9ZD8_ToNK1UsshXvdRq64xFYtW=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Automate custom workflows with Workspace Studio

Streamline everyday tasks with AI-powered workflows â no coding required. [Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/studio/) uses natural language prompts to build custom workflows. Leave a client call in Meet and get an instant recap in Docs sent to attendees via Gmail. Build flows in minutes with pre-configured steps.

## Power your project strategy with AI

![Document icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3ng1Mzrv9raB74u0TJKlAh-d8d13d3cf3f1297df078bba82e8e9057-Document.svg)

Turn documents into insights

Eliminate the manual effort of synthesizing project data with [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/products/notebooklm/). Transform complex plans and transcripts into clear summaries with citations or instant Audio Overviews to keep stakeholders informed on the go.

![Table icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6FVSrxmK0jUhJUnsU8UAsm-1bbded04c4c1e968b08ed7ee5dfbd04e-Table.svg)

Keep your team aligned

Have fewer meetings without losing touch. Create engaging updates that teams can view anytime. Share your message with [Google Vids](https://workspace.google.com/products/vids/) using AI-generated scripts, avatars, and professional voiceovers.

![Communication icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1MrQS8sI1J2BdiXM9fcH2s-ab4a4d89079788b6e73b96e86dac6668-Communication.svg)

Streamline communication

Quickly pull insights from lengthy email chains with [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/). Turn them into action item lists to keep projects on track.

![Gemini Spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-22uVDjO6l6LZ2XyE5KvJJx-f37b5f564ae7f48e1a2519d03662b9d3-Gemini_Spark.svg)

## 13. AI for small business

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-small-business?hl=en

# AI for small business

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-small-business?hl=en

# AI for small business

Use AI to streamline your work, focus on important projects and save you time.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini generates a follow-up email, shown with woman on tablet](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HafEWngwsxwJrSbmK3O2NK6lcPVz2W91sYDdDK5yZgtfI0CfEQ8EfoL9bl0PdElRiogZMUGooF8Rr7AqnNO8YsktzF01Hh28sFLU=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

### Unleash the power of AI for your small business

Generative AI is changing the way businesses of all sizes operate. Small businesses in particular can use AI to accelerate research, be more efficient, brainstorm new ideas, organise spreadsheets and more, so that you can focus on what matters most.

###### How is AI being used in small businesses?

For [small businesses](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/business/small-business/) and [start-ups](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/business/startups/), creativity is at the core. Finding inventive ways to use AI can help level the playing field for small businesses, giving you the tools to work faster. From helping you organise receipts, getting insights into how your business is performing or creating compelling blog posts, AI can help small businesses speed up workflows in smart, responsive ways.

### AI applications for your small business

More and more businesses are adopting AI-powered tools to help them work smarter. For small businesses, AI can help you maximise your resources. AI's capabilities can give small businesses more time to tackle important projects and streamline make-work.

[Learn how Gemini delivers AI solutions for small businesses.](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/)

###### Sales and marketing

Every business, no matter how big or small, needs to have a solid [sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/sales/) plan and [marketing](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/marketing/) strategy to generate profit. With limited time and resources, it can be difficult to keep a pulse on sales and marketing trends. Generative AI can aid sales and marketing efforts by helping to accelerate research and summarise lengthy information about audiences and markets. With your Workspace account you can use [Gemini](http://gemini.google.com) to help with research, create content and organise data so that you can find the time to craft great messaging. [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/presentation-ai/) can also help you with [presentations](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14196644?hl=en-GB), tailoring pitches to a specific customer. It can be tricky to know if your sales and marketing efforts are working, but you don't have to be a spreadsheet wizard to figure it out! With Gemini, you can uncover helpful insights without all the fuss.

###### Creative writing

For smaller teams with a long list of competing priorities, generative AI makes it easy to push past writer's block and quickly [create a first draft](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-writing/) or repurpose existing content into a different format. Gemini can help you create emails, branded materials, social media posts and a lot more, helping you save time. Use *Help me write* and include your company's brand voice, target audience and other relevant details to give [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/docs/ai/) the information needed to create an initial draft. From there, review and apply your creative touches to get your message out into the world.

###### Customer service

Small businesses can set themselves apart from the competition with exceptional customer service. Generative AI can help automate and [personalise customer service](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/customer-service/) emails, craft timely responses and more. [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) can help you organise customer information, helping inform communications with your customers and offering a personalised touch that makes those interactions more meaningful.

![Gemini creates a summary table from a prompt with 'Help me organise', shown with three people at a computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d9iDM10MPwH892qyzEsbfQTzBl4kMVfcWNxhcGooTTGLO9zGXn735uZU45HTxGv_7Dgw06-eFYys6TJOAbtgiBpMJak-8rfUOhlB=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

###### Operational efficiency

Whether you're launching a new product or working on a new project, Gemini can help you stay on track. With *Help me organise*, Gemini in Sheets can help you build checklists, project trackers and more in just seconds. The collaborative nature of Google Workspace allows you to share these materials with your team and keep an eye on progress to keep things running smoothly.

###### Bookkeeping

Freelancers and small business owners like you have a lot to handle, and bookkeeping and logistics can be overwhelming. Gemini is your AI assistant that can help you organise and track receipts from your [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/) inbox so that you don't have to waste time searching for critical information. AI does the heavy lifting for you by extracting essential details, organising summary notes in Docs and helping you create spreadsheets. Using Gemini with these kinds of insights can help get to answers â like 'where is the money spent' â that matter most to you and your business.

### How can AI help small businesses do more with less?

AI can help small businesses make the most of their resources, giving them the tools needed to easily create tables and trackers, create compelling first drafts of content and presentations and serve as a research partner. AI can help small businesses summarise customer communication and craft meaningful responses to enquiries and common questions.

These are only a few ways that small businesses can use the power of AI to do more with less. The more you work with AI, the easier it is to find even more ways to help streamline tasks, save time and find creative inspiration. AI is [changing the way that we work](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/3-ways-gen-ai-will-impact-way-we-work?hl=en-GB). To use AI successfully, small businesses need to learn how to write effective prompts that can help generate the most helpful output.

###### AI prompts for your small business

**Speaking with investors**

Let's say that you are a founder of a startup and your online business is gaining traction. You have always dreamed of opening a bricks-and-mortar shop, and now might be the perfect time. You want a thought partner to help you better understand the current landscape. You open [gemini.google.com](https://gemini.google.com/), and you type:

*I am the founder of a startup. I am considering opening a bricks-and-mortar shop. Conduct an analysis into the competitive landscape focusing on [focus area]. Provide the strengths and weaknesses of [key competitors] in this area, including their specific strategies, tactics and results. Identify actionable insights and recommendations for how [my company] can improve its approach and gain a competitive analysis.*

**Enable customer self-service**

Imagine that you own a small boutique and you get a lot of emails with questions about your return policy. Customer feedback has consistently said your guidelines are unclear. You open a Google Doc that states the return, refund and store credit policies. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting *Help me write*. You type:

*Summarise this content to write a clear and concise product return policy and outline five steps for customers to take in sequential order.*

### How can I start using AI for my small business?

Gemini can help small businesses make the most of their resources. Save time by tapping into Gemini to help automate repetitive tasks, giving you more time to do work that matters. Use Gemini in Sheets to create tracking tables and lists. Craft images and presentations with Gemini in Slides. Ask Gemini in Docs to help you create first drafts for different types of written materials, including emails and more. Gain your time back to focus on your craft with Gemini.

# AI for small business

Source: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-for-small-business?hl=en

# AI for small business

Use AI to streamline your work, focus on important projects, and save you time.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en)

![Gemini generates a follow-up email, shown with woman on tablet](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HafEWngwsxwJrSbmK3O2NK6lcPVz2W91sYDdDK5yZgtfI0CfEQ8EfoL9bl0PdElRiogZMUGooF8Rr7AqnNO8YsktzF01Hh28sFLU=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

### Unleash the power of AI for your small business

Generative AI is changing the way businesses of all sizes operate. Small businesses, in particular, can use AI to accelerate research, be more efficient, brainstorm new ideas, organize spreadsheets, and more so you can focus on what matters most.

###### How is AI being used in small businesses?

For [small businesses](https://workspace.google.com/business/small-business/) and [start-ups](https://workspace.google.com/business/startups/), creativity is at the core. Finding inventive ways to use AI can help level the playing field for small businesses, giving you the tools to work faster. From helping you organize receipts, getting insights into how your business is performing, or creating compelling blog posts, AI can help small businesses speed up workflows in smart, responsive ways.

### AI applications for your small business

More and more businesses are adopting AI-powered tools to help them work smarter. For small businesses, AI can help you maximize your resources. AIâs capabilities can give small businesses more time to tackle important projects and streamline busywork.

[Learn how Gemini delivers AI solutions for small businesses.](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/)

###### Sales and marketing

Every business, no matter how big or small, needs to have a solid [sales](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/sales/) plan and [marketing](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/marketing/) strategy to generate profit. With limited time and resources, it can be difficult to keep a pulse on sales and marketing trends. Generative AI can aid sales and marketing efforts by helping to accelerate research and summarize lengthy information about audiences and markets. With your Workspace account you can use [Gemini](http://gemini.google.com) to help with research, create content, and organize data so that you can find the time to craft great messaging. [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/resources/presentation-ai/) can also help you with [presentations](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14196644), tailoring pitches to a specific customer. It can be tricky to know if your sales and marketing efforts are working, but you don't have to be a spreadsheet wizard to figure it out! With Gemini, you can uncover helpful insights without all the fuss.

###### Creative writing

For smaller teams with a long list of competing priorities, generative AI makes it easy to push past writers block and quickly [create a first draft](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing/) or repurpose existing content into a different format. Gemini can help you create emails, branded materials, social media posts, and a lot more helping you save time. Use *Help me write* and include your companyâs brand voice, target audience, and other relevant details to give [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/) the information needed to create an initial draft. From there, review and apply your creative touches to get your message out into the world.

###### Customer service

Small businesses can set themselves apart from the competition with exceptional customer service. Generative AI can help automate and [personalize customer service](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/customer-service/) emails, craft timely responses, and more. [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) can help you organize customer information, helping inform communications with your customers and offering a personalized touch that makes those interactions more meaningful.

![Gemini creates a summary table from a prompt with âhelp me organizeâ, shown with a three people at a computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d9iDM10MPwH892qyzEsbfQTzBl4kMVfcWNxhcGooTTGLO9zGXn735uZU45HTxGv_7Dgw06-eFYys6TJOAbtgiBpMJak-8rfUOhlB=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

###### Operational efficiency

Whether youâre launching a new product or working on a new project, Gemini can help you stay on-track. With *Help me organize*, Gemini in Sheets can help you build checklists, project trackers, and more in just seconds. The collaborative nature of Google Workspace allows you to share these materials with your team and keep an eye on progress to keep things running smoothly.

###### Bookkeeping

Freelancers and small business owners like you have a lot to handle, and bookkeeping and logistics can be overwhelming. Gemini is your AI assistant that can help you organize and track receipts from your [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) inbox, so you don't have to waste time searching for critical information. AI does the heavy lifting for you by extracting essential details, organizing summary notes in Docs and helping you create spreadsheets. Using Gemini with these kinds of insights can help get to answers, like "where is the money spent", that matter most to you and your business.

### How can AI help small businesses do more with less?

AI can help small businesses make the most of their resources, giving them the tools needed to easily create tables and trackers, create compelling first-drafts of content and presentations, and serve as a research partner. AI can help small businesses summarize customer communication and craft meaningful responses to inquiries and common questions.

These are only a few ways that small businesses can use the power of AI to do more with less. The more you work with AI, the easier it is to find even more ways to help streamline tasks, save time, and find creative inspiration. AI is [changing the way we work](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/3-ways-gen-ai-will-impact-way-we-work). To use AI successfully, small businesses need to learn how to write effective prompts that can help generate the most helpful output.

###### AI prompts for your small business

**Speaking with investors**

Letâs say you are a founder of a startup and your online business is gaining traction. You have always dreamed of opening a brick-and-mortar store and now might be the perfect time. You want a thought partner to help you better understand the current landscape. You open [gemini.google.com](https://gemini.google.com/), and you type:

*I am a founder of a startup. I am considering opening a brick-and-mortar store. Conduct an analysis into the competitive landscape focusing on [focus area]. Provide the strengths and weaknesses of [key competitors] in this area, including their specific strategies, tactics, and results. Identify actionable insights and recommendations for how [my company] can improve its approach and gain a competitive analysis.*

**Enable customer self-service**

Suppose you own a small boutique and you get a lot of emails with questions about your return policy. Customer feedback has consistently said your guidelines are unclear. You open a Google Doc that states the return, refund, and store credit policies. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting *Help me write*. You type:

*Summarize this content to write a clear and concise product return policy and outline 5 steps for customers to take in sequential order.*

Use Gemini in Sheets to create tracking tables and lists. Craft images and presentations with Gemini in Slides. Ask Gemini in Docs to help you create first-drafts for different types of written materials, including emails, and more. Gain your time back to focus on your craft with Gemini.

## Take notes for me

With "Take notes for me" in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/meet/), you can focus entirely on the conversation while AI captures meeting details in real time. The feature organizes the notes in a [Google Doc](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/) and saves it directly to your [Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/drive/), which frees you up to fully participate in the discussion. Try this and more in [Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/).

## AI note taking in Google Workspace

![Gemini taking notes in a Google Meet call.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Q5lsM_sg7EDWNtTFMRzRF9NrbnCfgWMtQWoFQ7gIC6hJ2yhmSWqGOJSn09szsXXs8Vjgc9ZR3hbwuv10KMMIucWHXWFcC_Rj5yCS=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Meet

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items, so you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organized in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarize your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Calendar

"Take notes for me" attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items, so you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organized in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarize your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

"Take notes for me" attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

## Reclaim your focus

Using AI for note taking boosts productivity and reduces errors compared to manual note taking. âTake notes for meâ helps you stay focused and actively participate in meetings instead of capturing next steps and key points.

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the "Take notes for me" feature identifying action items and assigning tasks to attendees.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/8sdE_Lhc19nWRf6GZzt0PwwZSRW75nsuRLQOrqDa4A00mRAa-WfpRpBskWXnF21n575lLLonokpsuiWZqH6uoK1BX9GC-b17UVI=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Tips for smarter meeting notes

Get the best results from your AI meeting note taker by:

- Having clear audio and eliminating outside noise
- Prepare and follow an agenda for the meeting
- Reviewing and editing AI-generated notes for accuracy

## Frequently asked questions

Take a look at our FAQs to learn more.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini is trained using massive datasets of voice recordings in different languages, accents, and dialects. This makes it possible to identify language and speech patterns for accurate translation and note taking.
- Gemini in Google Meet offers AI-powered capabilities that can transcribe audio and video meetings in real-time and can offer translated captions in over 70 languages.
- Workspace with Gemini AI note taking can quickly pinpoint action items and key decisions discussed in a meeting. Ask Gemini to "Take notes for me" and Gemini analyzes the conversation and extracts major talking points, including suggested next steps and important decisions. Gemini then exports those takeaways to a Google Doc that can be shared with attendees.
- AI note taking saves time and allows attendees to fully focus on the conversation and participate instead of worrying about capturing every detail in writing. Whether youâre in a client meeting or lecture hall, AI note taking can accurately highlight important topics and information.

![Gemini spark icon ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/QvpjjvfsNSOGRhwVxT5Yzb8GGHGvM8ofRFPQ7plqlsuMwUehmcfZcw7FISasCFHXWZxx9DkLKYABSSa6g2xQye-Uhv5zFzj216g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w128)

## Frequently asked questions

Take a look at our FAQs to learn more.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini is trained using massive datasets of voice recordings in different languages, accents, and dialects. This makes it possible to identify language and speech patterns for accurate translation and note taking.
- Gemini in Google Meet offers AI-powered capabilities that can transcribe audio and video meetings in real-time and can offer translated captions in over 70 languages.
- Workspace with Gemini AI note taking can quickly pinpoint action items and key decisions discussed in a meeting. Ask Gemini to "Take notes for me" and Gemini analyzes the conversation and extracts major talking points, including suggested next steps and important decisions. Gemini then exports those takeaways to a Google Doc that can be shared with attendees.
- AI note taking saves time and allows attendees to fully focus on the conversation and participate instead of worrying about capturing every detail in writing. Whether youâre in a client meeting or lecture hall, AI note taking can accurately highlight important topics and information.
