## 17. AI note-taking

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking?hl=en

# AI note-taking

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking?hl=en

# AI note-taking

Save time and improve focus with AI note-taking to capture, transcribe and summarise information.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_ai_note_taking-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_ai_note_taking-hero-en-GB)

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the 'take notes for me' feature summarising the meeting. Below, a Gmail inbox shows the 'Meeting summary' email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/We4LGS10ZYL6zqfAmXJ-5ZdD3RjKV3ylL6tZ8nLdW7GGr_awC2KQtBFQPsmseK7Yb5zIvUycBvbHQ1KhdsktkOcEac-N6n2uXyEl=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the 'summary so far' feature summarising the meeting. To the right, a Google Doc shows the 'Meeting summary' notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ETMQlM9tUh45bQMSRFkP5yJTo7ZwpDUtF4ZrwliCj2mzMKunsTTPbbSwlr6jS9u-hucR60mFYtBXVoCBBk-yrg8FF08ouWoDSRRJ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Take notes for me

With 'Take notes for me' in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/meet/), you can focus entirely on the conversation while AI captures meeting details in real time. The feature organises the notes in a [Google Doc](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/docs/) and saves it directly to your [Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/drive/), which frees you up to fully participate in the discussion. Try this and more in [Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/).

## AI note-taking in Google Workspace

![Gemini taking notes in a Google Meet call.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Q5lsM_sg7EDWNtTFMRzRF9NrbnCfgWMtQWoFQ7gIC6hJ2yhmSWqGOJSn09szsXXs8Vjgc9ZR3hbwuv10KMMIucWHXWFcC_Rj5yCS=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Meet

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items so that you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organised in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarise your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Calendar

'Take notes for me' attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

![Gemini taking notes in a Google Meet call.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Q5lsM_sg7EDWNtTFMRzRF9NrbnCfgWMtQWoFQ7gIC6hJ2yhmSWqGOJSn09szsXXs8Vjgc9ZR3hbwuv10KMMIucWHXWFcC_Rj5yCS=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Meet

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items so that you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organised in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarise your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Calendar

'Take notes for me' attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

## Reclaim your focus

Using AI for note-taking boosts productivity and reduces errors compared to manual note-taking. 'Take notes for me' helps you to stay focused and actively participate in meetings instead of capturing next steps and key points.

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the 'take notes for me' feature identifying action items and assigning tasks to attendees.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/8sdE_Lhc19nWRf6GZzt0PwwZSRW75nsuRLQOrqDa4A00mRAa-WfpRpBskWXnF21n575lLLonokpsuiWZqH6uoK1BX9GC-b17UVI=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![A person on a video call, with 'Microphone' settings showing and 'studio sound' enabled. To the right, a 'Summary' window generates notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NMYTjyReupoA0m6x-nLCUSsQ5FfTgCJwJl_jT2AINzccCWc7h9IJ8IJJygsrXCs15WfCnxjXyi0_d80SARKUY3K_HWLmUDywqH4y=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Tips for smarter meeting notes

Get the best results from your AI meeting note-taker by:

- Having clear audio and eliminating outside noise
- Preparing and following an agenda for the meeting
- Reviewing and editing AI-generated notes for accuracy

Business Starter includes 30Â GB of pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2Â TB, and Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5Â TB. Visit our Help Centre to learn more about getting additional storage for your organisation.

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini has attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISOÂ 42001 and SOCÂ 1/2/3, and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-GB).

## Google Workspace is more powerful with Gemini Enterprise

Gemini Enterprise lets your team run AI agents on one secure platform. With Google Workspace, agents can work across your apps so that teams accomplish more, faster.

![A dark infographic with concentric blue rings mapping out an AI ecosystem. It labels central components like Gemini models as 'The Brains' and agent orchestration as 'The Workbench' around a central video play button.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YZZ8d6gNBVQWlNHXCJwbMfzvzraGrFuF_nhJSMkskq2uIzloqSv4AY4P5yFpSDrAiZjOr1ncVUhN32gkC634cLdOOqM7IxoFVNic=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Empower your teams with agents

Build custom agents and use them across Docs, Gmail and more. No coding necessary.

Ground agents in your business data

Connect agents to your apps and systems of record, giving them the context to solve complex tasks.

Deploy and manage with confidence

Govern with enterprise-grade security and data sovereignty, for agentic teamwork without compromising control.

## Organisations are using Gemini to move faster and be more productive

![Uber logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/me1s20v6oi6MdhwXBNImQkS-2pkcDPTB8wgP3-qb7El2qJopvv_Bz7PocchJbTKLk7Gf3a2yDHZALCoqNpoQAz_Xg3io5Fj4blr7JA=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini helps us save time on repetitive tasks, frees up developers for higher-value work, reduces our agency spending and enhances employee retention.

**Dara Khosrowshahi**, CEO, Uber

![Deloitte logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NLUjEc7jRTXOYRdsa6WtJ46WpaNc2Qzy4F96UYUbXOOnnok1jn4tjfHB6brs_CLxJJ0bTjH8Psctol06wNSaxdiSkbxZlttB5O83TQ=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Gemini has been incredibly valuable for us as its differentiated capabilities have been core to making our everyday work more effective. Features such as Deep Research to develop in-depth analytical reports on topics, native multimodal understanding and NotebookLM for being able to derive insights from vast troves of information have changed our ways of working for the better.

**Gopal Srinivasan,** Principal

![Sports Basement logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/xK5TatN-dxhTdGRN9ZfE9mRQJHi9KFjNZW4A4s-u8ByJ8EblvSXvP-j2-V1wW8r3q0WigCSfeAh9svytC3JDIc8aUfSFvAfQfbY5=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Using Gemini with Workspace, the customer service team crafts customer responses nearly instantaneously. From there, they can personalise the emails to best suit a customer's needs and their own voice. This has resulted in a 30â35% reduction in time spent drafting messages, resulting in a quicker response time, better job satisfaction and higher response quality. We've also shifted from using more than 100 templates for responses to simpler and faster prompting for more authentic responses.

**Anthony Biolatto**, CIO, Sports Basement

![FinQuery logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/7H181VaXYH3dKaXDIPDwF5YJ-HSjX03OljVfkFV3g9IcP0VgvYZLOM8nfFBl9MgbvlTnOxGWnINAy8mGEDCDs3mJQwMTcr97n8ZT=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini is becoming a part of our way of life. I personally leveraged Gemini in Google Docs to create a one-page summary of observability and monitoring tools. What Gemini gave me was CTO-ready. The time that I get back from Gemini helps me spend more focus hours doing the things that really need my attention.

**Andrew Larson**, CTO, FinQuery

![Pepperdine University logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/mOnnCN8ZekhWzlbXV2vx_8B3guRVhuNNg_zH9fj5Oj-wIYpOihU3OQRcgTX4md73OR85-uiFJjkql-n5Lfeeni7-1WCOhK8b2Q7x=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> The captioning within Google Meet is going to be a huge game changer in extending equity and accessibility, especially for those with language barriersâ¦ Using Gemini with Google Workspace, we can now quickly transcribe meeting minutes within Google Docs and summarise them in a succinct way to share with our users.

**Jonathan See**, CIO Pepperdine University

![Trellix logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bS9MREgb-q55Z4vEV_ICXAfgFsyW5GxPGVngQSymi6I016e1QMekl3_yTDa2g_HeQZQWLB0DM2SaNp3qCgD4lCOaI85EGB5-xQSL=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Meet has been extremely transformative for us with regard to bringing people together and collaborating. Now, with Gemini in Meet in preview, we've been really impressed with how it can take meeting notes, from bulletising to capturing action items. I don't even need to make edits to what comes back in the GoogleÂ Doc.

**Ashley Hatter**, Senior Director, Enterprise Technology Trellix

![Fingerpaint logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-JffxsaT6lcNc9BMPVwlnL-0b03052da4bcadd1e47335515b5fbf94-FP_Marketing_Logo_Eggplant_RGB.svg)

> Our AI policy is 'people first'. NotebookLM is an incredible augmented intelligence tool that just works, is very performant and does what it says it does.

**Nick Spuhler**, SVP, Director of Applied AI at Fingerpaint

### Want to learn more?

Here are some answers to common questions about these features.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini weaves AI into apps that you use every day, like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids and more. It also provides powerful standalone tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM. [Explore](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805975-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en) which Workspace plan is right for your business. You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805975-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/?hl=en-GB) to track the latest progress and developments.
- Your organisation's data in Workspace is your data, and it's not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organisations. You can restrict Gemini's access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM) and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-GB).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153?hl=en-GB). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419?hl=en-GB) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en-GB). Gemini is available in all supported languages wherever Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available in even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarise complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews and visually explore topics with mind maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analysing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq&hl=en-GB).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini?hl=en-GB).

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3rzrpr9DYRQH4Mg1yqP27O-e85e597871ca6e3c6db160dde2b58dd4-5050_UK_Gradient_Spark.svg)

## Helpful, personalized, and secure AI-first apps for work

Gemini and NotebookLM for work

Get instant insights and everyday AI assistance with enterprise-ready versions of the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google/about/) and [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/notebooklm/).

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-V2Nj9TmrI8Z2zPfPO6F6W-83c0ff6477418692473cced648b4e0df-Woven_into_Workspace_apps.svg)

Work faster with AI that brings everything together to support you in the tools you already use, like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Meet.

Secure your business data

Easily manage team access and data controls. Your company data is strictly yours, and is [not used to train models](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/gemini/generative-ai-in-google-workspace-privacy-hub).

\*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.

Ready to transform your business with powerful AI agents? [Explore Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-premium-offers&hl=en-CA)

Want to experience Gemini with your personal Google account? [Get started](https://one.google.com/explore-plan/gemini-workspace?utm_source=gmail&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=escape_hatch&hl=en-CA)

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISO 42001, SOC 1/2/3 and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-CA).

## Google Workspace is more powerful with Gemini Enterprise

Gemini Enterprise lets your team run AI agents in one secure platform. With Google Workspace, agents can work across your apps so teams accomplish more, faster.

![A dark infographic with concentric blue rings mapping out an AI ecosystem. It labels central components like Gemini models as "The Brains" and agent orchestration as "The Workbench" around a central video play button.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YZZ8d6gNBVQWlNHXCJwbMfzvzraGrFuF_nhJSMkskq2uIzloqSv4AY4P5yFpSDrAiZjOr1ncVUhN32gkC634cLdOOqM7IxoFVNic=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Empower your teams with agents

Build custom agents and use them across Docs, Gmail, and more. No coding necessary.

Ground agents in your business data

Connect agents to your apps and systems of record, giving them the context to solve complex tasks.

Deploy and manage with confidence

Govern with enterprise-grade security and data sovereignty, for agentic teamwork without compromising control.

## Organizations are using Gemini to move faster and be more productive

![Uber logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/me1s20v6oi6MdhwXBNImQkS-2pkcDPTB8wgP3-qb7El2qJopvv_Bz7PocchJbTKLk7Gf3a2yDHZALCoqNpoQAz_Xg3io5Fj4blr7JA=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini helps us save time on repetitive tasks, frees up developers for higher-value work, reduces our agency spending, and enhances employee retention.

**Dara Khosrowshahi**, CEO Uber

![Deloitte](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NLUjEc7jRTXOYRdsa6WtJ46WpaNc2Qzy4F96UYUbXOOnnok1jn4tjfHB6brs_CLxJJ0bTjH8Psctol06wNSaxdiSkbxZlttB5O83TQ=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Gemini has been incredibly valuable for us as its differentiated capabilities have been core to making our everyday work more effective. Features such as Deep Research to develop in-depth analytical reports on topics, native multimodal understanding and NotebookLM for being able to derive insights from vast troves of information have changed our ways of working for the better.

**Gopal Srinivasan,** Principal

![Sports Basement logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/xK5TatN-dxhTdGRN9ZfE9mRQJHi9KFjNZW4A4s-u8ByJ8EblvSXvP-j2-V1wW8r3q0WigCSfeAh9svytC3JDIc8aUfSFvAfQfbY5=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Using Gemini with Workspace, the customer service team crafts customer responses nearly instantaneously. From there, they can personalize the emails to best suit a customerâs needs and their own voice. This has resulted in a 30-35% reduction in time spent drafting messages, resulting in quicker response time, better job satisfaction, and higher response quality. Weâve also shifted from using more than 100 templates for responses to simpler and faster prompting for more authentic responses.

**Anthony Biolatto**, CIO Sports Basement

![FinQuery logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/7H181VaXYH3dKaXDIPDwF5YJ-HSjX03OljVfkFV3g9IcP0VgvYZLOM8nfFBl9MgbvlTnOxGWnINAy8mGEDCDs3mJQwMTcr97n8ZT=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini is becoming a part of our way of life. I personally leveraged Gemini in Google Docs to create a one-page summary of observability and monitoring tools. What Gemini gave me was CTO Ready. The time I get back from Gemini helps me spend more focus hours doing the things that really need my attention.

**Andrew Larson**, CTO FinQuery

![Pepperdine University logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/mOnnCN8ZekhWzlbXV2vx_8B3guRVhuNNg_zH9fj5Oj-wIYpOihU3OQRcgTX4md73OR85-uiFJjkql-n5Lfeeni7-1WCOhK8b2Q7x=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> The captioning within Google Meet is going to be a huge game changer in extending equity and accessibility, especially for those with language barriersâ¦ Using Gemini with Google Workspace, we can now quickly transcribe meeting minutes within Google Docs and summarize them in a succinct way to share with our users.

**Jonathan See**, CIO Pepperdine University

![Trellix logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bS9MREgb-q55Z4vEV_ICXAfgFsyW5GxPGVngQSymi6I016e1QMekl3_yTDa2g_HeQZQWLB0DM2SaNp3qCgD4lCOaI85EGB5-xQSL=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Meet has been extremely transformative for us with regards to bringing people together and collaborating. Now, with Gemini in Meet in preview, weâve been really impressed with how it can take meeting notes, from bulletizing to capturing action items.â¨I donât even need to make edits to what comes back in the Google Doc.

**Ashley Hatter**, Senior Director, Enterprise Technology Trellix

![Fingerpaint logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-JffxsaT6lcNc9BMPVwlnL-0b03052da4bcadd1e47335515b5fbf94-FP_Marketing_Logo_Eggplant_RGB.svg)

> Our AI policy is 'people first.' NotebookLM is an incredible augmented intelligence tool that just works, is very performant, and does what it says it does.

**Nick Spuhler**, SVP, Director of Applied AI at Fingerpaint

### Want to learn more?

Here are some answers to common questions about these features.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini weaves AI into apps you use every day like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids, and more. It also provides powerful standalone tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM. [Explore](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805959-body-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en) which Workspace plan is right for your business. You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805959-body-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/?hl=en-CA) to track the latest progress and developments!
- Your organizationâs data in Workspace is your data, and itâs not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organizations. You can restrict Geminiâs access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM), and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-CA).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153?hl=en-CA). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419?hl=en-CA) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en-CA). Gemini is available in all supported languages everywhere that Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available for even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarize complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews, and visually explore topics with Mind Maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share, and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analyzing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq&hl=en-CA).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts, and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini?hl=en-CA).

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3rzrpr9DYRQH4Mg1yqP27O-e85e597871ca6e3c6db160dde2b58dd4-5050_UK_Gradient_Spark.svg)

## 20. AI tools for a better way to work

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai?hl=en

# AI tools for a better way to work

## Helpful, personalized, and secure AI-first apps for work

![Gemini logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-BL7xHIHI3CPCUZ0ZjYty1-612803e03cd5ed1bd259a27a78234c09-Gemini_and_NotebookLM_for_work.svg)

Gemini and NotebookLM for work

Get instant insights and everyday AI assistance with enterprise-ready versions of the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google/about/) and [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/products/notebooklm/).

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-V2Nj9TmrI8Z2zPfPO6F6W-83c0ff6477418692473cced648b4e0df-Woven_into_Workspace_apps.svg)

Personalized AI built into Workspace apps

Work faster with AI that brings everything together to support you in the tools you already use, like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Meet.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-97psVWv4JG9aLAeQfLuD2-e12e81d546b3a5ef703df03f1a72102f-Secure_your_business_data.svg)

Secure your business data

Easily manage team access and data controls. Your company data is strictly yours, and is [not used to train models](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/gemini/generative-ai-in-google-workspace-privacy-hub).

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISO 42001, SOC 1/2/3 and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919).

## Google Workspace is more powerful with Gemini Enterprise

Gemini Enterprise lets your team run AI agents in one secure platform. With Google Workspace, agents can work across your apps so teams accomplish more, faster.

![A dark infographic with concentric blue rings mapping out an AI ecosystem. It labels central components like Gemini models as "The Brains" and agent orchestration as "The Workbench" around a central video play button.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YZZ8d6gNBVQWlNHXCJwbMfzvzraGrFuF_nhJSMkskq2uIzloqSv4AY4P5yFpSDrAiZjOr1ncVUhN32gkC634cLdOOqM7IxoFVNic=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Empower your teams with agents

Build custom agents and use them across Docs, Gmail, and more. No coding necessary.

Ground agents in your business data

Connect agents to your apps and systems of record, giving them the context to solve complex tasks.

Deploy and manage with confidence

Govern with enterprise-grade security and data sovereignty, for agentic teamwork without compromising control.

# Learn how to get the most out of Gemini for Google Workspace

![Learn how Gemini in Google Workspace can elevate the way you write, meet, and collaborate every day.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/t-pImc_CxfcYvYwd-_C7tKFFJRieWYYYIYQDWXus0Xv0_YIbxkwB2n3OxkTKdshQ1mbyNM5d0PB-3fbpNM426TzBgsZT31e5tp85_g=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

### Gemini at Work resource hub

![Deloitte](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NLUjEc7jRTXOYRdsa6WtJ46WpaNc2Qzy4F96UYUbXOOnnok1jn4tjfHB6brs_CLxJJ0bTjH8Psctol06wNSaxdiSkbxZlttB5O83TQ=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

**Andrew Larson**, CTO FinQuery

![Pepperdine University logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/mOnnCN8ZekhWzlbXV2vx_8B3guRVhuNNg_zH9fj5Oj-wIYpOihU3OQRcgTX4md73OR85-uiFJjkql-n5Lfeeni7-1WCOhK8b2Q7x=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

**Jonathan See**, CIO Pepperdine University

### Want to learn more?

Here are some answers to common questions about these features.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini weaves AI into apps you use every day like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids, and more. It also provides powerful standalone tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM. [Explore](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805955-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en) which Workspace plan is right for your business. You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805955-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/) to track the latest progress and developments!
- Your organizationâs data in Workspace is your data, and itâs not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organizations. You can restrict Geminiâs access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM), and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en). Gemini is available in all supported languages everywhere that Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available for even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarize complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews, and visually explore topics with Mind Maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share, and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analyzing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts, and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini).

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3rzrpr9DYRQH4Mg1yqP27O-e85e597871ca6e3c6db160dde2b58dd4-5050_UK_Gradient_Spark.svg)

## 21. AI tools for writing

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

With Gemini, you can harness the power of AI to help brainstorm, write, and edit high-quality content quickly and effortlessly.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en-CA)

![A âHelp me writeâ icon surrounded by examples of the feature in action. These include writing an acceptance letter in Gmail, drafting a memo in Google Docs, setting up a workflow in Workspace Studio, and creating a presentation template in Gemini.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/WYWFikEksoLYKVghaa-ajOfTzA1ghkDBBJzKlJvy4-160tsUg1bx-CRCZnm1qWVNh3vVad0tTu_KxahWu2Dt-2GWLqKoYZRnuis=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How are AI writing tools being used?

###### AI tools for writing leverage large language models to help people create content faster. [Gemini](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini-for-work?hl=en-CA) is an AI-powered assistant that can help with writing by assisting with tasks like researching, drafting copy, and polishing content.

Even the most talented writers sometimes have a difficult time coming up with ideas on-demand. Generative AI can help you push past the blank page by providing you with a springboard to build on. Whether you need help composing an email reply, get options for headlines, or target a specific audience segment with messaging for an ad campaign, generative AI can help you quickly deliver a first draft. Let Gemini help generate content quickly with [Gemini in Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/), or use the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google.com) as your writing assistant by asking it to create content.

![A Google Doc with text highlighted and a âSummarizeâ window floating over the document.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AoK7KhUXOGFiSiiFkKzcKQxaJh-sF22yCfpcXR_WzbuPAMp_QVpdr_VEUcO6zzdoF51--STcyz1rsOKksesZQCNlZ_euYk1HGZju=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Let Gemini be your writing assistant

### Generate long-form content

Long-form content has the power to inform, entertain, and educate. But sometimes it can be difficult to organize your thoughts into a well-structured article that captures your audienceâs attention and expresses ideas clearly. When deadlines loom, Gemini acts as your AI-powered thought partner to help synthesize data and transform it into a polished first draft. Add your sources to Gemini or open Gemini in Google Docs to quickly create long-form copy grounded in trusted information.

For writers who like to take more of a hands-on approach, Gemini in Docs can help from directly within your active working-document. Let Gemini brainstorm with you by creating comprehensive outlines and initial drafts from scratch. With a first draft firmly in place, you can add your own creative touches to adjust the article and tailor it to your voice.

### Maintain your unique brand voice & style

Your brand voice and tone set you apart. Gemini helps you stay true to that voice. With [Google Workspace AI](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-for-small-business/) tools, you can create timely content without compromising your brand identity and build your own custom AI brand expert that never goes off-script. With [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?hl=en-CA), you can share Gems across your organization and ensure that every team member can work from the same playbook, regardless of department or role.

Add custom instructions, upload your brand book, style guide, and persona docs directly from Drive to ground Gemini in your unique voice. Any proprietary data you use in Gemini stays secure and is never used to train generative AI models.

### Edit existing text

When you need an extra set of eyes on your content before publishing, AI writing tools can make suggestions to improve your writing. As a writing coach and editor, Gemini can help you save time on revisions by suggesting corrections for spelling and grammatical errors.

[Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/) can also help you rewrite your article. Simply use Help me write in Docs and choose an option such as summarize or shorten to help you deliver a more concise draft. When writing ad copy, Gemini can also help you come up with multiple versions of text youâve already written, giving you more options to choose from.

### Create article outlines and research briefs

AI writing tools can help create outlines to better structure a piece of content, organize your thoughts, and deliver a focused narrative. Use Gemini to generate comprehensive research briefs with outlines of key points to guide long-form content such as articles or blog posts.

To use AI to generate a writing outline, start by asking Gemini for a structured outline befitting your specific type of content. Provide detailed information about your topic, any subtopics your article should include, and relevant keywords. Be sure to reference and attach critical documents or resources that Gemini should reference in its decision-making.

### Generate Gmail responses

Achieve the elusive Inbox Zero status and get help responding to emails without struggling to find the right words. [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/ai/) acts as a communication partner, crafting replies by building off of context in previous emails and relevant Drive files to create a response that continues to propel the conversation forward. Ask Gemini to help you adjust your tone, giving your email a more formal or relaxed feel. Gemini can also help you draft more concise emails, synthesizing information to deliver a shorter, easier-to-read message.

### Summarize complex information

Gemini makes it easy to pull insights from multiple sources right from the side panel in apps your team already uses. Synthesize key points from relevant folders in Drive, files in [Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/), or [Google Chat](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/chat/) and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/) threads. Transform raw data into a concise executive brief or a research-backed first draft. Use Gemini for smart summaries to take complex information and distill it into easily digestible content.

### Create business proposals

AI writing tools can also help you create business proposals and tailor your pitch to a prospect. Using Help me write, simply provide the details about your prospect and their industry. In seconds, Gemini in Docs can generate a proposal that outlines your services, offerings, and can even add a call invite to help you keep the conversation going. When the time comes to present to a prospect, [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/presentation-ai/) can help you create an outline and slides for a proposal deck that elaborates on your offerings. Gemini can also be used to generate speaker notes, helping you stay focused during your presentation.

![A Google Doc with a âRefineâ button floating over the text. On the left, a chat window shows a user asking, âWhat is our brand voice?â and NotebookLM retrieving a PDF of âBrand guidelinesâ. On the right, Gemini is brainstorming a list of ideas.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/B2axTOalWwpMwCW49nJfiTF0rOab6UMAC5SJm6fs4qWKl8_xxlceLT5WRJFlDlvXdT_OZK4qJmI85AhyciXgqu8mBob4oUoohRWoVQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Benefits of using an AI content writer

### Save time on repetitive tasks

With only so many hours in a day, it can be daunting to keep pace with a flood of emails, meetings, and tasks to accomplish. Gemini and [Google Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/studio/) streamline routine writing tasks, giving you more time to focus on deep work. Workspace Studio helps you create automated workflows in Workspace apps in minutes without code. Quickly recap weekly meetings, capture action items, and connect Workspace with third-party apps to generate contextually aware drafts.

### Overcome creative barriers

Sometimes, you need a boost of inspiration. Thatâs where Gemini comes in. Gemini can be a creative partner that helps you overcome writerâs block. You can also use Gemini in Docs to refine your content, adjusting the tone and voice to be more formal or more playful, depending on your approach. Still stuck? Gemini can help you break through creative blocks by serving you with a list of ideas to spark your imagination and get those creative juices flowing again.

### Streamline formatting and structural editing

Transform messy first drafts into polished, professional content. Gemini uses advanced [AI and machine learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/?hl=en-CA) to refine content based on formatting guidelines and writing best practices. Gemini can save time on writing and editing, reordering sections for clarity and ensuring a clean hierarchy thatâs easy for both readers and Google AI Overviews to follow. [Workspace AI solutions](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/) like NotebookLM can help you organize trusted sources and brand-specific data, ensuring your content references only sources you provide.

### Enhance teamwork and collaboration

Whether youâre a team of one or a team of many spread across different time zones, Gemini can help make the collaborative process more inclusive and seamless. During video conference calls with the entire team [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-for-meetings/) can automatically take notes during the meeting and share with participants afterwards.

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Use built-in prompts like *Help me write* and *Help me organize*, adding your own context and details to help shape Gemini's output.

  [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/duet-ai/docs/discover/write-prompts?hl=en-CA)
- Gemini can help you craft a variety of content, including emails, business proposals, presentations, outlines, blog posts, and more.
- Gemini collects data based on information you provide and maintains data privacy. Your data is never used to train generative AI models. Proprietary information stays private. Access is granted only to users in your organization with role or user-based permissions.

  [Learn more](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961?hl=en-CA).

![Gemini spark icon ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/QvpjjvfsNSOGRhwVxT5Yzb8GGHGvM8ofRFPQ7plqlsuMwUehmcfZcw7FISasCFHXWZxx9DkLKYABSSa6g2xQye-Uhv5zFzj216g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w128)

## Get started with AI content writing

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_writing-footer-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_writing-footer-en-CA)

## 22. AI tools for writing

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

With Gemini, you can harness the power of AI to help brainstorm, write, and edit high-quality content quickly and effortlessly.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en)

![A âHelp me writeâ icon surrounded by examples of the feature in action. These include writing an acceptance letter in Gmail, drafting a memo in Google Docs, setting up a workflow in Workspace Studio, and creating a presentation template in Gemini.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/WYWFikEksoLYKVghaa-ajOfTzA1ghkDBBJzKlJvy4-160tsUg1bx-CRCZnm1qWVNh3vVad0tTu_KxahWu2Dt-2GWLqKoYZRnuis=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How are AI writing tools being used?

###### AI tools for writing leverage large language models to help people create content faster. [Gemini](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini-for-work) is an AI-powered assistant that can help with writing by assisting with tasks like researching, drafting copy, and polishing content.

Even the most talented writers sometimes have a difficult time coming up with ideas on-demand. Generative AI can help you push past the blank page by providing you with a springboard to build on. Whether you need help composing an email reply, get options for headlines, or target a specific audience segment with messaging for an ad campaign, generative AI can help you quickly deliver a first draft. Let Gemini help generate content quickly with [Gemini in Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/), or use the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google.com) as your writing assistant by asking it to create content.

![A Google Doc with text highlighted and a âSummarizeâ window floating over the document.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AoK7KhUXOGFiSiiFkKzcKQxaJh-sF22yCfpcXR_WzbuPAMp_QVpdr_VEUcO6zzdoF51--STcyz1rsOKksesZQCNlZ_euYk1HGZju=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Let Gemini be your writing assistant

### Generate long-form content

Long-form content has the power to inform, entertain, and educate. But sometimes it can be difficult to organize your thoughts into a well-structured article that captures your audienceâs attention and expresses ideas clearly. When deadlines loom, Gemini acts as your AI-powered thought partner to help synthesize data and transform it into a polished first draft. Add your sources to Gemini or open Gemini in Google Docs to quickly create long-form copy grounded in trusted information.

For writers who like to take more of a hands-on approach, Gemini in Docs can help from directly within your active working-document. Let Gemini brainstorm with you by creating comprehensive outlines and initial drafts from scratch. With a first draft firmly in place, you can add your own creative touches to adjust the article and tailor it to your voice.

### Maintain your unique brand voice & style

Your brand voice and tone set you apart. Gemini helps you stay true to that voice. With [Google Workspace AI](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-for-small-business/) tools, you can create timely content without compromising your brand identity and build your own custom AI brand expert that never goes off-script. With [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise), you can share Gems across your organization and ensure that every team member can work from the same playbook, regardless of department or role.

Add custom instructions, upload your brand book, style guide, and persona docs directly from Drive to ground Gemini in your unique voice. Any proprietary data you use in Gemini stays secure and is never used to train generative AI models.

### Edit existing text

When you need an extra set of eyes on your content before publishing, AI writing tools can make suggestions to improve your writing. As a writing coach and editor, Gemini can help you save time on revisions by suggesting corrections for spelling and grammatical errors.

[Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/) can also help you rewrite your article. Simply use Help me write in Docs and choose an option such as summarize or shorten to help you deliver a more concise draft. When writing ad copy, Gemini can also help you come up with multiple versions of text youâve already written, giving you more options to choose from.

### Create article outlines and research briefs

AI writing tools can help create outlines to better structure a piece of content, organize your thoughts, and deliver a focused narrative. Use Gemini to generate comprehensive research briefs with outlines of key points to guide long-form content such as articles or blog posts.

To use AI to generate a writing outline, start by asking Gemini for a structured outline befitting your specific type of content. Provide detailed information about your topic, any subtopics your article should include, and relevant keywords. Be sure to reference and attach critical documents or resources that Gemini should reference in its decision-making.

### Generate Gmail responses

Achieve the elusive Inbox Zero status and get help responding to emails without struggling to find the right words. [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) acts as a communication partner, crafting replies by building off of context in previous emails and relevant Drive files to create a response that continues to propel the conversation forward. Ask Gemini to help you adjust your tone, giving your email a more formal or relaxed feel. Gemini can also help you draft more concise emails, synthesizing information to deliver a shorter, easier-to-read message.

### Summarize complex information

Gemini makes it easy to pull insights from multiple sources right from the side panel in apps your team already uses. Synthesize key points from relevant folders in Drive, files in [Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/), or [Google Chat](https://workspace.google.com/products/chat/) and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/) threads. Transform raw data into a concise executive brief or a research-backed first draft. Use Gemini for smart summaries to take complex information and distill it into easily digestible content.

### Create business proposals

AI writing tools can also help you create business proposals and tailor your pitch to a prospect. Using Help me write, simply provide the details about your prospect and their industry. In seconds, Gemini in Docs can generate a proposal that outlines your services, offerings, and can even add a call invite to help you keep the conversation going. When the time comes to present to a prospect, [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/resources/presentation-ai/) can help you create an outline and slides for a proposal deck that elaborates on your offerings. Gemini can also be used to generate speaker notes, helping you stay focused during your presentation.

![A Google Doc with a âRefineâ button floating over the text. On the left, a chat window shows a user asking, âWhat is our brand voice?â and NotebookLM retrieving a PDF of âBrand guidelinesâ. On the right, Gemini is brainstorming a list of ideas.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/B2axTOalWwpMwCW49nJfiTF0rOab6UMAC5SJm6fs4qWKl8_xxlceLT5WRJFlDlvXdT_OZK4qJmI85AhyciXgqu8mBob4oUoohRWoVQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Benefits of using an AI content writer

### Save time on repetitive tasks

With only so many hours in a day, it can be daunting to keep pace with a flood of emails, meetings, and tasks to accomplish. Gemini and [Google Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/studio/) streamline routine writing tasks, giving you more time to focus on deep work. Workspace Studio helps you create automated workflows in Workspace apps in minutes without code. Quickly recap weekly meetings, capture action items, and connect Workspace with third-party apps to generate contextually aware drafts.

### Overcome creative barriers

Sometimes, you need a boost of inspiration. Thatâs where Gemini comes in. Gemini can be a creative partner that helps you overcome writerâs block. You can also use Gemini in Docs to refine your content, adjusting the tone and voice to be more formal or more playful, depending on your approach. Still stuck? Gemini can help you break through creative blocks by serving you with a list of ideas to spark your imagination and get those creative juices flowing again.

### Streamline formatting and structural editing

Transform messy first drafts into polished, professional content. Gemini uses advanced [AI and machine learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/) to refine content based on formatting guidelines and writing best practices. Gemini can save time on writing and editing, reordering sections for clarity and ensuring a clean hierarchy thatâs easy for both readers and Google AI Overviews to follow. [Workspace AI solutions](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/) like NotebookLM can help you organize trusted sources and brand-specific data, ensuring your content references only sources you provide.

### Enhance teamwork and collaboration

Whether youâre a team of one or a team of many spread across different time zones, Gemini can help make the collaborative process more inclusive and seamless. During video conference calls with the entire team [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-for-meetings/) can automatically take notes during the meeting and share with participants afterwards.

- Gemini collects data based on information you provide and maintains data privacy. Your data is never used to train generative AI models. Proprietary information stays private. Access is granted only to users in your organization with role or user-based permissions.

  [Learn more](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961).

## 24. All of our Beyond the prompt series in one place

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/all-our-beyond-prompt-series-in-one-place?hl=en

# All of our Beyond the prompt series in one place

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/all-our-beyond-prompt-series-in-one-place?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# All of our Beyond the prompt series in one place

February 8, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-29_at_2.24.52PM.max-1000x1000.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-29_at_2.24.52PM.max-1000x1000.png)

##### The Google Workspace Team

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

Generative AI is evolving at an incredible pace and it seems like there’s something new to learn every day. That's why we created our *Beyond the prompt* blog series. Across the posts, we share hands-on, practical tips, in-depth use cases, and examples from Googlers and customers. Use this actionable advice to help you get the best out of generative AI in your own work.

### Here’s what we’ve covered so far:

**Getting started**

- [Welcome to Beyond the prompt: Our new series on getting the most out of Gemini for Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/welcome-to-beyond-the-prompt?e=48754805)
- [4 tips to boost your collaboration with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-4-tips-boost-collaboration-gemini?e=48754805)
- [You don’t have to be an engineer to write great Gen AI prompts](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-3-rethinking-prompt-engineering?e=48754805)
- [Beyond the prompt: Resources to get started with Workspace with Gemini today](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-the-prompt-resources-gemini?e=48754805)

**Gemini as a research assistant**

- [Using Gemini for Workspace as your sales research assistant](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-4-using-gemini-workspace-your-sales-research-assistant?e=48754805)
- [How entrepreneurs can run competitive analysis with Gemini for Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-8-how-entrepreneurs-can-run-competitive-analysis-gemini-workspace?e=48754805)

**Gemini to enhance communication and storytelling**

- [How to standardize and personalize customer service responses using Gemini for Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-6-personalize-customer-service-responses?e=48754805)
- [How Gemini helps me go from a blank page to being a confident storyteller](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-how-gemini-helps-me-be-a-confident-storyteller?e=48754805)
- [Question your way to better prompting](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-question-your-way-better-prompting?_gl=1*sdbzxm*_ga*MTMzNTAxODM5My4xNzM4NjA1MjUw*_ga_FWCBRW1RY8*MTczODk2MzYzMC4xMS4xLjE3Mzg5NjQ0MDQuNjAuMC4w&e=48754805)

**Gemini for sales and marketing**

- [How four Googlers in Sales use Gemini to drive results](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-14-how-four-googlers-in-sales-use-gemini?e=48754805)
- [How marketers can conquer the blank page using Gemini for Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-5-marketers-conquer-blank-page?e=48754805)
- [How five marketers at Google use Gemini to transform the way they work](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-12-how-five-marketers-use-gemini-transform-how-they-work?e=48754805)
- [Mastering the “deep end” with generative AI](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-mastering-deep-end-generative-ai?e=48754805)

**Gemini to solve new problems and innovate**

- [Googler Serge Lachapelle shares his lightbulb generative AI moments](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-7-googler-serge-lachapelle-shares-his-lightbulb-generative-ai-moments?e=48754805)
- [Googler Tony Majewski shares how he saves 8-10 hours a week and reduces burnout using Gemini for Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-9-googler-shares-how-he-saves-time-and-reduces-burnout-using-gemini-workspace?e=48754805)
- [Google customer engineer, Pooja Jain, shares how she uses Gemini to unlock new capabilities](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-13-five-key-principles-to-enhance-prompts?e=48754805)

**Customer features on Beyond the prompt**

- [How Understood.org uses Gemini to reduce stress and save 10 hours per project](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-how-understood-uses-gemini-reduce-stress-and-save-10-hours-project?e=48754805)

- [ATB Financial’s 5 tips to drive Workspace with Gemini adoption](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/atb-financial-5-tips-to-drive-workspace-gemini-adoption?e=48754805)

## 25. Attache: Transforming the menial into the magical with Gemini for Google Workspace

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

# Attache: Transforming the menial into the magical with Gemini for Google Workspace

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Attache: Transforming the menial into the magical with Gemini for Google Workspace

March 19, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Attache_hero.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Attache_hero.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Tim Touchette

Owner & President, Attache

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

More than 40 years ago, economist and management consultant W. Edwards Deming gave the mandate that businesses should improve their processes and systems “constantly and forever.”  That maxim remains as true today as it was then, and it’s a core part of our ethos at [Attache](https://stayattache.com/). As a company that connects corporate professionals with monthly furnished rentals, we constantly refine our processes so we can achieve our mission to provide joy in every stay.

We know that our ability to create joyful experiences for both property owners and renters hinges on the way we work as a team. After all, the happier your employees, the happier your customers will be. That’s why we’ve been using [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/) since it first launched in 2006 and why we jumped on [Gemini for Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/duet-ai) as soon as it became available. We believe in letting technology do what technology does best, so we humans can do what we do best.

### Simplifying customer service with Google Workspace

We switched to Google Workspace at the same time that our company started to grow, which made it easy to scale the systems as our team expanded. We continue to use the full suite of Workspace tools to power our collaboration and communication. Now, we’re excited to explore how generative AI can help us serve our customers even better.

For example, we use templates and the “Help me write” feature in [Gmail](https://www.google.com/gmail/about/) to support stronger communication with renters and property owners. In customer service, there are times when we have to deliver less-than-ideal news and coming up with a productive and professional way to share it can be tricky. With Gemini, we have a collaborative tool to help us refresh the message and acknowledge challenging situations in a way that reflects our uplifting tone and personality.

I was also recently tasked with taking meeting notes, a  task I dread and that I believe should be outsourced to technology whenever possible. I pulled the meeting agenda from the [Google Calendar](https://calendar.google.com/) invite and used Gemini to create a detailed template of everything we wanted to capture, including follow-up tasks and to-do lists. After the meeting, I was able to send the notes off to department heads to get their approval before sharing with the rest of the company. Gemini reduced the time it took to complete this dreaded task to just a few minutes.

Our use of Gemini has also helped simplify the customer experience. Onboarding a new property is notoriously complicated with bottlenecks at every turn. Every property is unique, which means a rigid, one-size-fits-all approach for onboarding is impractical and frustrating. Additionally, each department requires different processes: the accounting team needs access to the financial details, the property management service has to ensure that everything from air filter sizes to the WiFi password is accurate and functioning, while the reservations team has to corral the list of features and amenities along with high-quality photos for promotion.

It used to be challenging to keep track of where we were in the process but the “Help me organize” feature in [Google Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/sheets/) has become our secret weapon, allowing us to design step-driven processes with unparalleled flexibility. Now, we have a unified place to build and organize plans, trackers, and timelines, and keep them up to date in real time. We can monitor our progress, see what sections are missing, and collaboratively get a full view of the onboarding process at a glance.

### Demystifying AI usage to create joyful experiences

Let’s go back to Attache’s core mission to provide joy in every stay. This applies not only to the people who choose to rent the properties we represent, but to our teammates who choose to spend a big chunk of their time working with our organization. We are hyper-focused on creating positive employee experiences that bring joy to their lives every day, rather than bogging them down in soul-sucking data entry processes that can lead to drudgery and mistakes. We always look for ways to help our people excel at being humans by connecting and collaborating with clients and co-workers more effectively.

In 2020, we made a strategic shift from email to [Google Chat](https://chat.google.com/) as our primary internal communication tool to clear out people’s inboxes and make sure important information didn’t get buried. By giving us a place to connect, collaborate, and communicate in real time, this decision immediately helped streamline the way we work. Chat has also boosted employee engagement: everyone tunes into our Attache Fun Stuff space to share pet photos, weekend activities, gifs, emojis, and more.  With so many people working remotely, culture can sometimes suffer, but Chat has helped us foster a culture of fun and joy.

As part of our promise to support employee happiness, we outsource our data entry to limit our time spent on mundane tasks. But since we started using Gemini, we’ve been relying less and less on our third-party provider. Instead, we can offload data entry into the Google ecosystem we already know and love. And we know our data is secure. Once we drop the data entry service entirely, we will save even more. As the tool evolves, I’d love to hand off even more basic tasks, such as scheduling, time blocking, and generating task prioritizations.

It’s still early days, but so far, we get a lot of “wow” and “guess what Gemini did for me today”  feedback from our staff. Gemini supports our daily processes, improves productivity, and frees our people up to do more meaningful work. It’s truly been a joy to play around with it and see what it can do next.

I believe that AI has the power to act as a second brain and can increase job satisfaction for those who use it well, while helping us become collaborative to the nth degree.  By leaning into these tools, playing and experimenting with new capabilities, and not being afraid to fail, we can make customer service as joyous as playing with puppies in a colorful ball pit surrounded by ice cream. Or something like that.

Are your days filled with back-to-back meetings that end without clear next steps? You’re not alone. [Harvard Business Review](https://hbr.org/2024/03/how-to-improve-a-meeting-when-youre-not-in-charge) reports that 71% of senior managers feel meetings are “inefficient and unproductive.”

What if you could cut through meeting friction, freeing your team to focus on productive, effective collaboration?

Watch our free workshop, Better meetings, greater impact: How effective teams move work forward with Gemini. In this workshop, you will learn how AI can help you minimize the effort that goes into your meetings, while maximizing the impact from them.
