## 55. Expanding Google AI in Workspace with new zero trust and digital sovereignty controls

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/accelerating-zero-trust-and-digital-sovereignty-ai?hl=en

# Expanding Google AI in Workspace with new zero trust and digital sovereignty controls

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/accelerating-zero-trust-and-digital-sovereignty-ai?hl=en

Product Announcements

# Expanding Google AI in Workspace with new zero trust and digital sovereignty controls

August 24, 2023

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Nextsecurity.max-2500x2500.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Nextsecurity.max-2500x2500.png)

##### Yulie Kwon Kim

VP, Product - Workspace

##### Andy Wen

Senior Director, Product Management, Workspace

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

Security, confidentiality, and compliance continue to be top of mind for commercial and public sector organizations. And for good reason: last year cybersecurity attacks grew [38%](https://www.checkpoint.com/press-releases/check-point-software-releases-its-2023-security-report-highlighting-rise-in-cyberattacks-and-disruptive-malware/), with each data breach costing organizations an average of [$4.35M](https://www.ibm.com/reports/data-breach). The sheer scale of modern attacks and the sophistication of motivated adversaries are something that legacy productivity solutions can’t keep pace with. There is a better way — a cloud-native architecture rooted in zero-trust principles and augmented with AI-powered threat defenses. This is how we architected Google Workspace, resulting in real-world benefits for our customers:

- 0 known exploited vulnerabilities vs. 40+ in a legacy productivity suite ([The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog), 11/2021 - 8/2023)
- 41% fewer security incidents on average than other email solutions (At-Bay, [Ranking Email Security Solutions](https://www.at-bay.com/ranking-email-security-solutions/), 2/2023)
- Up to 50% savings on cyber security insurance premiums (At-Bay, [Ranking Email Security Solutions](https://www.at-bay.com/ranking-email-security-solutions/), 2/2023)

In security, the job is never done, which is why **we’re unveiling new zero trust, digital sovereignty, and threat defense controls powered by Google AI to help organizations keep their data safe.**

### Enable safer work from anywhere with AI-powered zero trust controls

The zero trust security model has become an essential part of reducing security risks for a distributed workforce. Workspace provides built-in controls, such as data loss prevention (DLP) and context-aware access (CAA), to help organizations accelerate their zero trust adoption and meet industry frameworks, such as [CISA’s Zero Trust Maturity Model](https://www.cisa.gov/zero-trust-maturity-model).

Roche is one of many customers that has been using zero trust capabilities in Workspace to enable safer work: “Our organization has been striving to break away from VPN and office network connections for years,” said **Tim Ehrhart**, **Domain Lead**, **Information Security**, **Roche**. “Context-Aware Access (CAA) has helped us manage our risks by not making access a binary choice, but allowing for more flexibility in access policies and allowing them to be applied to the right people, applications, and data. Since using CAA, we've been able to allow our users to use more of Google Workspace for a broader set of scenarios with more confidence in the safety of that work.”

Today, we are introducing new capabilities to provide IT and security teams with more granular controls over data use and access, including:

- **Leveraging Google AI to automatically and continuously classify and label data in Google Drive to help ensure data is appropriately shared and protected from exfiltration:** Administrators can now use confidentiality-preserving AI models, customized uniquely for their organization, to automatically classify and label new and existing files in Drive. Data protection controls, such as DLP or CAA, can then be applied based on the security policy. This is now available in preview.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/4_MB_AI_Classification_Labels_GIF_.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/4_MB_AI_Classification_Labels_GIF_.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/4_MB_AI_Classification_Labels_GIF_.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/4_MB_AI_Classification_Labels_GIF_.gif)

Automatic data classification and labeling in Drive powered by Google AI

- **Enforcing context-aware DLP controls in Drive:** Workspace admins can set criteria, such as device location or security status, that must be met in order for a user to be able to share sensitive content in Drive. This new capability provides more granular controls to help prevent unintended data loss and will be available later this year in preview.
- **Extending enhanced DLP controls to Gmail:** Already available in Google Chat, Drive, and Chrome to help security teams control sharing sensitive information inside and outside the organization, enhanced DLP controls are coming to Gmail and will be available in preview later this year.

### Go beyond data residency with digital sovereignty controls

Enterprise and public sector organizations recognize the importance of digital sovereignty, but often settle for data residency without fully understanding its limitations. Workspace can provide a step change in attestable digital sovereignty with secure-by-default infrastructure, technical data access controls, and industry certifications all in a single cloud instance.

PwC UK piloted [Sovereign Controls](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/announcing-sovereign-controls-for-google-workspace) in Workspace to help meet demanding regulatory requirements: "PwC UK participated in the CSE Gmail pilot and I observed first hand that Google understands the importance of technical data boundaries, not only for PwC and our requirements, but for that of our clients,” said **Shaun Bookham**, **UK Operations and Technology Director**, **PwC UK**. “Through influencing the development of these CSE and Access Management capabilities, I have confidence that Google will continue to adapt to rapidly evolving regulatory requirements, enabling us to transform the way we work whilst remaining at the forefront of sovereignty and compliance."

Today, we are introducing new capabilities to provide organizations with enhanced controls over their data that help with:

- **Preventing third-party access to sensitive data:** Through the ownership of the encryption keys, client-side encryption (CSE) helps organizations add an additional layer of data protection and prevent third-party access from external entities such as Google or foreign governments. Today, we're introducing a number of CSE enhancements, including the support of mobile apps in Google Calendar, Gmail, and Meet (generally available), the ability to set CSE as default for select organizational units (available in preview later this year), guest access support in Meet (available in preview later this year), comments support in Docs (available in preview later this year), and the ability for users to view, edit, or convert Microsoft Excel files (available in preview).
- **Selecting the location of your encryption keys:** Through strategic partnerships with a global security provider Thales, Stormshield, and Flowcrypt, we're enabling CSE customers to store their encryption keys with their trusted partner in the country of their choice to simplify set up and support local regulatory compliance.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GmailMobileCSE_R01_01-5MB.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GmailMobileCSE_R01_01-5MB.gif)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GmailMobileCSE_R01_01-5MB.gif](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/original_images/GmailMobileCSE_R01_01-5MB.gif)

Sending a new email with CSE protection enabled by default

- **Choosing where data is stored and processed:** Today, organizations can choose the storage location of their data at rest. Available in preview later this year, organizations will be able to choose where their covered data is processed (EU or US). Organizations also have the option to store a copy of their Workspace data in a country of their choice.
- **Enforcing regional support personnel access:** Today, customers worldwide can use Access Approvals to control Google support access for troubleshooting purposes, and can monitor Google actions with Access Transparency. Additionally, customers can use Access Management to limit approved access to US-based support. Available in preview later this year, customers will also be able to limit access to EU-based support.

### Prevent cyber threats before they emerge

Social engineering attacks, such as phishing, are one of the most common entry points for data breaches. Threat defense controls in Workspace help customers prevent, detect, and respond to social engineering and other identity-based attacks before they emerge. Today, we’re introducing additional capabilities to help security teams defend against account takeovers, including:

- **Making 2-Step verification (2SV) mandatory for select enterprise administrators:** Compromised administrator accounts can have an outsized impact, and 2SV can result in a [50% decrease](https://blog.google/technology/safety-security/reducing-account-hijacking/) in accounts being compromised. Starting later this year, in a phased approach, select administrator accounts of our resellers and largest enterprise customers will be required to add 2SV to their accounts to strengthen their security.
- **Requiring multi-party approval for sensitive administrator actions:** Workspace administrators can require additional approval by another administrator to complete a sensitive action, such as changing 2SV settings for a user, to provide an extra layer of defense against malicious actions. This will be available in preview later this year.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MultiPartyMPA_copy.max-2000x2000.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MultiPartyMPA_copy.max-2000x2000.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MultiPartyMPA_copy.max-2000x2000.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MultiPartyMPA_copy.max-2000x2000.jpg)

Reviewing a request from another administrator to complete a sensitive action

- **Protecting additional sensitive actions in Gmail:** We are extending Google’s AI-powered defenses to provide automated protection for additional sensitive actions in Gmail, such as email filtering or forwarding. This protection is available in preview.
- **Exporting logs to Chronicle in just a few clicks:** Workspace administrators can now export Workspace logs into [Chronicle](https://chronicle.security/) to identify anomalies and help improve their response time to threats. This integration is available in preview.

### Getting started

We are constantly at work to help our customers — from small businesses and large enterprises to schools and governments — strengthen their security and compliance posture and keep their data safe. To learn more, get a no-cost [trial](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome), check out our [technical documentation](https://support.google.com/a/topic/7556782), attend our upcoming sessions at [Next ‘23](https://cloud.withgoogle.com/next/session-library#productivity-and-collaboration-apps), and [sign up](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1tEk2cfC7msKYUEl76MPu5aVPUdsO46Rkru0zT9vOHXU/edit) for early access to try new capabilities. 

For information on securing AI systems, check out [Google SAIF](https://blog.google/technology/safety-security/introducing-googles-secure-ai-framework/), a conceptual framework to help practitioners collaboratively secure AI technology as it continues to grow.

Ltd. **If you do not agree with this, you cannot proceed further with this request.**

- Collected Items: (for contact to our sales specialist, gated content or event registration) name, job title, company email, business mobile phone, company information, country; (for newsletter subscription) name, job title, company email, country
- Purpose of collection and use: handling inquiry and conducting marketing communications.
- **Retention and use period: until the end of the inquiry process and marketing communications, or as necessary for legal obligations or limited business purposes (see above privacy policy for more details).**

Download

Download

I understand my personal data will be processed in accordance with Google's [Privacy Policy](https://myaccount.google.com/privacypolicy?hl=en).

***“Our employees are better because of Gemini. Among our users, 93% are doing work fast and 89% report [it leads to] higher quality work. They are also more creative because of Gemini and 87% use it for creativity and idea generation.”***

**Head of AI adoption, financial services**

In a 2026 commissioned study conducted by Forrester Consulting, a composite organization based on interviewed customers was able to achieve significant results, including:

- AI-powered assistance with Gemini with an economic benefit of $76.1 million
- Enhanced security that resulted in security team and IT team productivity, including 90% reduction in device configuration time and a 50% reduction in tickets and ongoing management
- Improved collaboration and workflow efficiency due to deep integration within the same cloud environment and ease of use, improving efficiency for collaborative activities by 30%

Download the full TEI study from Forrester now to gain insights from interviewees on their favorite use cases with NotebookLM, the value of broader employee upskilling through embedded AI assistance, and more.

*Total Economic Impact**TM* *is a methodology developed by Forrester Research that enhances a company’s technology decision-making processes and assists vendors in communicating the value proposition of their products and services to clients. The TEI methodology helps companies demonstrate, justify, and realize the tangible value of IT initiatives to both senior management and other key business stakeholders.*

## 57. From brainstorming to building teams: FinQuery innovates with Gemini for Google Workspace

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/finquery-innovates-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

# From brainstorming to building teams: FinQuery innovates with Gemini for Google Workspace

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/finquery-innovates-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

Customer Stories

# From brainstorming to building teams: FinQuery innovates with Gemini for Google Workspace

June 21, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/FinQuery_hero.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/FinQuery_hero.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Amanda Taylor

Vice President of Infrastructure, FinQuery

##### Andrew Larson

CTO, FinQuery

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

When your company’s mission is focused on simplifying people’s lives with technology, you have to be sure your employees are reaping the same benefits you promise your customers. At [FinQuery](https://finquery.com/), we've created a platform that gives organizations total visibility into financial accounting, contracts, and software subscriptions to see where they’re spending their money. As an organization, cost management and efficiency are in our DNA, and we want to help our people do their best work. Our company is also remote-first, so effective digital collaboration is critical for our success and an invaluable tool for attracting top tech talent.

We initially adopted [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/) because it's a best-in-class, all-in-one solution for email management, content development, collaboration, and video conferencing. Having an all-inclusive and easy-to-use collaboration solution makes us more attractive to quality talent looking to us as a potential employer. Plus, most of our employees are already proficient with it on day one.

At the end of 2023, we enabled [Gemini for Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/) and started to casually experiment with its features. Gemini did everything from providing the framework for playful internal emails that read like Shakespearean poems to [generating fun backdrops for Google Meet](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10058482?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid). It also helped us create internal team logos, based on inside jokes, to help liven up weekly sprint demos for our engineering teams. All this lightweight experimentation was great, but we were ready to apply Gemini’s power to our day-to-day work.

### Looking for “the sparkle” in everyday workflows

As an early adopter of Gemini, we understood that AI was quickly becoming a cornerstone  for successful companies, so we were excited to fully implement the tool in our processes for next-level productivity. Today, everyone at FinQuery knows to look for the Gemini sparkle when we’re drafting a document or composing an email.

We frequently have group brainstorming sessions, and it’s 20 times harder to start with a blank page than to start with something on it. Gemini helps us generate ideas to kick off the process, and then it builds on our ideas by highlighting additional information relevant to the topic. When we’re not in meetings, many of us spend a lot of our day in our Gmail inboxes, where Gemini is giving us time back by helping to draft responses faster. As the VP of Infrastructure, Amanda Taylor estimates that she’s **getting back 20% of the time spent writing emails**.

Amanda also uses Gemini as a coach or personal assistant. She can tell it about a business problem she’s facing, and it helps to brainstorm solutions. These can be as simple as helping to reframe the tone or refine the language in an email, or as complex as helping the business enablement team develop massive cross-organizational project plans. These project plans typically take months of work and hours of individual effort to consolidate, but with Gemini, the team now manages to complete a draft in just a matter of minutes, using previous plans as inputs. After 15 minutes of refining the content and formatting, an idea could be ready to share across the company.

### Solving complex problems for technical teams with Gemini

While all of our daily tasks in Workspace have become more efficient with Gemini, we’ve also found applications for generative AI to be of assistance in the more complex areas of our business. Our engineering teams are able to utilize Gemini to debug and troubleshoot their code. Teams can ask onboarding questions as they’re learning new systems, integrations, or tools; it’s like having an engineering mentor built into their computer.

Recently, we were tasked with evaluating new monitoring and observability tools that help us keep closer tabs on the health and security of our engineering infrastructure. A task like this should have taken us days of research and careful comparison, but we faced urgency. The team called in Gemini, and with a quick prompt, it sifted through the most popular tools on the market along with pros, cons, and key features to consider. With this blueprint, we were able to craft a clear, succinct one-pager that was practically ready to share with our CTO. Once we selected our tool, we were able to launch directly into system designs with Gemini’s assistance.

Gemini is now front and center for all of our work, and it helps everyone at FinQuery to be more productive, collaborative, and responsive. It’s only going to increase our efficiency  as we use it, so we’re excited to continue as a  leader of the generative AI charge in fintech.

Posted in

- [Customer Stories](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories)

## 58. Fullstory writes collaboration into its culture with Google Workspace and Gemini

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/fullstory-collaboration-culture-with-google-workspace-and-gemini?hl=en

# Fullstory writes collaboration into its culture with Google Workspace and Gemini

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/fullstory-collaboration-culture-with-google-workspace-and-gemini?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Fullstory writes collaboration into its culture with Google Workspace and Gemini

May 8, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Fullstory_Banner_resize.max-2500x2500.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Fullstory_Banner_resize.max-2500x2500.png)

##### Forest Donovan

Senior Director of Strategic Alliances, Fullstory

### The mission and the challenge

*Are you getting the full story from your customer data?*

Digital marketing is all about seeing the bigger picture, and that picture starts with data. At [Fullstory](https://www.fullstory.com/), we help brands harness insights from their customer interactions to understand their behaviors and build more personalized experiences. In other words, we help them see the full story in their data and use it to its full potential.

We also recognize the trust that our customers put in us to keep their user data safe. From the customer solutions we build to our internal team collaboration tools, security is essential to our work. That’s one of many reasons we’ve relied on [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/) since day one. With its integrated communication and collaboration tools, Workspace gives us a secure, central place to do our work and the tools to better serve our customers.

As generative AI has expanded across industries, we also faced increasing pressure from leadership to explore how AI could augment our work. But rather than letting employees experiment on their own with unapproved tools that could jeopardize our data security, we wanted to implement the new technology in a safe and productive way. As part of Workspace, [Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/) gave us the trust and control we needed to feel comfortable deploying generative AI to all of our users.

![Video Thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/GvPl_8jWqcE/hqdefault.jpg)

Learn how Fullstory uses Google Workspace and Gemini to accelerate creativity and innovation without compromising on data security.

### Using Google Workspace and Gemini

We use the full suite of tools in Workspace and continue to embrace new solutions as they’re available. The majority of our collaborative design and writing happens within [Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/), giving us a single source of truth for files and removing the need for many versions. We share new ideas and present customers’ stories using [Google Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/slides/), which allows us to visually present information in engaging ways. We then analyze and organize data within [Google Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/sheets/) so everyone has visibility into important insights. As a distributed workforce, we also rely heavily on [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/products/meet/) to empower our teams and customers to get things done, no matter where they are.

We also go to great lengths to ensure that our data remains in the Workspace platform at all times. We can define granular policies around how information and files are shared and viewed to guarantee that every piece of data in [Google Drive](https://workspace.google.com/products/drive/) is protected and version-controlled at all times. We can also adjust those policies as our business needs evolve. Only Google can bring this level of deep integration between products, and we’d have a hard time trusting any other vendor with our data.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_KZCwcMh.max-1400x1400.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_KZCwcMh.max-1400x1400.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_KZCwcMh.max-1400x1400.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_KZCwcMh.max-1400x1400.png)

Fullstory uses Gemini together with Google Vids to quickly create compelling video content to share with clients and prospects.

Our security-minded culture played a big role in our adoption of Gemini. As we explored our options for generative AI tools, we had three core criteria. First, we needed to be absolutely sure that our data was protected and contained within our environment. Second, the solution needed to be easy to use and provide tangible improvements to productivity. Lastly, the chosen AI tool needed to gain alignment across our legal, compliance, security, and IT teams. As an integrated part of Workspace, Gemini effectively met all of these requirements.

We now use Gemini across Workspace applications to enhance our productivity and improve our employee experience. All of our data is already there in Workspace, making it safe and easy for Gemini to ingest. For example, Gemini can take meeting notes and summarize them into a structured format that we can turn into a 30-second video script. We can then plug that script into [Google Vids](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/vids/) to create a high-gloss video with full voiceover and imagery that we can share with customers, send to prospects for cold outreach, or use for event promotion and follow-up. Considering that I have zero background in creating or producing a video, it’s amazing that I can pull this off.

Gemini also plugs directly into Fullstory’s behavioral data platform itself, which integrates with an ecosystem of partners via APIs. We already capture all of the data associated with a web or mobile session for our customers and create structure for that data, but with Gemini, we can now use session data to help power more informed and contextually aware AI agents to deliver better customer experiences.

### Looking ahead

Beyond analyzing how our customers’ end users engage with their websites and mobile apps, Fullstory can also provide insights into our own internal use of tools like Workspace. With Gemini, we can see how our employees are using specific Workspace solutions to better understand where we can drive efficiencies and encourage adoption.

We know that Workspace has a significant impact on our ability to communicate and collaborate at Fullstory, internally and externally. We believe Gemini has the power to take that even further in the short and long term. Right now, there’s a lot of buzz around generative AI and people still feel like there’s a bit of magic to it. In the long term, that will help us foster a culture of experimentation and curiosity where people are willing to learn how new tools can support their daily jobs.

Posted in

- [Customer Stories](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories)
- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

##### Gemini is a versatile and secure solution that can transform work in your organization

The Gemini app empowers teams across departments and functions in your organization to work smarter, faster, and ultimately better. From streamlining marketing research and sales strategies to enhancing HR processes and software development, Gemini is your all-in-one, enterprise-grade secured, AI solution for boosting quality, productivity, creativity, and innovation.

[![image](https://www.gstatic.com/bricks/image/30aa8dfa-fc81-467b-8a6d-c7408ac81a1e.png)

Gemini for Workspace Prompt Guide

Learn about writing effective prompts to supercharge your productivity with AI.

Please see this [link](https://www.ppc.go.jp/files/pdf/california_report.pdf) on the Personal Information Protection Commission’s (“PPC”) website for information on the personal data protection regulations in California, USA, where Google LLC is located, and this [link](https://www.ppc.go.jp/files/pdf/USA_report.pdf) on PPC’s website regarding U.S. federal law. I understand my personal data will be processed in accordance with Google's [Privacy Policy](https://myaccount.google.com/privacypolicy?hl=en).

I agree that Google Cloud will collect, use and retain my personal data as below in accordance with Google's [Privacy Policy](https://myaccount.google.com/privacypolicy?hl=en).

**If you do not agree with this, you cannot proceed further with this request.**

- Collected Items: (for contact to our sales specialist, gated content or event registration) name, job title, company email, business mobile phone, company information, country; (for newsletter subscription) name, job title, company email, country
- Purpose of collection and use: handling inquiry and conducting marketing communications.
- **Retention and use period: until the end of the inquiry process and marketing communications, or as necessary for legal obligations or limited business purposes (see above privacy policy for more details).**

Download

Download

I understand my personal data will be processed in accordance with Google's [Privacy Policy](https://myaccount.google.com/privacypolicy?hl=en).

As Gen AI introduces new ways to communicate and collaborate, security practitioners are tasked with keeping up with this rapid pace and innovation while not exposing their organizations to unnecessary risks.

Gemini for Google Workspace has a robust set of privacy, security, data governance, and compliance controls built in, allowing you to get the most out of Gen AI while remaining private, secure, and compliant. Gemini also has one of the most comprehensive sets of industry certifications, including **SOC 1/2/3, ISO 42001, FedRAMP High, HIPAA**, and more.

Workspace offers organizations support for migration including possible subsidies for migration costs, dedicated assistance, specialized tools, and a network of expert partners.

Enter your information and click "Download" to access a detailed whitepaper outlining how Google’s AI Principles have been incorporated into a set of privacy, security, data governance, and compliance controls built into Gemini for Google Workspace.

![gemini-workspace-security-whitepaper](https://www.gstatic.com/bricks/image/79dcc21f-d928-41b3-af65-8df061b1792b.png)

Generative AI is poised to fundamentally change the way we work, just like the internet, mobile devices, and cloud computing have in the past.

##### Gemini for Workspace provides everything you need to unlock this powerful new way of working.

Gemini for Workspace handbook outlines how Google is a pioneer in the AI space, how Gemini for Workspace works, and what it can do to help make people and teams more productive.

![hero](https://inthecloud.withgoogle.com/gemini-for-marketing-handbook/static/img/4_Help%20me%20visualize_image.png)

Unlock marketing efficiency and productivity with Gemini for Google Workspace

##### Elevate your marketing team’s people and work with Gemini for Google Workspace

Use the power of generative AI in familiar Workspace applications such as Gmail, Docs, and Slides to supercharge your marketing efforts and productivity:

- **Boost productivity:** Automate mundane tasks, generate content instantly, and streamline workflows—freeing you to allocate more time to strategic work.
- **Spark creativity:** Brainstorm innovative ideas, craft compelling messages, and design unique visuals—all supported by Gemini.
- **Privacy first:** Rest assured your data is safe and secure, never used for ads or shared outside your organization.

Download the handbook to learn more about how Gemini for Workspace can help your organization transform the way it does marketing.

##### Improve your sales team’s work with Gemini for Google Workspace

Save time, increase sales, and elevate your team’s work with Gemini for Google Workspace. Use the power of generative AI in familiar Workspace applications like Gmail, Docs, and Slides to supercharge your sales efforts and productivity:

- **Boost productivity:** Automate tedious tasks, generate sales proposals instantly, and streamline workflows—freeing you to allocate more time to close more sales.
- **Spark creativity:** Brainstorm innovative ideas, craft compelling messages, and design unique visuals for sales pitches.
- **Privacy first:** Rest assured your data is safe and secure, never used for ads or shared outside your organization.

Download the handbook to learn more about how Gemini for Workspace can help your organization transform the way it sells.

![Hero](https://lp.cloudplatformonline.com/rs/808-GJW-314/images/dei-vc-startup-stair-step%402x.jpg?version=0)

##### Improve your customer service team’s work with Gemini for Google Workspace

Save time, increase service quality, and elevate your team’s work with Gemini for Google Workspace. Use the power of generative AI in familiar Workspace applications like Gmail, Docs, and Slides to supercharge your customer service efforts and productivity:

- **Boost productivity:** Automate tedious tasks, generate responses to customer inquiries instantly, and streamline workflows.
- **Spark creativity:** Brainstorm FAQs and case resolutions, craft compelling messages, and much more.
- **Privacy first:** Rest assured your data is safe and secure, never used for ads or shared outside your organization.

Download the handbook to learn more about how Gemini for Workspace can help your organization transform its customer services.

## 65. Gemini in Google Meet

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-meetings?hl=en

# Gemini in Google Meet

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-meetings?hl=en

![Google Meet product logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/rR-i1eFrEEwgI931sCOkIrBvlb8vJ7zE9LQyFvozozcTJHxB_gx0GV1dLH526LK2sXYtxb5MTZGB78rx1KXzpNBv35fXmKnGXwIY=e365-pa-nu-rw-w2497)

# Gemini in Google Meet

Leverage the power of AI to make the most of meetings. Use AI in Meet to take notes, reduce audio distortion, improve video quality, provide translated captions and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_for_meetings-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_for_meetings-hero-en-GB)

![GeminiÂ inÂ Google Meet taking meeting notes and translating Arabic to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/R7JSlQ5g2uE1Wii4wszjc6uIJHN3ZS3nb0tVJY4ZwgfmcEH914rj4igvYDXbvvb3_BM5a6OeKX8YQKpcWWBFJuzoNgJfkJdfIqOB-w=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Smarter meetings with AI

Gemini in Meet makes [video conferencing](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/video-conferencing/) more engaging and productive. AI-powered features like automatic note taking and translated captions let you focus on the meeting and improve efficiency.

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarising video meeting notes and delivering them to a Gmail inbox. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4eDK08G4zSR-_R0S9fZxItvWn0uGITpbDg0s_qdGNjr1HcSytlxgtkgiT-7RMPnwRmKOySBzBJrfinTZJcnO1D9NK_b0KEgbNZw5hw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet translating a meeting from Korean to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/XxntRXTj3uwDgCyxGlNWaPC-EXpiG-bdGRomcOFVA_T8AnJ4EavwK-CnNEojD-Q8f_ZnHcCZgurabA4kosVaYG57pLXojt30adM=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![A group of people in a hybrid meeting with adaptive audio merging the laptop audio to prevent audio feedback. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/hz9ADaGg86kMpi_3vXO8eN30HeFmpVLQEIIi7psupLXxZf4Phzm8PPFDKJ4XTlj9gbd0BGWcgq7MV8UMCrHoEHIWrher5LAzt7fA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Watermarking in Google Meet. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bz6pZqLKWf9cwhsNUtGGEpcijpTLWOfA06B-yPGSc-JKre9nq4NoPu7s-BFGHHlvQiUMDb85KjPAfuBY_qQKDDxaRj8KjDR809p0=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Summarise video meetings

Using AI in video conferencing, ask Gemini in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/meet) to '[take notes for me](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14754931?hl=en-GB)', allowing you to give your full attention to the discussion. GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarises your video call and automatically sends you meeting notes in [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/).

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarising video meeting notes and delivering them to a Gmail inbox. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/9v5eZkZ_wkUqWDz6HCbtwULzIJjN8_HXSHAtSini1XmxNysbujayZ8tEfS2EV6_bMaVMaeCI3_yb_0T2CXU75py6Duk3v7JrCtTMNA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Break down language barriers

Gemini in Meet makes video conferencing more accessible for everyone, using AI for translated captions. Gemini in Meet helps remove language barriers, translating speech in real time with [translated captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-GB) for 60+ languages. In addition, people who are hearing-impaired or who prefer to follow the conversation in a visual format can [turn on live captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-GB).

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet translating a meeting from Korean to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AHB8iuJR0iFZLEl85pt9UOeUDBR9mxuxxAHaSR5cKrvxoHSBe8WTOK8xm7kD6NN5QfeQbDSx3aafs8EuZmslpuCt3uQUTo0mM7-s8w=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Create ad hoc meeting spaces

[Adaptive audio in Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/echo-cancellation/#adaptive-audio) automatically detects multiple laptops in a room, synchronises microphones and speakers, and [prevents awkward echoes and audio feedback](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/2024/05/google-meet-adaptive-audio.html#:~:text=With%20%E2%80%9Cadaptive%20audio%2C%E2%80%9D%20you,for%20dedicated%20conference%20room%20equipment.). This flexibility allows teams to create ad hoc meeting spaces anywhere with just their laptops.

![A group of people in a hybrid meeting with adaptive audio merging the laptop audio to prevent audio feedback. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/coFuFhNIw5l8_TZJGl5gzR29QU82-Y7Sbh2u8l1D-vhn8CLnd7UpC1G-xhj9VUiN5XmbBGdqLt4Znd8gUreeFASVZARJlWm2e5E=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Protect your shared content in meetings

Watermarking in Meet helps protect your presented content and video feeds from unauthorised copying and distribution. A subtle overlay of the viewer's email and meeting ID will identify the source and discourage sharing of confidential meeting content.

![Watermarking in Google Meet. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Yb8mpPIUKjqwBOZ2r0bpAUA3Ax2_DqB_k-HbLIBUi3eCN0J0KuAjpVUQ3ePl8vssyjTzfSqpQ8uFNctIPdpJomdRIQbVXyTwKnbETw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Clear communication in every meeting

### Put your best face forward

Experience [improved visuals](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14441737?hl=en-GB) with studio look and polished lighting with studio lighting â all powered by AI. Plus, [create AI-generated backgrounds](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/13954947?hl=en-GB) to customise your virtual space.

![AI-generated background with studio look and studio light in Google Meet improving the visual. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ij55BwnMLfkEwvY4bSgoJlpdKG0nO5Ho8Vm832j1d3PsFoKvCCWaloGJWkfaB6Lk0QSexrJBwKXb1MJ2GAIQoghq6t4LyUHcMh5X=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Be heard clearly

Enjoy crystal-clear conversations even with Bluetooth headsets or phone dial-ins. Studio sound uses AI to enhance audio quality, making sure that everyone is heard clearly, however they join the meeting.

![Studio sound in Google Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/3E9U55b9KcE78RI-q0k6aV98H8v_--cienxzGPUEb6tfIkKETcdHrTpoPz6HUSUcH5uqsoEGmY8zw7PZ9_K9avAsmUbyYnFm7bE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

![AI-generated background with studio look and studio light in Google Meet improving the visual. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ejVhxezMqH_zPnpbH7gvrQQZ_AAn1iqIzdVK5BkpOyHTNqBMO8tkS0J_BsoYFDWgf-4V9bp8YC9hsiycPVmzf51Ckw-qPbi1NVWi=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Studio sound in Google Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/yzFozn7qm0X6EG2vcjNI3-6gPSPSfOadsw0eiBWI8Zj02YlAiDh5UdHeTSjgTj6fsKwNMNDUaIaMRpHlhbX8mRwxnsSntKOW0y6Nag=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

GeminiÂ inÂ Meet is included in selected [Workspace plans](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-ai_for_meetings-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en).

![Meet icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3VebjOM7tIsrB7khjG5Y3Y-fb2f6682913ce49f340a377b60f2eb72-meet_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

## Clear communication in every meeting

### Put your best face forward

Experience [improved visuals](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14441737) with studio look, and polished lighting with studio lighting - all powered by AI. Plus, [create AI generated backgrounds](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/13954947) to customize your virtual space.

![AI generated background and studio look and studio light in Google Meet improving the visual. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ij55BwnMLfkEwvY4bSgoJlpdKG0nO5Ho8Vm832j1d3PsFoKvCCWaloGJWkfaB6Lk0QSexrJBwKXb1MJ2GAIQoghq6t4LyUHcMh5X=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Be heard clearly

Enjoy crystal-clear conversations even with Bluetooth headsets or phone dial-ins. Studio sound uses AI to enhance audio quality, making sure everyone is heard clearly, no matter how they join the meeting.

![Studio sound in Google Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/3E9U55b9KcE78RI-q0k6aV98H8v_--cienxzGPUEb6tfIkKETcdHrTpoPz6HUSUcH5uqsoEGmY8zw7PZ9_K9avAsmUbyYnFm7bE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

![AI generated background and studio look and studio light in Google Meet improving the visual. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ejVhxezMqH_zPnpbH7gvrQQZ_AAn1iqIzdVK5BkpOyHTNqBMO8tkS0J_BsoYFDWgf-4V9bp8YC9hsiycPVmzf51Ckw-qPbi1NVWi=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Studio sound in Google Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/yzFozn7qm0X6EG2vcjNI3-6gPSPSfOadsw0eiBWI8Zj02YlAiDh5UdHeTSjgTj6fsKwNMNDUaIaMRpHlhbX8mRwxnsSntKOW0y6Nag=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

## 68. Gemini in Google Sheets

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/spreadsheet-ai?hl=en

# Gemini in Google Sheets

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/spreadsheet-ai?hl=en

![Google Sheets product logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2AYp_NaSI1M03E7e56V0JYKeE-_usMYCys-s5rdWzyMtapPLD8Ix7LsUeImaTF-h8NUVWkmW9jvGoeRKEqNdCqsDtTC_HBoZ1ZYDlw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w2742)

# Gemini in Google Sheets

Do more with your spreadsheets in less time with help from AI. Gemini makes it easy to create tables, analyze your data, and more.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-CA)

![Gemini in sheets](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/hWd8X9ijmNPP4n8d1GhGsJJYNxz1w3UcjbDtKFm13D9iTloHdzcXFGxNfWEA3aCRn3oH6xoZRy0rAKd3w6nva4kMHJ-FfkGTm6v9Vg=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Build spreadsheets quickly with AI

Gemini helps you instantly structure your data, build powerful data visualizations, and more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-CA) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets to better work with your data.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user whoâs asked for a table of this yearâs budget with color coding and dropdown menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/VW8rHX1w0QpnJR5XkNzdjMrpuur7EcftbmgITcAoIsmMwwORaNSoLONkjUlO0oi3MmTJSt4RrDDAYacFzh0QT8MP5U9Hfuoj4xkh=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/jNR9v3LtazIdC9ZvOyBUf0QZRytTPnMSc8SGpT8Lyw2BFjIBoIE-GgTNC7PuKk72wzbpSypF0uFHLGNlO5-QOfchXoqIvhokrj0uKg=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with dropdown menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4O8aeX2OgSX1lCYXoFhEjtJ0Ux975JNfQ5nf0R7w35E7E0YjVMJMq6qNfAOHSYNZinhb4TPDNVfrlprLN1vOv4F-QotTgJt1NrFR=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Gemini offers to fill 8 additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4uUstR7j7cHoOFc3HRuTZjCvVEYs7tZI9ApReToUSeY9SKkYiuA48fDqDVjCo-v4fQAdRN7ewTI33fS43VYyM6YdpKfQwJuy-xT-=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Create tables in a snap

Quickly [create tables](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-CA) with Gemini to organize data, plan schedules, or track a project. Use a prompt to generate exactly what you need, fast.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user whoâs asked for a table of this yearâs budget with color coding and dropdown menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/6DDW8X1rjAsuhptie3fOhMl_EZHT3RyI3zMnEpMyDu6ym6fkzlIEidHvnIslnu9VLJjKH7uXdQofiJsgaBQkqeyZNFiw6THwgx4=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Generate precise formulas

Ask Gemini to [create formulas](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-CA) that simplify complex calculations. Gemini can even proactively suggest additional formulas to help you manage your data more efficiently, saving you time and reducing errors.

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/f-C1pchxW1Dztmh0OsUqFqui2LOqk--ikp1KK76BHdEJzEMTYhIEmOvdfAUp3j4ypoXgACrHEzIfR8RbYJwcMvGhnOCHhFYV_Cs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Quickly handle complex edits and formatting

Donât waste time manually formatting your data - just ask Gemini to build pivot tables, find and replace text, apply conditional formatting, and much more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-CA) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets.

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with dropdown menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/nCVIFRk2nbUwgvj7gkOFfbLq65o58YV6WkJL3jrs7f6HTkNhCTBz17L1rny2OJKnuoI8IZNfr4fjk2zlXDKdemXq3xfb0dnIThbyGQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Reduce data entry errors

Gemini can recognize patterns as you enter data and automatically fill in the remaining entries, reducing errors, and ensuring data integrity.

![Gemini offers to fill 8 additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/FMiIffYjLGjT93qaoki8hz8PgOGEWkQrdeXTOSLKwmA7V317IENrOojog_0zSKRSjbObglegyush8h-uiEZjul-eQH-7tB2EK9I2iA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Unlock AI actions at scale

With the AI function, Gemini saves you time by running multiple actions in your spreadsheet at once. From any cell, Gemini will generate, summarize, or categorize text at scale based on your specific instructions.

![Gemini gets ready to action a generative prompt made in a cell on a spreadsheet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/BPETc1qwJWNm1yzd9B0IZ11htFLadPOAc1vAebZGLMH9vCwU6Bl09JcnU-BFIRE4-YOaI5mlnj3iunJfqcP8Yr0dwovzBNYesMI24g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Confidently analyze data with Gemini

Turn raw data into actionable insights. Gemini helps you structure, visualize, and analyze your data efficiently, helping you make more informed decisions.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyze data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Understand your data

Gemini quickly helps you identify trends, outliers, and key findings, providing big-picture insights from your data with natural language prompts.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to create a pie chart using the data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/oXTjXRWXg-GQS5qfFXXVaoTQOXV3AxO-WFc6RxqpwqhbTvJrlKcKwnmwV8nc3VL1JD4MljH91STaXvoLNWRlDbIJIaFOoVfQvImn=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Build charts and graphs

Gemini can help you turn raw data into charts and graphs quickly, reducing the need to manually build scatter plots, bar graphs, pie charts, and more.

![A user asks Gemini in Google Sheets to find an answer in the data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NUsUZjiYkz6kYRmVJCST60ykJmKOySzRFh5TJ1nsIWDkNPL5twW3K3FN7xpITtNJcmY_VSuBHgdcLzILkiz2xAZRyTymZSEe9qNWyQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyze data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Understand your data

Gemini quickly helps you identify trends, outliers, and key findings, providing big-picture insights from your data with natural language prompts.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to create a pie chart using the data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/oXTjXRWXg-GQS5qfFXXVaoTQOXV3AxO-WFc6RxqpwqhbTvJrlKcKwnmwV8nc3VL1JD4MljH91STaXvoLNWRlDbIJIaFOoVfQvImn=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Build charts and graphs

Gemini can help you turn raw data into charts and graphs quickly, reducing the need to manually build scatter plots, bar graphs, pie charts, and more.

![A user asks Gemini in Google Sheets to find an answer in the data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NUsUZjiYkz6kYRmVJCST60ykJmKOySzRFh5TJ1nsIWDkNPL5twW3K3FN7xpITtNJcmY_VSuBHgdcLzILkiz2xAZRyTymZSEe9qNWyQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

## Learn why organizations use Gemini in Sheets

![Etsy Logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-GyUVq3cpduWNOi8RhljPL-738cd5b520a936c533a97b1356796289-Logo_Etsy.svg)

> One of our customer support teams has embraced Gemini to help with data analysis. [...] Now that everyone has access to Gemini, the entire team is empowered to expand their skillset and glean insights from their own analyses instead of exclusively funneling the requests through a single analysis partner.

**Justinian Fornonberry**, Chief Information Security Officer, Etsy

[Learn more](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v%3DwfDJgOs8fBQ%26t%3D682s&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1752000263521714&usg=AOvVaw3umlepucXVyB9sdaU_at5i )

![Adore Me Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-7wGsTTpZlxk5YUQV6jGK3r-d0327b914315ec68316a70cc37906f7d-Logo_AdoreMe__1_.svg)

> One of my favorite parts of Gemini in Sheets is that it helps me create formulas. I used to have to go to as many as five different sources to figure out how to write the correct formula. Now with Gemini in Sheets I can just type what I need and Gemini will provide the formula perfectly written out and reference relevant cells - this functionality has completely changed the way I work with Sheets. I'm saving time and can better understand how formulas work to make calculations.

**Ranjan Roy**, SVP of Strategy, Adore Me

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai?hl=en-CA)

![Attache Logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3WpQyiQ5cvoc1Od8MTnpnF-8f8d1bc1b12c3bd7576aa84182d478e3-Logo_Attache.svg)

> It used to be challenging to keep track of where we were in the process but Gemini in Google Sheets has become our secret weapon, allowing us to design step-driven processes with unparalleled flexibility. Now, we have a unified place to build and organize plans, trackers, and timelines, and keep them up to date in real time.

**Tim Tochette**, Owner & President, Attache

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en-CA)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI including Gemini in Sheets is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603?hl=en-CA) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organizational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organizationâs existing controls, permissions, and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and is not used to train generative AI models outside your organization without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text, and other information in cells. Use Gemini in sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values, and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

![Sheets icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-mcAqMbDR4NVFZtXfQ7CgO-b6ddff6fe15975951c341392eeff5bfe-sheets_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4O8aeX2OgSX1lCYXoFhEjtJ0Ux975JNfQ5nf0R7w35E7E0YjVMJMq6qNfAOHSYNZinhb4TPDNVfrlprLN1vOv4F-QotTgJt1NrFR=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Gemini offers to fill 8 additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4uUstR7j7cHoOFc3HRuTZjCvVEYs7tZI9ApReToUSeY9SKkYiuA48fDqDVjCo-v4fQAdRN7ewTI33fS43VYyM6YdpKfQwJuy-xT-=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Create tables in a snap

Quickly [create tables](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565) with Gemini to organize data, plan schedules, or track a project. Use a prompt to generate exactly what you need, fast.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user whoâs asked for a table of this yearâs budget with color coding and dropdown menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/6DDW8X1rjAsuhptie3fOhMl_EZHT3RyI3zMnEpMyDu6ym6fkzlIEidHvnIslnu9VLJjKH7uXdQofiJsgaBQkqeyZNFiw6THwgx4=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Generate precise formulas

Ask Gemini to [create formulas](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565) that simplify complex calculations. Gemini can even proactively suggest additional formulas to help you manage your data more efficiently, saving you time and reducing errors.

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/f-C1pchxW1Dztmh0OsUqFqui2LOqk--ikp1KK76BHdEJzEMTYhIEmOvdfAUp3j4ypoXgACrHEzIfR8RbYJwcMvGhnOCHhFYV_Cs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Quickly handle complex edits and formatting

Donât waste time manually formatting your data - just ask Gemini to build pivot tables, find and replace text, apply conditional formatting, and much more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets.

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with dropdown menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/nCVIFRk2nbUwgvj7gkOFfbLq65o58YV6WkJL3jrs7f6HTkNhCTBz17L1rny2OJKnuoI8IZNfr4fjk2zlXDKdemXq3xfb0dnIThbyGQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Reduce data entry errors

Gemini can recognize patterns as you enter data and automatically fill in the remaining entries, reducing errors, and ensuring data integrity.

![Gemini offers to fill 8 additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/FMiIffYjLGjT93qaoki8hz8PgOGEWkQrdeXTOSLKwmA7V317IENrOojog_0zSKRSjbObglegyush8h-uiEZjul-eQH-7tB2EK9I2iA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Unlock AI actions at scale

With the AI function, Gemini saves you time by running multiple actions in your spreadsheet at once. From any cell, Gemini will generate, summarize, or categorize text at scale based on your specific instructions.

![Gemini gets ready to action a generative prompt made in a cell on a spreadsheet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/BPETc1qwJWNm1yzd9B0IZ11htFLadPOAc1vAebZGLMH9vCwU6Bl09JcnU-BFIRE4-YOaI5mlnj3iunJfqcP8Yr0dwovzBNYesMI24g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Confidently analyze data with Gemini

Turn raw data into actionable insights. Gemini helps you structure, visualize, and analyze your data efficiently, helping you make more informed decisions.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyze data theyâre working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

## Learn why organizations use Gemini in Sheets

![Etsy Logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-GyUVq3cpduWNOi8RhljPL-738cd5b520a936c533a97b1356796289-Logo_Etsy.svg)

> One of our customer support teams has embraced Gemini to help with data analysis. [...] Now that everyone has access to Gemini, the entire team is empowered to expand their skillset and glean insights from their own analyses instead of exclusively funneling the requests through a single analysis partner.

**Justinian Fornonberry**, Chief Information Security Officer, Etsy

[Learn more](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v%3DwfDJgOs8fBQ%26t%3D682s&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1752000263521714&usg=AOvVaw3umlepucXVyB9sdaU_at5i )

![Adore Me Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-7wGsTTpZlxk5YUQV6jGK3r-d0327b914315ec68316a70cc37906f7d-Logo_AdoreMe__1_.svg)

> One of my favorite parts of Gemini in Sheets is that it helps me create formulas. I used to have to go to as many as five different sources to figure out how to write the correct formula. Now with Gemini in Sheets I can just type what I need and Gemini will provide the formula perfectly written out and reference relevant cells - this functionality has completely changed the way I work with Sheets. I'm saving time and can better understand how formulas work to make calculations.

**Ranjan Roy**, SVP of Strategy, Adore Me

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai )

![Attache Logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3WpQyiQ5cvoc1Od8MTnpnF-8f8d1bc1b12c3bd7576aa84182d478e3-Logo_Attache.svg)

> It used to be challenging to keep track of where we were in the process but Gemini in Google Sheets has become our secret weapon, allowing us to design step-driven processes with unparalleled flexibility. Now, we have a unified place to build and organize plans, trackers, and timelines, and keep them up to date in real time.

**Tim Tochette**, Owner & President, Attache

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace )

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI including Gemini in Sheets is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organizational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organizationâs existing controls, permissions, and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and is not used to train generative AI models outside your organization without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text, and other information in cells. Use Gemini in sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values, and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

![Sheets icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-mcAqMbDR4NVFZtXfQ7CgO-b6ddff6fe15975951c341392eeff5bfe-sheets_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

# Gemini in Google Sheets

Do more with your spreadsheets in less time with help from AI. Gemini makes it easy to create tables, analyse your data and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-GB)

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyse data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Understand your data

Gemini quickly helps you identify trends, outliers and key findings, providing big-picture insights from your data with natural language prompts.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to create a pie chart using the data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/oXTjXRWXg-GQS5qfFXXVaoTQOXV3AxO-WFc6RxqpwqhbTvJrlKcKwnmwV8nc3VL1JD4MljH91STaXvoLNWRlDbIJIaFOoVfQvImn=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Build charts and graphs

Gemini can help you turn raw data into charts and graphs quickly, reducing the need to manually build scatter plots, bar graphs, pie charts and more.

![A user asks Gemini in Google Sheets to find an answer in the data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NUsUZjiYkz6kYRmVJCST60ykJmKOySzRFh5TJ1nsIWDkNPL5twW3K3FN7xpITtNJcmY_VSuBHgdcLzILkiz2xAZRyTymZSEe9qNWyQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

## Learn why organisations use Gemini in Sheets

![Etsy logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-GyUVq3cpduWNOi8RhljPL-738cd5b520a936c533a97b1356796289-Logo_Etsy.svg)

> One of our customer-support teams has embraced Gemini to help with data analysis. [â¦] Now that everyone has access to Gemini, the entire team is empowered to expand their skillset and glean insights from their own analyses instead of exclusively funnelling the requests through a single analysis partner.

**Justinian Fornonberry**, Chief Information Security Officer, Etsy

[Learn more](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v%3DwfDJgOs8fBQ%26t%3D682s&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1752000263521714&usg=AOvVaw3umlepucXVyB9sdaU_at5i )

![Adore Me logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-7wGsTTpZlxk5YUQV6jGK3r-d0327b914315ec68316a70cc37906f7d-Logo_AdoreMe__1_.svg)

> One of my favourite parts of Gemini in Sheets is that it helps me create formulas. I used to have to go to as many as five different sources to figure out how to write the correct formula. Now with Gemini in Sheets, I can just type what I need and Gemini will provide the formula written out perfectly and reference relevant cells. This functionality has completely changed the way I work with Sheets. I'm saving time and can better understand how formulas work to make calculations.

**Ranjan Roy**, SVP of Strategy, Adore Me

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai?hl=en-GB)

![Attache logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3WpQyiQ5cvoc1Od8MTnpnF-8f8d1bc1b12c3bd7576aa84182d478e3-Logo_Attache.svg)

> It used to be challenging to keep track of where we were in the process but Gemini in Google Sheets has become our secret weapon, allowing us to design step-driven processes with unparalleled flexibility. Now, we have a unified place to build and organise plans, trackers and timelines, and keep them up to date in real time.

**Tim Tochette**, Owner & President, Attache

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en-GB)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI, including Gemini in Sheets, is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603?hl=en-GB) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organisational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organisation's existing controls, permissions and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and it is not used to train generative AI models outside your organisation without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text and other information in cells. Use Gemini in Sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

![Sheets icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-mcAqMbDR4NVFZtXfQ7CgO-b6ddff6fe15975951c341392eeff5bfe-sheets_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

## 71. Generative AI for presentations

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/presentation-ai?hl=en

# Generative AI for presentations

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/presentation-ai?hl=en

# Generative AI for presentations

Transform ideas into presentations with help from AI. Use Gemini in Slides to create custom visuals, generate a slide, and more.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-presentation_ai-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-presentation_ai-hero-en-CA)

![Gemini creates an image from a prompt with âhelp me visualizeâ, shown with man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NCwXrJ7htjtQgtH93xugmSqGoFcTaiS4GQqFFn03BFH4HpItdxspd3h41BLhgYVH59_WC3pzvoAxVpwIaJ8lDzH3BxbOt7l4NXTj=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

#### What is an AI generated presentation?

An AI-generated presentation is a slide deck created with help from artificial intelligence, used to tell a story and information in a concise, highly visual format. Presentations are made to engage with your audience and spark conversation. Generative AI can be a helpful thought partner in building a compelling slide deck. With Gemini in Slides you can use generative AI to create original images and generate a slide using content from your Drive.

#### How to use Gemini in Slides

With Gemini in Slides, you can create images, generate new slides, summarize a presentation, and reference your Drive files to create a new slide.

You can access Gemini in Slides by clicking the Ask Gemini icon. Once the icon is clicked, you can either select a suggested prompt or compose your own unique prompt to help you quickly generate slides and fine-tune your presentation.

## AI prompts to help you create impactful presentations

[Learn more](/intl/en_ca/resources/ai/prompts-for-executives/#chief-information-officer)

![Gemini in Slides creating a slide based on April Product launch, shown with a man and a woman looking at a laptop. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/_ekLAOk4kXDLeDOXRq8CfwcwH5Zdz7ka-FFfTCPvkYO0UBXtrY185ZbO-BuJqnVfBNMzuh1ArdT4eeTY4upmu12OMxFGPyvk-08=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

#### How Gemini in Slides can help you craft presentations

**Generate slide ideas and outlines**

Are you struggling to build a slide deck even though you have a concept in mind? Use Gemini in Slides to transform your ideas into engaging presentation decks. With Gemini in Slides, you can easily create slides from scratch or use existing information from Drive files or Gmail emails. For instance, you can ask Gemini in Slides to create a slide summarizing a product launch plan or visualizing a production process based on an existing document. Gemini in Slides makes it easy to generate high-quality slides with minimal effort.

**Fine tune your presentation content**

Get help tailoring your presentation. Use Gemini in Slides to transform your initial content into a more compelling narrative. Gemini in Slides can also help you generate speaker notes for individual slides or provide an executive summary for your presentation. Ask Gemini in Slides to create agenda slides or make messaging more concise throughout your presentation. Need help crafting an on-brand elevator pitch to sum up your deck? Gemini in Slides can help with that, too!

**Design with AI-generated visuals**

The right visuals can impact your presentation. Click Ask Gemini and enter a prompt to *Create an image* or *Suggest images for this slide*. Gemini in Slides uses the context of a slide to generate charts and graphs to illustrate information in a visually appealing way. You can also add your own prompt, and Ask Gemini in Slides to create custom images to make your slides more engaging.

**Collaborate efficiently**

As a thought partner, you can use Gemini in Slides to quickly extract relevant information that can be used in your presentation. Gemini in Slides can help quickly reference files in Drive to create a slide. You can also tap Gemini in Slides to generate summaries, add speaker notes, and ensure everyone is working in-sync before itâs time to present. Your team can help improve Gemini in Slide's output by giving feedback on suggestions to polish your presentation.

#### Considerations and best practices

Gemini in Slides can help you create decks faster, simplifying the process and giving you more time to devote to other pressing tasks. Generative AI is constantly evolving, getting better and more efficient over time. However, itâs important to keep AI best practices in mind to be sure its output is factually correct.

**Fact checking & editing**

Read and review your deck before presenting to catch any errors. If your deck includes any medical, legal, or financial advice, be sure to review carefully and share with your organizationâs legal team to ensure no false claims have been made.

**Maintaining control**

Gemini in Slides lets you give feedback on generated output. If a suggestion is inaccurate, click Good suggestion or Bad suggestion to the bottom right of the text or image suggestion. You can also add additional feedback to help Gemini in Slides improve output and future suggestions. As part of Googleâs policy, enterprise end users are informed before submitting feedback that feedback data shouldnât contain personal, sensitive, or confidential information.

**Audience awareness**

Gemini in Slides can help you capture your audienceâs attention while minimizing the tedious work involved in creating a compelling deck. When crafting prompts, tell Gemini in Slides who your audience is to help tailor output.

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Benefits include saving time on presentation outlines and design and creating professional-looking images without design expertise.
- Gemini in Slides can create images, generate new slides, summarize a presentation, write or rewrite content, and reference your Drive files or Gmail emails as you write or create a new slide.

**Fine tune your presentation content**

Get help tailoring your presentation. Use Gemini in Slides to transform your initial content into a more compelling narrative. Gemini in Slides can also help you generate speaker notes for individual slides or provide an executive summary for your presentation. Ask Gemini in Slides to create agenda slides or make messaging more concise throughout your presentation. Need help crafting an on-brand elevator pitch to sum up your deck? Gemini in Slides can help with that, too!

**Design with AI-generated visuals**

The right visuals can impact your presentation. Click Ask Gemini and enter a prompt to *Create an image* or *Suggest images for this slide*. Gemini in Slides uses the context of a slide to generate charts and graphs to illustrate information in a visually appealing way. You can also add your own prompt, and Ask Gemini in Slides to create custom images to make your slides more engaging.

**Collaborate efficiently**

As a thought partner, you can use Gemini in Slides to quickly extract relevant information that can be used in your presentation. Gemini in Slides can help quickly reference files in Drive to create a slide. You can also tap Gemini in Slides to generate summaries, add speaker notes, and ensure everyone is working in-sync before itâs time to present. Your team can help improve Gemini in Slide's output by giving feedback on suggestions to polish your presentation.

#### Considerations and best practices

Gemini in Slides can help you create decks faster, simplifying the process and giving you more time to devote to other pressing tasks. Generative AI is constantly evolving, getting better and more efficient over time. However, itâs important to keep AI best practices in mind to be sure its output is factually correct.

**Fact checking & editing**

Read and review your deck before presenting to catch any errors. If your deck includes any medical, legal, or financial advice, be sure to review carefully and share with your organizationâs legal team to ensure no false claims have been made.

**Maintaining control**

Gemini in Slides lets you give feedback on generated output. If a suggestion is inaccurate, click Good suggestion or Bad suggestion to the bottom right of the text or image suggestion. You can also add additional feedback to help Gemini in Slides improve output and future suggestions. As part of Googleâs policy, enterprise end users are informed before submitting feedback that feedback data shouldnât contain personal, sensitive, or confidential information.

**Audience awareness**

Gemini in Slides can help you capture your audienceâs attention while minimizing the tedious work involved in creating a compelling deck. When crafting prompts, tell Gemini in Slides who your audience is to help tailor output.

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Benefits include saving time on presentation outlines and design and creating professional-looking images without design expertise.
- Gemini in Slides can create images, generate new slides, summarize a presentation, write or rewrite content, and reference your Drive files or Gmail emails as you write or create a new slide.

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/presentation-ai?hl=en

# GenerativeÂ AI for presentations

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/presentation-ai?hl=en

# GenerativeÂ AI for presentations

Transform ideas into presentations with help from AI. Use Gemini in Slides to create custom visuals, generate a slide and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-presentation_ai-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-presentation_ai-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini creates an image from a prompt with 'Help me visualise', shown with man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NCwXrJ7htjtQgtH93xugmSqGoFcTaiS4GQqFFn03BFH4HpItdxspd3h41BLhgYVH59_WC3pzvoAxVpwIaJ8lDzH3BxbOt7l4NXTj=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

#### What is an AI-generated presentation?

An AI-generated presentation is a slide deck created with help from artificial intelligence, used to tell a story and information in a concise, highly visual format. Presentations are made to engage with your audience and spark conversation. GenerativeÂ AI can be a helpful thought partner in building a compelling slide deck. With Gemini in Slides you can use generative AI to create original images and generate a slide using content from your Drive.

#### How to use Gemini in Slides

With Gemini in Slides, you can create images, generate new slides, summarise a presentation and reference your Drive files to create a new slide.

You can access Gemini in Slides by clicking the Ask Gemini icon. Once the icon is clicked, you can either select a suggested prompt or compose your own unique prompt to help you quickly generate slides and fine-tune your presentation.
