#### How Gemini in Slides can help you craft presentations

**Generate slide ideas and outlines**

Are you struggling to build a slide deck even though you have a concept in mind? Use Gemini in Slides to transform your ideas into engaging presentation decks. With Gemini in Slides, you can easily create slides from scratch or use existing information from Drive files or Gmail emails. For instance, you can ask Gemini in Slides to create a slide summarising a product launch plan or visualising a production process based on an existing document. Gemini in Slides makes it easy to generate high-quality slides with minimal effort.

**Fine-tune your presentation content**

Get help tailoring your presentation. Use Gemini in Slides to transform your initial content into a more compelling narrative. Gemini in Slides can also help you generate speaker notes for individual slides or provide an executive summary for your presentation. Ask Gemini in Slides to create agenda slides or make messaging more concise throughout your presentation. Need help crafting an on-brand elevator pitch to sum up your deck? Gemini in Slides can help with that too.

**Design with AI-generated visuals**

The right visuals can impact your presentation. Click Ask Gemini and enter a prompt to *Create an image* or *Suggest images for this slide*. Gemini in Slides uses the context of a slide to generate charts and graphs to illustrate information in a visually appealing way. You can also add your own prompt, and Ask Gemini in Slides to create custom images to make your slides more engaging.

**Collaborate efficiently**

As a thought partner, you can use Gemini in Slides to quickly extract relevant information that can be used in your presentation. Gemini in Slides can help quickly reference files in Drive to create a slide. You can also tap Gemini in Slides to generate summaries, add speaker notes and ensure that everyone is working in sync before it's time to present. Your team can help to improve Gemini in Slides' output by giving feedback on suggestions to polish your presentation.

#### Considerations and best practices

Gemini in Slides can help you create decks faster, simplifying the process and giving you more time to devote to other pressing tasks. Generative AI is constantly evolving, getting better and more efficient over time. However, it's important to keep AI best practices in mind to make sure that its output is factually correct.

**Fact checking and editing**

Read and review your deck before presenting to catch any errors. If your deck includes any medical, legal or financial advice, make sure that you review carefully and share with your organisation's legal team to ensure that no false claims have been made.

**Maintaining control**

Gemini in Slides lets you give feedback on generated output. If a suggestion is inaccurate, click Good suggestion or Bad suggestion to the bottom right of the text or image suggestion. You can also add additional feedback to help Gemini in Slides improve output and future suggestions. As part of Google's policy, enterprise end users are informed before submitting feedback that feedback data shouldn't contain personal, sensitive or confidential information.

**Audience awareness**

Gemini in Slides can help you capture your audience's attention while minimising the tedious work involved in creating a compelling deck. When crafting prompts, tell Gemini in Slides who your audience is to help tailor output.

## 76. Google Workspace enables the future of AI-powered work for every business

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/empowering-businesses-with-ai?hl=en

# Google Workspace enables the future of AI-powered work for every business

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/empowering-businesses-with-ai?hl=en

Product Announcements

# Google Workspace enables the future of AI-powered work for every business

January 15, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23637__Gemini_Sizzle_Blog_Hero____English.max-2600x2600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23637__Gemini_Sizzle_Blog_Hero____English.max-2600x2600.png)

##### Jerry Dischler

President of Cloud Applications, Google

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

*Updated April 28, 2025:* Pricing for very small business customers will be updated starting July 7, 2025. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/a?p=gemini_update_business).

We believe AI is foundational to the future of work and its transformative power should be accessible to every business and every employee, at an affordable price. That's why today we’ve decided to include the best of Google AI in Workspace Business and Enterprise plans, bringing the latest generative AI capabilities to our business customers without the need to purchase any add-ons.

### Boosting human potential with AI at work

For over 20 years, Google Workspace has been more than just a suite of tools; it's been a place where teams create, build, and grow together. We've empowered more than 10 million businesses of all sizes — from innovative startups to global enterprises — to transform how they work. Now, as we embrace an era of work powered by AI, the opportunities emerging for our customers and our mission to help them thrive have only accelerated.

We believe that AI is not just another tool; it’s a foundational shift in how work gets done. Over the past year we’ve witnessed more than 100,000 customers embrace generative AI to unlock employee productivity, creativity, and innovation. It’s helped them reduce the burden of mundane tasks — from taking meeting notes to synthesizing long documents and videos — and it’s acted as a strategic thought partner to bring their best ideas to life. Businesses that embrace AI are gaining a significant competitive edge, but many are unsure how to start or struggle with the cost of adopting new technologies.

### Empowering every business with the best of Google AI

To address this need, we’re announcing that the best of Google AI is now included in Workspace Business and Enterprise plans, giving every business the tools they need to innovate for tomorrow.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemrise_sizzle_video_thumbnail.max-1200x1200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemrise_sizzle_video_thumbnail.max-1200x1200.png)

The best of Google AI, woven into the fabric of every workday

The following AI capabilities will start rolling out to Google Workspace Business customers today and to Enterprise customers later this month:

- **Get AI assistance in Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids, and more:** Do your best work faster with AI embedded in the tools you use every day. Gemini streamlines your communications by helping you summarize, draft, and find information in your emails, chats, and files. It can be a thought partner and source of inspiration, helping you create professional documents, slides, spreadsheets, and videos from scratch. Gemini can even improve your meetings by taking notes, enhancing your audio and video, and catching you up on the conversation if you join late.

- **Chat with Gemini Advanced, Google’s next-gen AI:** Kickstart learning, brainstorming, and planning with the Gemini app on your laptop or mobile device. Gemini Advanced can help you tackle complex projects including coding, research, and data analysis and lets you build [Gems](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/2024/08/customize-gemini-with-gems.html), your team of AI experts to help with repeatable or specialized tasks.

- **Unlock the power of [NotebookLM Plus](https://blog.google/technology/google-labs/notebooklm-new-features-december-2024/):** We’re bringing the revolutionary AI research assistant to every employee, to help them make sense of complex topics. Upload sources to get instant insights and Audio Overviews, then share customized notebooks with the team to accelerate their learning and onboarding.

### Simplified pricing with AI included

By removing the need to pay for an add-on to access our latest generative AI capabilities, we're simplifying our plans and pricing to bring the added value of Google AI to all Workspace customers. For example, a customer using the Workspace Business Standard plan with a Gemini Business add-on previously paid $32 per user, per month. Now, that same customer will pay just $14 per user, per month — only $2 more than they were paying for Workspace without Gemini.  
  
You can learn more about our updated pricing and feature availability by edition in the [Help Center](https://support.google.com/a?p=gemini_update_business). This pricing takes effect tomorrow for new customers. For existing customers, monthly subscription pricing will be updated starting March 17, 2025, or at renewal date with an Annual/Fixed-term plan, whichever is later. *Updated April 28, 2025:* Pricing for very small business customers will be updated starting July 7, 2025.

### Safeguarding your interactions with AI

We know that data security, confidentiality, and compliance are top priorities for business leaders when adopting AI, and we are committed to helping you keep your data safe.

- **Your data is *your* data:** We don’t use your data, prompts, or generated responses to train Gemini models outside of your domain without permission. We don’t sell your data or use it for ads targeting.
- **You are in control:** We built Gemini with enterprise-grade controls to help you roll out Gemini while protecting your sensitive data. Gemini only retrieves relevant data that the user has permission to access, and your existing Workspace data security and sovereignty controls are *automatically* applied.
- **You can stay compliant:** Gemini for Workspace and the Gemini app are one of the first generative AI productivity solutions to attain a comprehensive set of safety, privacy, and security certifications, including SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001/17/18, and ISO 42001, and can help you meet HIPAA compliance.

Learn more about the available admin controls and our commitment to you in the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919).

### Start your no-cost AI trial today

We believe AI isn’t just an add-on — it’s central to how work gets done. Now, with AI seamlessly integrated into our product and pricing, we’re excited to help everyone unlock their next chapter of innovation. You can learn more about [Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/) and get started with a no-cost trial today. [Register for our upcoming webinar](https://cloudonair.withgoogle.com/events/google-workspace-ai-powered-collaboration-for-organizations-of-all-sizes) to explore its benefits and see how it can help transform your business.

Today is just the start. Over the coming year, we’ll continue to introduce new AI features and value for our customers into their Workspace plans. The future of work is here, and it’s powered by AI — for every business.

Posted in

- [Product Announcements](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements)
- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

## 77. Google Workspace extends Gemini benefits to millions of customers

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/google-workspace-extends-gemini-benefits-to-more-customers?hl=en

# Google Workspace extends Gemini benefits to millions of customers

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/google-workspace-extends-gemini-benefits-to-more-customers?hl=en

Product Announcements

# Google Workspace extends Gemini benefits to millions of customers

September 24, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GAW24_AMER_BlogHeader_2880x1200_Dark.ai_1.max-2600x2600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GAW24_AMER_BlogHeader_2880x1200_Dark.ai_1.max-2600x2600.png)

##### Aparna Pappu

GM and Vice President, Google Workspace

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

Every day, businesses of all sizes are getting more done, with greater confidence and in less time with [Gemini for Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/). Using built-in AI across our popular apps, including Gmail, Docs, and Drive, users save an average of 105 minutes per week, according to our recent study of enterprise customers.\* And it’s not just about getting more done, but getting it done really well — 75% of daily Gemini for Workspace users say it improves the quality of their work.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23054_WS_Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_2_Optio.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23054_WS_Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_2_Optio.max-2200x2200.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23054_WS_Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_2_Optio.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/23054_WS_Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_2_Optio.max-2200x2200.png)

Enterprise customers benefit from using Gemini for Google Workspace

Driven by our belief that generative AI can be transformative for every employee, **today, we’re announcing that the standalone Gemini app ([gemini.google.com](http://gemini.google.com)) is now included as part of Workspace Business, Enterprise, and Frontline plans.**With enterprise-grade data protections built in, employees everywhere can now save time and deliver higher quality work — securely and compliantly — with an AI-powered assistant at work.\*\*

Now, **millions of Workspace customers can access the benefits of AI**, while knowing that their organization’s privacy, security, and compliance policies will be upheld. Through the admin console, customers will have choice and control over how the Gemini app handles user prompt and generated response retention, while having our assurance that Gemini does not use your organization’s data, user prompts, or generated responses to train or improve Gemini models. As we’ve said since the beginning of our generative AI journey, [your data is your data](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/protecting-your-data-era-generative-ai?e=48754805).

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_for_Workspace_-_Web_-_1920x1080.max-2000x2000.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_for_Workspace_-_Web_-_1920x1080.max-2000x2000.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_for_Workspace_-_Web_-_1920x1080.max-2000x2000.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_for_Workspace_-_Web_-_1920x1080.max-2000x2000.png)

Gemini app for Company, Inc. showing business related prompts

Businesses looking for the most comprehensive AI experience from Google, can unlock additional AI features and use Gemini directly in Gmail, Docs, Drive and more with the [Gemini for Workspace add-on](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/). (For tips on how to get started, see our [*Beyond the prompt*](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-round-our-series-getting-best-out-generative-ai?e=48754805) blog series.)

### Introducing security advisor, new security insights, and data protection capabilities

We also know that security concerns extend beyond just the use of AI. Staying ahead of security threats that continue to grow in sophistication and scale is a never-ending challenge, particularly for small and midsize businesses. **That's why we’re introducing our new security advisor,**a powerful toolkit to help thwart the latest cyberthreats. 

Think of it as your personal security expert that can offer business-tailored insights, actionable  guidance, and additional threat prevention and data protection controls. Security advisor delivers insights directly to an IT administrator’s inbox, with tailored recommendations to enhance the organization’s security posture. This includes a guided experience for implementing recommended threat defenses, account security measures, and data protection capabilities. **It’s security made simple.**

Over the next few weeks, we’re starting to roll out security advisor to all Workspace Business edition customers.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Security_advisor_final.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Security_advisor_final.max-2200x2200.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Security_advisor_final.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Security_advisor_final.max-2200x2200.png)

Security advisor in the Google Workspace admin console

### New industry certifications for Gemini for Workspace

In the era of generative AI, our [commitments to data privacy, confidentiality, and security](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/protecting-your-data-era-generative-ai) remain core to our product design. Earlier this year, we enhanced Gemini for Workspace to support HIPAA workloads at the request of our healthcare and life sciences customers. **Today, we’re announcing that Gemini for Workspace is one of the first generative AI solutions to be certified according to industry security and privacy standards such as SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, and ISO 27701.**With Gemini, you’re getting an enterprise-grade AI-powered assistant that can help you meet your compliance requirements today — something unavailable with similar solutions in the market.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_A2x.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_A2x.max-2200x2200.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_A2x.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_at_Work_Blog_Image_A2x.max-2200x2200.png)

Gemini for Workspace certifications for regulatory compliance

### Get started today with Gemini for Workspace

Whether you're a small business wanting to accelerate your growth, or a large regulated enterprise looking to leverage generative AI in a compliant way, you can [get started with Gemini today](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/). And if you want to learn more about how Gemini can help you and your team to achieve more, be sure to join our [Gemini at Work digital event](https://workspace.google.com/blog/events/six-sessions-to-attend-gemini-at-work).

---

Source: \* Based on an internal Google analysis of survey data from completed Gemini for Google Workspace pilots. Some pilots began in December 2023 and some are still in progress. Data was aggregated in July 2024, across 18 enterprise customers globally, spanning North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia Pacific. We looked at more than 3,200 responses from employees across a broad range of industries, including manufacturing, healthcare and life sciences, retail, energy, financial services, and software and technology.

\*\* Availability and features may vary depending on device, language, country, subscription, and corporate account settings. Internet connection and set up may be required. Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Check responses for accuracy.

## 78. Google Workspace with Gemini allows MERGE to build a more innovative, effective, and creative team

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/google-workspace-gemini-allows-merge-build-innovative-effective-and-creative-team?hl=en

# Google Workspace with Gemini allows MERGE to build a more innovative, effective, and creative team

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/google-workspace-gemini-allows-merge-build-innovative-effective-and-creative-team?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Google Workspace with Gemini allows MERGE to build a more innovative, effective, and creative team

August 19, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_Thumbnail.max-2500x2500.jpeg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_Thumbnail.max-2500x2500.jpeg)

##### Kyle Smith

CTO, MERGE

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

“Gemini has quickly become our most-used Google Workspace application, even outpacing Docs and Sheets.”

**Snapshot:** MERGE, a marketing and technology agency built for the intersection of health and wellness, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how teams collaborate, create, and deliver value for clients. Read how MERGE:

- **Achieved an 89% sustained usage rate** of Google Workspace with Gemini during a three-month pilot
- **Improved turnaround times for client work by 33%** with Gemini
- Created a **culture of collaboration**

---

### The mission and the challenge

Powered by human insight, creativity, and AI, [MERGE](https://mergeworld.com/) weaves storytelling through technology to turn complexity into clarity and shape personalized experiences that strengthen relationships between people and brands. Our customers are on a mission to make the world better, and we help them fulfill that purpose by amplifying their message.

When you’re delivering intricate strategies, crafting client-facing content, and juggling tight deadlines, the pressure is constant. To consistently meet our customers’ needs, we have to find ways to streamline collaboration without losing quality or time. Since collaboration is at the heart of what we do, we needed a solution that could keep up with our teams, our clients, and our vision. That’s why we rely on [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/).

![Video Thumbnail](https://img.youtube.com/vi/2tBlw06sDg4/hqdefault.jpg)

MERGE, a marketing and technology agency built for the intersection of health and wellness, partnered with Google Workspace to transform how its teams collaborate and deliver value to clients.

### Using Google Workspace with Gemini

Google Workspace was a simple choice for a simple reason: No other platform would let us work so seamlessly. Live, in real time, shoulder to shoulder, or when we’re miles apart, Workspace makes it easy to do our best work. Today, everything we do happens within Workspace: We host meetings on Google Meet, share files securely with Google Drive, and communicate in sync with Google Chat. It gives us one platform that ties every step of our workflows together. That kind of cohesion has been transformative for us as a team and for the clients we serve.

And then Google Workspace with Gemini changed the game again. We started with a 200-user pilot to explore how AI could integrate into our day-to-day work, and the results were astounding. **Within just a few days, we saw nearly universal adoption and the tool completely revolutionized how we work.**

Before Google Workspace with Gemini, we’d tackle strategy documents, project briefs, and brainstorming sessions from literally a blank page. Now, we start with AI-generated templates that already include customer data and ideas, giving us momentum from the start. Whether we’re developing creative briefs or analyzing client insights, Gemini puts us one step ahead before we’re in front of a customer.

Gemini has quickly become our most-used Workspace application, even outpacing Google Docs and Sheets. Given how many pain points it solves for so many teams, I’m not surprised. Need to summarize a meeting with clear action items? Gemini does that. Struggling to write a job description for recruiting? Gemini jump-starts your thinking. It even saves hours on content rework because we can collaborate directly with clients in a Doc in real time, ensuring we stay aligned. **That’s led to a 33% improvement in turnaround times — a big deal in an industry where every second counts.**

But the biggest transformation I’ve seen with Gemini is the mindset shift. Instead of worrying about bringing polished ideas to meetings, we can collaborate on ideas that are still forming, using a tool that helps us align and refine together. That openness is making us more innovative, more efficient, and more connected as a team.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_image__2.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_image__2.max-2200x2200.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_image__2.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/MERGE_image__2.max-2200x2200.png)

MERGE uses Google Workspace with Gemini to work faster, smarter, and more creatively.

### Looking ahead

With Google Workspace and Gemini under the hood, MERGE is growing faster while working smarter. Gemini has fueled our ability to manage complex workflows, streamline creative processes, and amplify collaboration across our teams. And now that it’s included in our Workspace licensing, we’ve rolled it out across the entire company, giving everyone access to the tools they need to supercharge their work.

As we look ahead, we know AI will remain central to how we deliver greater value to our clients. By equipping ourselves with tools like Gemini, we can go beyond simply enabling health and wellness brands to succeed — we’re making sure their stories resonate loudly and make the impact they’re meant to.

Posted in

- [Customer Stories](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories)
- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

Customer Stories

### Google Workspace is the “new default” for The Carbon Group's fractional C-suite services

By Alex DiNunzio • 3-minute read](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/google-workspace-is-the-new-default-for-the-carbon-group)

---

## 79. Google Workspace with Gemini: 128 ways our customers are transforming how they work with AI

# Google Workspace with Gemini: 128 ways our customers are transforming how they work with AI

AI and Machine Learning

# Google Workspace with Gemini: 128 ways our customers are transforming how they work with AI

October 2, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_44_gSJzPA1.max-1600x1600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/unnamed_44_gSJzPA1.max-1600x1600.png)

##### The Google Workspace Team

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

Earlier this year we announced that we’re [including the best of Google AI in Workspace Business and Enterprise plans](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/empowering-businesses-with-ai?e=48754805), bringing the latest generative AI capabilities to our business customers without the need to purchase any add-ons. And at this year’s Super Bowl, we showcased how 50 small businesses across the U.S. — one in each state — are [using Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/ai/customers/) to help them get more done and delight their customers.

Here are 128 real-world Gemini use cases from our customers — showcasing how they’re transforming work with AI.

### **Automotive & Logistics**

- EV manufacturer, **Rivian**, [migrated to Workspace with Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wfDJgOs8fBQ&t=1394s), resulting in faster, higher-quality collaboration and work.
- **TruckHouse** specializes in expedition vehicles and speeds [inventory tracking](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EFZyTZuIi9k) with Gemini in Sheets so they can spend more time in the great outdoors.
- **Oxa**, a developer of software for autonomous vehicles, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [build](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/oxa-unlocks-collaboration-scale-google-workspace?e=48754805) campaign templates, write social posts, create job descriptions, and proofread content across all teams.
- Geotab, one of the largest telematics companies in the world, relies on Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how it collaborates and works with data. With [nearly 89% adoption](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z00YElZlLxw&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=7), 2,300 employees ran 110,000 Gemini queries in a single month — averaging 40 queries per person per day.

### **Business & Professional Services**

- The team at **Joe the Architect**, a 25-person architecture firm, [catches up](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U1cI3R2wRSE) on long email chains with Gemini in Gmail to keep track of client needs across dozens of conversations.
- **Beyond** is a technology consultancy that guides their clients through transformational journeys to unlock the potential of AI and cloud-based technology. Google Workspace with Gemini [helps them reduce](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_my/customers/beyond/) the time from project brief to project kickoff from months to weeks, and the time for first drafts of RFI responses from days to minutes.
- **Devoteam**, an AI-driven tech consulting company, brought Google Workspace with Gemini to 4,000 of its users, [enhancing internal productivity and collaboration](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/devoteam-rolls-out-4000-gemini-workspace-licenses?e=48754805) while also strengthening its position as a go-to AI partner for their customers across EMEA.
- **Flashpoint** collaborates using Google Workspace to [improve](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-flashpoint-builds-productive-happy-workforce-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) communication efficiency, increase workforce satisfaction, and help employees dedicate more time to keeping customers secure.
- Design and technology agency **L+R** [streamlines workflows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BlonAMD8y1o) using Google Workspace with Gemini, empowering its team to achieve more impactful results.
- Using Google Workspace with Gemini to run her business, **Own Your Brand**’s Lauren Magenta can [draft emails faster](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rbMpNJg4_cc) while still keeping them personalized and sounding like her.
- **Randstad**, the “world’s most specialized and equitable talent company,” uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [transform](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KTWE9ChVx4I) its work culture, increasing cultural diversity and inclusion while reducing sick days by double digits.
- **Thoughtworks** is a global technology consultancy that helps businesses use technology to solve problems and innovate. They use Google Workspace with Gemini [to improve internal and external communication](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/thoughtworks-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) across their company, including in non-native languages — from emails to documents and blogs.
- **Yazi** turns to Google Workspace with Gemini to [accelerate marketing efforts](https://youtu.be/unHAmQe_ZPw?si=mXaAN8CE4Slx0cdA&t=122) so they can launch products faster; their dev teams also use it to write and deploy more code.
- **WITHIN**, a performance branding agency that serves brands from startups to global enterprises, [maximizes innovation and efficiency](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zVJrJt0yKHo&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=13) with Google Workspace and Gemini.
- **Croud**, a global full-service media agency specializing in performance and brand marketing, [delivers 4–5X productivity with Gemini and NotebookLM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eTVoUC7AUt4&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=6).
- **Sonata Design**, an interior design products company serving home builders, interior designers, and the construction industry, has [transformed its workflows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=98BmfZuZFyw&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=10) by adopting Google Workspace with Gemini and NotebookLM.
- With over a decade of experience as a Google Workspace customer, global outsourcing company **Transcom** uses tools like Gmail, Google Chat, Drive, Meet, and Gemini to create a seamless, innovative, and efficient work environment. Now, the company is [using generative AI tools like Gemini and NotebookLM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xLpFKRitCT0&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=16) to enhance speed, creativity, and productivity across teams while keeping people at the center of every process.
- **Docusign**, a global leader in intelligent agreement management with 1.7 million customers and 1 billion users, has embraced Google Workspace with Gemini to empower its workforce. By providing employees with [a secure generative AI innovation playground](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lAs-7tXFmnk&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=1), Docusign is democratizing AI and enabling faster project initiation, quicker analysis, and accelerated learning of new technologies. A pilot program showed that 80% of participants experienced a positive impact on their daily lives, with 67% gaining 1-4 hours of productivity per week.
- **Compass**, the largest real estate brokerage in the United States by sales volume, powers nearly 40,000 agents with its end-to-end technology platform. With a mission to help everyone find their place in the world, Compass [relies on Google Workspace with Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6NzXWNXqBJw&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=2) to transform its workflows, giving agents and employees more time to focus on high-value work.
- As the most trusted name in behavioral data analytics, **Fullstory** helps customers turn clicks into clarity while keeping their most valuable asset — their data — safe. Leveraging Google Workspace with Gemini, Fullstory can [integrate generative AI into its daily workflows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GvPl_8jWqcE&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=33) at a rapid pace without compromising on data security — from generating unique video outreach content at scale to summarizing user behavior on a site to create more informed and enriching chat-based experiences.

### **Financial Services**

- Brazilian bank **Banestes** [streamline](https://workspace.google.com/intl/pt-BR/customers/banestes/)s and speeds processes like credit analysis using Google Workspace with Gemini, leading to higher productivity in its legal and marketing departments.
- Fintech company **FinQuery** uses Google Workspace with Gemini as a [valuable productivity tool](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/finquery-innovates-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) for brainstorming, quickly drafting emails, managing complex projects, and debugging code.
- **ATB Financial**, a leading financial institution in Alberta, Canada, has [successfully deployed Google Workspace with Gemini](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/atb-financial-empowers-employees-with-google-ai-302358518.html) to its more than 5,000 team members, allowing them to automate routine tasks, access information quickly, and collaborate more effectively, all while ensuring data is secure and trustworthy.
- **OSTTRA** [increases productivity](https://workspace.google.com/customers/osttra/) with the “Help me write” feature in Google Workspace with Gemini, saving employees time on writing proposals and interview questions.
- As one the largest lenders and mortgage servicers in the US, **Pennymac** [uses Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-customers-use-gemini-google-workspace-focus-what-they-do-best?e=48754805) to create job descriptions as well as getting started on policy and procedure documents. On a more technical level, they’re also testing Gemini in concert with [Vertex AI](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai?hl=en).
- **Trumble Insurance** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [increase the value](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V2gwtZJsKqw) it delivers to clients with enhanced efficiency, productivity, and creativity.
- **Pinnacol Assurance**, Colorado’s largest worker’s compensation carrier, leans on Gemini to [accelerate repetitive tasks](https://workspace.google.com/customers/pinnacol-assurance/), such as creating questions for client interviews and digging deeper into insurance claims, with 96% of surveyed employees reporting time savings.
- **Questrade Financial Group**, a Canadian group of companies, [adopted Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/questrade-financial-group-transforms-productivity-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) to increase productivity and improve their competitive edge, enabling employees to save hours of time to focus on strategic initiatives.
- Global credit bureau **Equifax** adopted Gemini to enhance productivity while strengthening its security posture. As [a result of its Gemini trial](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/equifax-embraces-gemini-for-secure-innovation-across-business-units?e=48754805), the company found that 90% of participants experienced an increase in work quality and quantity.
- **BBVA**, a global bank with over 140,000 employees, has been using Google Workspace since 2011 to drive seamless international collaboration. Now, with Gemini support, they’re [streamlining legal workflows and staying ahead of compliance challenges](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=15) with AI-powered transparency and trust.
- **Seguros Bolivar**, an insurance provider in Colombia, [adopted Google Workspace and Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5dH3lSqCd-8&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=12) to help teams streamline processes, collaborate securely, and use AI to tackle day-to-day tasks and generate ideas for long-term innovation. Using cloud-based tools with built-in security, Seguros Bolivar has significantly reduced operational costs, accelerated workflows, and enhanced collaboration when creating new solutions. Rolling out Gemini has further improved productivity, helping employees unblock challenges in real time and optimize operations at a company-wide level.

### **Healthcare & Life Sciences**

- **Family Vision Care of Ponca City** uses Gemini in Gmail to easily [explain medical terms](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iH_2cOHNqIE) in patient emails and to improve accessibility.
- **Click Therapeutics** develops prescription digital therapeutics designed to treat disease. Their Clinical Operations team [leverages Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S1B9Nu5eyqs&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5YanaZ0GBZ8acSxIlmdkZz&index=5) in Google Workspace to transform complex operations data into actionable insights, so they can quickly pinpoint ways to streamline the patient experience in clinical trials.
- **Mark Cuban’s Cost Plus Drugs** estimates that employees [save](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/why-mark-cuban-cost-plus-drugs-switched-google-workspace) an average of five hours a week using Gemini in Gmail, alongside other benefits such as streamlining transcription and FDA compliance documentation.
- By using Google Workspace with Gemini to [automate](https://workspace.google.com.sb/customers/sami/) repetitive tasks, **Sami Saúde** has seen a 13% productivity increase — and better patient outcomes, thanks to more accurate diagnoses.
- **apree health** [centralized its data](https://workspace.google.com/customers/apree-health/) using a zero-trust security solution implemented with Google Workspace. This allowed the company to protect sensitive patient info with tools like granular access controls and device management.
- **Better Habits** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to reduce the time spent [developing communication plans](https://youtu.be/IxtSDUI5hlc?si=cbk6A7Tv52JROdFQ&t=78), allowing them to focus on delivering high-quality wellness workshops.
- **MEDITECH**, an electronic health care record solution, is [integrating Gemini into highly regulated healthcare workflows](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-meditech-integrating-gemini-highly-regulated-healthcare-workflows?e=48754805). So far, they’ve saved 7 hours per employee per week with Gemini while improving job satisfaction as team members focus on more strategic projects.
- **Seattle Children’s Hospital**, a leading pediatric healthcare provider, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini and NotebookLM to [enhance operational efficiency, streamline research, and improve patient care](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lu52cv5Xtp0&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=6). The hospital’s rapid adoption of Gemini was driven by its HIPAA compliance capabilities, enabling physicians and researchers to use AI without compromising protected health information.
- **Virbac**, an animal health pharmaceutical company, is [boosting its productivity with Gemini and Google Workspace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M8Og1Iw4n2E&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=23) by automating low-impact tasks and streamlining international collaboration. With clear AI governance and a strategic rollout, teams can now focus on high-value priorities that directly support animal health.

### **Hospitality & Travel**

- **Fitz's Bottling Company** has been selling root beer since 1947 and now uses Gemini in Sheets to quickly [pull together and format](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mHxr7UAgC4c) inventory information, helping them continue the success of the world's first root beer microbrewery.
- **BrushBuck Wildlife Tours** [tracks seasonal animal movements](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=POaT7xs3gWg) with help from Gemini in Sheets so every visitor has a chance to marvel at Wyoming's wildlife.
- **Three Fold Noodles + Dumpling Co.** [drafts social media posts](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E6i-kkTEZxQ) with Gemini in Docs to stay active online without compromising on quality time in the kitchen.
- **Hog Island Oyster Co.** [simplifies sales analysis](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bISwBfwfpL8) with Gemini in Sheets, creating reports on oyster sales by type, size, and quantity with a single prompt.
- **Sweets and Meats BBQ** [finds local events](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ll4KVBmTbjM) for its food trucks with help from Gemini in Sheets, easily generating a weekly schedule in seconds.
- **Attache** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to automate historical data analysis, achieving an [80% reduction](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hPy9hM5ltm4) in calls from new arrivals, smoother stays, and higher customer satisfaction.
- **BLADE** is a technology-powered, global urban air mobility platform committed to reducing travel friction. The company [uses Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/blade-takes-air-travel-new-heights-google-workspace?e=48754805) for everything from tracking mission-critical logistics like flight schedules and manifests to collaborating on press releases and automating spreadsheet creation to save hours of work.

### **Manufacturing, Industrial & Electronic**

- **Air Liquide**, a global leader in gases, technologies, and services for industry and healthcare, has 66,000 employees in 60 countries. [The company turned to Google Workspace with Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UaE12lzkwvs&t=58s) to drive transformation at scale. With AI-powered tools like NotebookLM and Gems, teams across every department are now working faster and smarter.
- The team at **Ace Sign Co.** uses Gemini in Slides to [mock-up designs in seconds](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XB6hXGpHLyA), not hours, giving them more time and flexibility to dream big on each design — as they’ve been doing since 1887.
- **Guardian Bikes** specializes in kid's bikes with safer brakes, and uses Gemini in Sheets to easily [query and organize](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pSVYJWdh4FU) the massive amounts of data its factory produces.
- The team at **Solestial** [optimizes production](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IAVrnuh8IHs) of their space-stable solar cells by tracking manufacturing data with Gemini in Sheets — bringing the future of energy a step closer to liftoff.
- **Cottrell Boatbuilding** [writes high-quality social posts](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1FjXISSyTy0) with help from Gemini in Docs, winning back time to focus on the craft they've honed for 40+ years.
- **Hydro Ottawa** employees [automate daily tasks](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/hydro-ottawa-lights-future-work-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) and collaborate more effectively using Google Workspace with Gemini, leading to improved and more-cost-effective services for customers.
- **Trimble** manufactures software and hardware for drones, monitors, satellites, and more. The company [enhances productivity](https://cloud.google.com/transform/101-real-world-generative-ai-use-cases-from-industry-leaders#:~:text=Trimble%2C%20a%20maker,and%20collaborative%20environment.) with the Google Workspace AI features, which improve document search and code generation efficiency and help streamline workflows — all within one secure and collaborative solution.
- **Avery Dennison** is a global company that provides materials science and digital identification solutions. In just 90 days, they were able to [increase productivity](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZFfInSkxEyo) across their teams, saving the average user 2.5 hours per week while also boosting creativity.
- **Zoppas Industries**, a leader in thermal management solutions, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [increase collaboration](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/zoppas-industries-workspace-with-gemini-global-collaboration-and-efficiency?e=48754805) among its 8,000 global employees and drive faster time-to-market for its clients.
- **Mercer International**, a global bio-manufacturing company, operates across high-risk industrial environments where employee safety is paramount. [Using Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/mercer-international-productivity-gains-google-workspace-gemini?e=48754805), they’ve achieved $3 million in projected savings from productivity improvements and a 75% reduction in safety training video production costs with Google Vids.
- **Kärcher**, a global cleaning equipment leader, [launched Google Workspace with Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Iy7xYhvfhAQ&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=17) with the help of internal ambassadors. The result? Widespread adoption, creative AI use cases, and more efficient teams, with Gemini now acting as a personal assistant for thousands of employees.
- By integrating Google Workspace and Gemini, **Léon Grosse** is turning AI into [a true catalyst for its digital transformation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NS8nTsU0KLw&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=22). In a rapidly evolving industry, the construction leader is gaining agility, efficiency, and stronger collaboration.

### **Media, Telecom, Marketing & Gaming**

- **Verizon**, a global wireless services provider and the largest U.S. wireless carrier with 146 million subscribers, wanted to give employees the tools they need to do their jobs. [Deploying Gemini as part of Google Workspace](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1gh1zvuR67E&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=14) has increased productivity when creating content, saved employees time by summarizing documents, and improved prioritization by extracting action items from email chains.
- **Adwise**, a Dutch marketing agency, relies on Google Workspace with Gemini to [improve how they connect with clients](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_sg/customers/adwise/); they outline new documents, summarize existing documents, and reply to emails (“With a simple prompt, Gemini responds in my tone of voice…”).
- The blog “**Curb Free with Cory Lee**” shares wheelchair-accessible travel guides, and [brainstorms new content ideas](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ifVhcFASRQ4) with Gemini in Docs to keep giving readers fresh and valuable info.
- **Gold Bond** is an advertising company that provides branded merchandise and printed materials to organizations across a broad range of industries. Google Workspace with Gemini allows them to [automate workflows and speed up processes](https://workspace.google.com/customers/goldbond/), from contract reviews to adding complex formulas in Sheets.
- **The American Cornhole League** uses Gemini in Drive to [select clips and write social media captions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=euQbThletQM) for its broadcast footage, turning an hours’ long task into a single prompt.
- **Premier Martial Arts** uses Gemini in Docs to [create promotional material in minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xp3FF7rx4-Q), instead of hours, and spend more time helping their young students build skill and confidence.
- Youth basketball league **Vertical Hoops** uses the summarizing power of Gemini in Gmail to [communicate more effectively](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XI96w38jkhw) with coaches and parents, letting founder Jason Shea shoot back to the court faster.
- The **Golden State Warriors** [automate](https://cloud.google.com/customers/golden-state-warriors?hl=en&e=48754805) tedious tasks with Google Workspace, spending that won-back time delivering a great experience for fans and staff.
- **Just Salad** [streamlines communication](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FbyjhNgFwAM) by summarizing emails and meetings with Gemini, freeing up employees to focus on core tasks like product development and customer service.
- **Globe Telecom** [integrates Gemini into Google Chat and Meet](https://www.youtube.com/live/i2Qvl6gb50k) to improve its internal operations and employee experience. In Chat, Gemini powers an AI chatbot called "Ask Globe" that allows employees to quickly find information from various sources, while in Meet Gemini provides live transcriptions, summaries, and action items.
- Integrated marketing agency **Incubeta** increases efficiency and [enhances creativity](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/incubeta-drives-ai-performance-with-gemini-google-workspace?e=48754805) using Google Workspace with Gemini, seeing an up to 50% ROI improvement on short-term campaigns.
- **Boyter Island SRL** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [overcome writer’s block](https://youtu.be/kF-Qonv1tTc?si=A7ko-d7ss2sxQJhj&t=103) to improve their creative process.
- **MERGE**, a marketing and technology agency built for the intersection of health and wellness, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [transform how teams collaborate, create, and deliver value for clients](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/google-workspace-gemini-allows-merge-build-innovative-effective-and-creative-team?e=48754805). They’ve improved turnaround times for clients by 33% and created a true culture of collaboration.
- Experiential marketing agency **MAS** grew from a small startup to a global agency by embracing Google Workspace with Gemini. [The solution has helped them](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/mas-gets-more-out-its-creative-workflows-using-gemini?e=48754805) overcome language barriers with translated captions as they expand into 13 countries and iterate on creative concepts faster than ever before.

### **Public Sector & Nonprofits**

- The founder of an online **Brazilian Portuguese school** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to help create [tailored language learning content](https://youtu.be/2_a-fbLMBhY?si=LFVDwwzs7ZoQdMmh&t=42) for students.
- **CodePath** supports the next generation of engineering leaders from low-income and underrepresented communities. They use Gemini in Workspace to [accelerate grant writing and recruiting](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qYiiqEtTA0g) so they can deepen the impact of their work.
- **The Red Barn**, a nonprofit that teaches children with disabilities how to work with horses, uses Gemini in Docs to help [write grant proposals](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d7ejgD77a5Q) that allow more children to benefit from equine-assisted therapy.
- **Erika’s Lighthouse** [relies on Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/customers/erikas-lighthouse/) to create life-saving mental health programs for school communities worldwide. They use Gemini to automate repetitive tasks and accelerate content creation, from summarizing meeting takeaways to populating tables in Sheets to organize data.
- **The Mississippi Farm to School Network**, a nutrition education nonprofit, uses Gemini in Docs to [proofread and organize](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DJ9kXranXE4) the grant proposals that make its educational mission possible.
- **Can Do Canines** is a nonprofit that provides no-cost service dogs to persons with disabilities. The team uses Gemini in Gmail for [help drafting emails](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qlVNs9tMKzo), giving them more time to devote to their life-changing mission.
- **The Chef Ann Foundation** [summarizes conversations](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h5Pwn4a-reQ) with Gemini in Meet to track important info from the farmers, vendors, and school districts that help the team get healthy foods in schools nationwide.
- **The Wilmington Ballet** continues its mission of empowering students through dance with grant proposals [drafted by Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=izIzqMCH_YM) in Docs, giving the team more time to spend nurturing the next generation of dancers.
- **The Rhythm Foundation** secures funding for its free concerts with [pitch decks made using Gemini](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jcZHxtyBS8c) in Slides, cutting the time to a first draft from hours to minutes.
- **Wild Hearts Idaho**, a leadership program for girls, uses Gemini in Docs to [write social media captions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UJeewUAWIQY) that promote its programs and help more girls find themselves in outdoor adventures.
- **Nonprofit Studio Be** empowers artists in New Orleans. Founder Brandan "BMike" Odums uses Gemini in Gmail to [summarize and respond](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g-XslpE7XHw) to hundreds of weekly emails, so he can focus more time on supporting young artists.
- Cofounders of **Indigenous Made** improve their coordination of indigenous art markets by using [suggestions from Gemini in Gmail](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ox9ZJzC9w-M) to kick-start email responses.
- **The Fulton Theatre** [cuts grant-writing time in half](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6x3QYGFWAgg) by using Gemini in Docs to fill in routine information, helping the team focus on growing the theatre and putting on shows that bring communities together.
- **The Good Earth Farm**, an animal sanctuary and event space, keeps its community updated on their favorite animals with [newsletters co-written by Gemini in Docs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2NSF-Pi1Ku8).
- Environmental and cycling fundraiser **Climate Ride** [collaborates remotely](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_sg/customers/climate-ride/) using Google Workspace for Nonprofits so its five-person team can work more efficiently and focus their resources combating climate change.
- The **Dutch Bamboo Foundation** [streamlines fundraising](https://workspace.google.com/customers/dutch-bamboo/), research, and more using Google Workspace with Gemini. This allows a single person to effectively run the nonprofit, making the most of limited resources and advancing its mission to combat climate change.
- **Understood.org** uses Google Workspace with Gemini to [streamline tasks](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DeWISIoWP98) like document summarization and email writing, improving efficiency and communication across the organization.
- **Pepperdine University** can [generate](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-customers-use-gemini-google-workspace-focus-what-they-do-best) real-time translated captions in 60+ languages using Google Meet with Gemini, improving communication between members of its multi-lingual campus community.
- Google Workspace with Gemini has become “[a superpowered writing assistant](https://workspace.google.com/blog/events/cloud-next-recap-20-ways-our-customers-outdo-themselves?e=48754805)” for the **United Nations Population Fund**, where it can help a country director get the tone and formality right in an email to a government official, or a non-English speaker get their message across the way they want to.
- **ManTech**, a defense contracting firm that provides technology services to the U.S. government, [launched an advanced Google Workspace practice for secure AI-driven innovation](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/news-release/2024/01/24/2815213/7056/en/ManTech-Unveils-Advanced-Google-Workspace-Practice-for-Secure-AI-Driven-Innovation.html), allowing the organizations they support to “test drive the latest in generative AI and Google Workspace…”
- **Uniformed Services University** trains the U.S. military’s medical personnel and prepares them professionally and technically for the future of digital medicine. Using Google Workspace with Gemini, they were [able to support new ways of working](https://idcdocserv.com/US51995524), with 88% of pilot users reporting being more effective as what they do overall, including the acceleration of HR, academic, and proposal writing processes.

### **Retail, Lifestyle & Consumer Goods**

- Online retailer and innovator, **Wayfair**, [uses Google Workspace with Gemini to improve the productivity of employees and create better experiences](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/wayfair-and-google-cloud-announce-expanded-partnership-to-transform-online-retail-with-gemini-302348276.html) for them, whether it’s drafting and responding to emails, summarizing and proofreading documents, or building presentation templates. With Gemini for Workspace and [Gems](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/new-gemini-gems-deeper-knowledge-and-business-context?e=48754805), Wayfair has seen not only a boost to employee productivity, but enhanced collaboration, and improvements in creativity across the organization.
- **Sports Basement** cut its customer service team’s [email writing time](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NU5h3OYdbnQ) by 30%-35% using Google Workspace with Gemini, producing faster responses, happier employees, and better customer interactions.
- **Jacobsen Salt Co.** uses Gemini in Sheets to [organize the constantly-changing environmental data](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qAFMO0zBKVU) needed to produce high-quality, hand-harvested sea salt.
- **Cattlemen at Morgan Ranch**, a worldwide Wagyu beef supplier, carve [lengthy email writing down to just minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NUKY6_SM8mc&t=1s) with Gemini in Gmail, getting them back in the saddle faster.
- **Bison Coolers**' 12-person team punch above their weight by using Gemini in Docs to [write product descriptions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zU6X5IRt5DU) that help keep their small business thriving.
- **Delgado Guitars**, a family business selling handcrafted guitars, uses Gemini in Gmail to [send timely and personalized responses](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJrvJTe-4Vo) making it easier to keep sharing the family’s three generations of experience with musicians worldwide.
- **Nuts.com** uses Gemini in Meet's live translation to [communicate with suppliers worldwide](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-folsJnQMFI) and source the high-quality nuts they've provided since 1929.
- **Custard Stand Chili** co-founder Angie Cowger [refines her emails](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bq-J60EYb5M) with Gemini in Gmail to communicate effectively with retailers and share her family's hot dog chili nationwide.
- **3 Farm Daughters**, a family-owned pasta company, [writes social media](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pgDaThCFKNg) posts with help from Gemini in Docs, making it easier for the three sisters-turned-cofounders to balance family life with running a business.
- **Wisconsin Cheese Mart** uses Gemini in Docs to quickly write [online product descriptions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I18TD4GON8g) that inform a growing online customer base without taking time away from the hands-on in-store experience.
- **BLK & Bold**, a premium coffee company [simplifies and speeds the tedious task of budgeting](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L8Ctl1yoLIE) by asking Gemini in Sheets for help creating tables and importing data.
- **oogiebear**, a business specializing in baby breathing care products, uses Gemini in Gmail to quickly [respond to customers and vendors](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SwE5HIk8w4I), helping cofounder Dr. Nina Farzin juggle her dual roles of CEO and mom of three.
- **Woodward Throwbacks**, a furniture company that uses reclaimed wood, [tracks projects](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XoxqggoRTzo) with help from Gemini in Sheets, creating monthly or project-based trackers suited to the team’s needs with a single prompt.
- **The Village Store** [simplifies accounting](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6vnZ5a3kU54) for its two-person team with Gemini in Sheets, so they can get back to the hands-on work of running an old-town general store.
- **Mood Fabrics** [compares vendor proposals](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MCTEpXP-FxM) with Gemini in Gmail, making sure to never miss a detail while managing relations with 600+ vendors worldwide.
- **The Woobles** tracks inventory of its beginner crochet kits faster with Gemini in Sheets, easily [putting together forecasts](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9iQXPE0u77g) and run rates to make sure every Wooble finds a home.
- **Momentum Climbing Gym** uses Gemini in Meet to [summarize conversations](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EleXWxFhp8c) with their team members nationwide, keeping everyone on the same page as they reach for new heights.
- **Kindred Post** — a gift shop and community space in Juneau, Alaska — [forecasts inventory needs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJGihYRv1is) for tourist season with an intricate tracker made by Gemini in Sheets.
- Hawaii-based **T&C Surf Design** [writes radio copy](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZJ4ay0ZQPA0) with Gemini in Docs to help share the good vibes of 50+ years on the waves.
- **Down the Road Spice Co.** uses Gemini in Slides to [create designs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=23eirwc8jzU) promoting its spice blends, helping the family-owned business share their multi-generational recipes with the world.
- **Prados Beauty**'s founder Cecelia Meadows cuts her inbox clearing from six hours to two with help [summarizing and drafting emails](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nr9LdptoyGk) from Gemini in Gmail.
- **Sweet Talk Floral** [brings client ideas to life](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mUiFcWv2DiE) with help from Gemini in Slides, creating stunning mock-ups with minimal keywords.
- **Penny's Wine Shop** uses Gemini in Docs to [keep its community updated](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aJHtUWG_-EQ) with a monthly newsletter that's as exciting to read as it is easy to write.
- **No Limbits**, an adaptable apparel brand for people with disabilities, [predicts yearly inventory needs](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_bLo3hIzbYg) by analyzing sales data with Gemini in Sheets.
- **The NE Center for Circus Arts** uses Gemini in Sheets to [create schedules](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CC-zHNE0o6A) that juggle instructors' and students' busy days with ease.
- **Adore Me**’s marketers spend just 30 minutes a month — down from 30+ hours — [writing](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-customers-use-gemini-google-workspace-focus-what-they-do-best) differentiated product descriptions using Google Workspace with Gemini.
- **Grupo Dia**, a Spanish multinational supermarket chain founded in 1979, turned to Google Workspace to modernize collaboration and support non-technical teams with secure, cloud-native tools. Now, with Google Workspace with Gemini, they’re [streamlining workflows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KRdHZUfT1g8&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=10), from document analysis to competitive research, while maintaining full control over data privacy and sovereignty.

### **Technology**

- **ClearObject**, an AI service developer, enhances collaboration in its remote work environment by using Google Workspace with Gemini to [create](https://workspace.google.com/customers/clearobject) sales pitch decks and democratize content creation across teams.
- **Vimeo** [improves teamwork](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DXpaBKDcoww&list=PLBgogxgQVM9txN9onpAbB457h6ZMCiDMi&index=49) using Gemini in Meet, Docs, Sheets, and Slides. With automated summaries and note-taking, Google Workspace frees up employees to focus on creativity and collaboration.
- **WebFX** [increases](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-webfx-uses-duet-ai?e=48754805) its work quality by using Google Workspace with Gemini to brainstorm content ideas, write emails, and plan projects.
- **Replit** [uses](https://cloud.google.com/customers/repl-it) Google Cloud infrastructure, services, and foundation models via its software development AI, and gives Google Cloud and Workspace developers access to Replit’s collaborative code-editing platform.
- Cybersecurity company **NewPush** [improves security and efficiency](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nsnqXGv02bA&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs7TzYIldgGn7GjDC26yIRiv&index=2) using Google Workspace with Gemini, freeing up employees to focus on strategy and saving its analysts 12 hours a week by automating time-consuming tasks such as threat research and content creation.
- **Uber** [uses Google Workspace with Gemini](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/meaghanrsullivan_googlecloudnext-activity-7184791799129894912-v_Y2/) to save time on repetitive tasks, free up developers for higher-value work, reduce their agency spending, and to enhance employee retention.
- **Turing**, the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs, [harnessed the power of Gemini Gems](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/turing-transforming-hr-workflows-ai?e=48754805) to create career-focused AI assistants tailored to specific technical roles across the company, empowering team members to grow their skills in measurable ways.

Posted in

- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)
- [Customer Stories](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories)

## 82. Help, not hype: AI built for how you actually work

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/gemini-for-help-not-hype?hl=en

# Help, not hype: AI built for how you actually work

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/gemini-for-help-not-hype?hl=en

Product Announcements

# Help, not hype: AI built for how you actually work

May 15, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_BP_header.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Gemini_BP_header.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Pat McCarthy

VP of Google Workspace Sales

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

One of the best parts of my job is having the opportunity to speak directly with customers. And there’s one common thing I hear over and over again: the world feels noisy right now. Everywhere you turn, companies are shouting about the potential for AI to transform every facet of the workday. Amidst this constant buzz and the pressure to keep up, it's easy to feel overwhelmed and wonder: How can technology actually help us get work done?

At Google Workspace, we’ve taken a different approach. Our priority is to offer help, not hype, for how you actually work and the goals you’re driving. Whether you're racing toward a deadline, launching a new product, pitching to a customer, or staying connected with a global team — we believe technology should clear your path, not complicate it.

For over two decades, our goal hasn't just been building tools, but creating an interconnected suite of apps where millions connect, create, and achieve together. We design for ease of use, striving for an experience that isn't just mandated, but chosen, maybe even loved. It’s about removing friction and adding moments of delight — because when your apps work beautifully together it unlocks not just productivity, but more enjoyable, collaborative work.

### AI built to be truly helpful.

As AI reshapes our world, our focus sharpens: Make powerful technology genuinely useful, today. Make it accessible. Make it fit into your flow.

This is AI built for the reality of your everyday work, not some fantasy of the future. Here’s how Google Workspace with Gemini delivers real help, right now:

- **It's included so everyone benefits:** Powerful help shouldn't be locked behind pricing barriers. The best of Google AI, including the Gemini app and NotebookLM, is built in and included in Google Workspace plans. No extra cost. Simply there, ready to help every employee enhance their work.
- **It meets you where you are:** No switching apps, no disrupting your rhythm. We weave AI assistance seamlessly into the apps you already use – Gmail, Docs, Meet, and more. Intelligence embedded precisely where you make decisions and get your work done.
- **It amplifies your potential:** It’s here to help you do more of what you love, less of what you don’t. Gemini tackles the tedious – summarizing threads, drafting communications, organizing information – freeing your mind (for nearly two hours a week!) for creativity, focus, and impact. It’s your tireless collaborator enabling your success.
- **It improves collaboration:** Break down barriers. Gemini enhances collaboration by summarizing meetings, offering real-time translation in meetings, and even acting as a helpful teammate to capture action items or find information. Teamwork, supercharged.
- **It unlocks insights instantly:** You don't need to be a researcher or data scientist to understand what matters. From the complex to the mundane, Gemini helps analyze, synthesize, and unlock key insights from your documents, spreadsheets, and other sources quickly.

### Rapid innovation, built on trust.

What makes this all possible? We build and manage the entire AI stack — foundational research, custom-designed TPUs, industry-leading models, a secure-by-design infrastructure, and the Workspace apps used by more than 11 million customers. This lets us innovate faster, delivering a responsive AI that fits naturally into your workflow. At the same time, it provides the foundation for trust: helping to ensure your data remains protected and under your control. Our privacy, safety, and security commitments and practices for Workspace with Gemini are validated by independent, trusted auditors, and we’re ready to help you meet stringent regulatory requirements, such as HIPAA and FedRAMP High. Take a deeper look in our [technical whitepaper](https://workspace.google.com/learning/content/gemini-privacy-security-compliance-whitepaper).

### We choose help over hype.

Including advanced AI capabilities in our Workspace plans isn't just a feature update; it's our belief in action. AI is essential, and its power belongs in the hands of everyone doing the work, which is why we’re seeing over 2 billion AI assists with Workspace business users each month. We're committed to practical innovation that helps you work smarter and achieve more day in and day out. Because how you work truly matters.

Explore what Google Workspace with Gemini can do for your organization. [Start your no-cost trial](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome) today and experience the difference yourself.

## 83. How AI is giving small businesses a major advantage

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/how-ai-is-giving-small-businesses-a-major-advantage?hl=en

# How AI is giving small businesses a major advantage

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/how-ai-is-giving-small-businesses-a-major-advantage?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# How AI is giving small businesses a major advantage

May 13, 2026

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522i_GWS_AI_small_business_advantage_Blog.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522i_GWS_AI_small_business_advantage_Blog.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Lisa Gevelber

Founder of Grow with Google

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

Every year, Google’s Economic Impact Report tracks how our tools — including AI — help Americans build careers and businesses. In 2025, over 19.5 million U.S. businesses used our tools to reach new customers, and we’ve trained over 13 million Americans in digital skills, including 400,000 graduates from Google Career Certificates.

According to the U.S. Chamber of Commerce, more than 80% of small businesses using AI reported higher sales, increased profits, and larger teams in 2025. AI is helping small businesses save time, spot important trends, improve service, and enter new markets.

Reading through our latest impact report, I was struck by the stories of small business owners using AI to thrive. Here are three that really stood out:

### **Jamie’s Farm Granola in New York**

Jamie Kim’s granola journey started in her college dorm kitchen, and today, it’s in over 300 stores. She’s growing 40% year-over-year by slow-baking her granola with ghee.

Putting AI to work:

- **Gemini** helps her organize her stock-tracking, saving her 20 hours a week on paperwork.
- **Nano Banana** helps her design website backgrounds and test out new packaging looks, making it easier to share ideas with stores.
- **NotebookLM** helps her quickly find answers in long, complicated store manuals, preventing costly shipping or labeling mistakes.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_NY_Schaefer_126450_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_NY_Schaefer_126450_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_NY_Schaefer_126450_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_NY_Schaefer_126450_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

### **PlaygroundEquipment.com in Greenfield, Indiana**

Nic Breedlove and his father, Victor, launched a playscapes business in 2006 and today they supply schools, parks, and cities all over the country with play structures and design services. They serve around 6,000 customers a year through an expansive network of distributors and their revenue grew 18% last year alone.

Putting AI to work:

- **Google Workspace with Gemini** helps them manage files, track inventory, and analyze data for financial reporting or from meetings.
- **Gemini** helps them produce four new case studies a month and then repurpose those into 80 videos and 160 social posts.
- **Gemini** helps the 3D design team brainstorm materials, spot missing design elements, and build a custom rendering tool.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_IN-Thompson-0322_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_IN-Thompson-0322_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_IN-Thompson-0322_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_IN-Thompson-0322_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

### **321 Foto in Seattle, Washington**

Marilee Kimball founded 321 Foto to turn photo booths into creative spaces for connection. It has grown from a single booth to a boutique agency handling over 500 events a year.

Putting AI to work:

- **Gemini and Nano Banana** help turn event photos into creative art — from digital bugs for a pest control company to '80s video game characters.
- **Gemini** summarizes meetings and tracks next steps.
- A custom **Gem** stores the company’s brand voice and knowledge, acting as a handy team reference.

"What excites me most is how these tools open up new possibilities," Marilee says. "They let us mix photography, art, and tech to create something truly unique."

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_WA-Wilder-89_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_WA-Wilder-89_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_WA-Wilder-89_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Copy_of_WA-Wilder-89_V1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

[Read the full report](https://economicimpact.google/) to discover more stories about how American small businesses are using AI to grow.
