first\_page

#### Human resources

As an HR professional, you're the backbone of your organisation, and you deal with a large volume of confidential and sensitive information. You shape company culture, find and nurture talent and ensure a positive employee experience. These are no small feats.

This section provides you with simple ways to integrate prompts in your day-to-day tasks.

###### Getting started

First, review the general prompt-writing tips in the [How to write effective prompts](/intl/en_uk/resources/ai/writing-effective-prompts/) section.

Each prompt below is presented with an accompanying scenario to serve as inspiration for how you can collaborate with Gemini for Google Workspace. The prompt iteration example shows how you could write follow-up prompts to build on the initial generated response.

###### Prompt iteration example

Use case:

Welcome new employees

You're an HR manager working on a presentation script. You have a Google Doc full of notes, bullet points and topics that you would like to cover. You begin by opening your Google Doc with notes and you prompt Gemini in Docs.

- Legend
- Persona
- Task
- Context
- Format

I am an HR manager,

and I am developing a script for my presentation for new hires.

I need to create the script for an onboarding presentation about our companyâs commitment to employee development and well-being.

Help me draft talking points that showcase why employee mentorship and development are core values for our company using @[Mission Statement and Core Values].

I am an HR manager,

and I am developing a script for my presentation for new hires.

I need to create the script for an onboarding presentation about our companyâs commitment to employee development and well-being.

Help me draft talking points that showcase why employee mentorship and development are core values for our company using @[Mission Statement and Core Values].

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

![An HR manager prompts Gemini in Docs for talking points for an onboarding presentation. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/TNP67qOZ6pF4LFQYEvQkVpNwQRFlmW-7Rm1jhj4iJAbAOwqzh7hyZh6eBOCuS4FODbuLyXNn6vsSwxHgKWj_NXYmSjJQRfbohF2U=e365-pa-nu-rw-w1368)

![An HR manager prompts Gemini in Docs for talking points for an onboarding presentation. Gemini in Docs drafts the talking points.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/fKNetZIFcvPVd5ToMyUJAcPQXozyzygSZ7ggWsLXy8_kFfFxmWXYvOVmd-0gi1ChKk27R25SOK-quoF9w8TWw2U2BLHqEAfptZw6=e365-pa-nu-rw-w1368)

You select **Insert**. Now, you want to add more targeted talking points. You type:

- Legend
- Task
- Context
- Format

Add four talking points

for a new section of the presentation script that explains how we support our employeesâ development.

Mention our training and certification programs and mentorship opportunities using

@[Learning and Development Paths],

and write a strong closing statement

about our expectation that everyone contributes to a respectful and welcoming workplace.

Use a professional tone.

Add four talking points

for a new section of the presentation script that explains how we support our employeesâ development.

Mention our training and certification programs and mentorship opportunities using

@[Learning and Development Paths],

and write a strong closing statement

about our expectation that everyone contributes to a respectful and welcoming workplace.

Use a professional tone.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

You add in more details and then you're ready to create a draft of the Google Slides that will accompany your talking points.

###### Example use cases

---

Recruiter

Use case:

Report on recruitment metrics

The business is growing, and you have a large hiring effort underway. You want to see a holistic view of how your hiring efforts are going. You open your Google Sheet and prompt Gemini in the Sheets side panel. You type:

Help me create a formula to calculate the total total number of [hires] by [department].

Help me create a formula to calculate the total total number of [hires] by [department].

Copied to clipboard.

![Sheets](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/sheets_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Sheets

You continue your conversation by prompting additional questions. You type:

In what month did we hire the most people?

In what month did we hire the most people?

Copied to clipboard.

![Sheets](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/sheets_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Sheets

You continue with your line of questions until you feel ready to write your report.

Use case:

Manage the recruiting process

You want to brainstorm potential ways that the company can better manage the recruiting process. You open the team's Google Doc with recruiting strategies. You prompt Gemini in the Docs side panel. You type:

Create a list of strategies our recruiters can use to improve our existing recruiting process and identify potential job candidates.

Create a list of strategies our recruiters can use to improve our existing recruiting process and identify potential job candidates.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

After creating a short recommendation for leadership on how the team will improve existing recruiting processes, the team receives guidance for a job opening for a content marketing manager. You open a new Doc and prompt Gemini in Docs. You type:

I am opening a new job position on the marketing team. Write a compelling role description for a content marketing manager. Highlight key responsibilities [insert] and requirements, including B2B and B2C content creation, a minimum of five years experience, and a portfolio of writing examples.

I am opening a new job position on the marketing team. Write a compelling role description for a content marketing manager. Highlight key responsibilities [insert] and requirements, including B2B and B2C content creation, a minimum of five years experience, and a portfolio of writing examples.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

Use case:

Manage the interview process

You want to prepare questions for phone screen interviews. You decide to prepare by using the Gemini app. You upload the relevant file and type:

I am a recruiter, and I am preparing for candidate interviews. Using the job description in the file Iâm uploading, write a list of 20 open-ended interview questions that I can use to screen candidates.

I am a recruiter, and I am preparing for candidate interviews. Using the job description in the file Iâm uploading, write a list of 20 open-ended interview questions that I can use to screen candidates.

Copied to clipboard.

![Gemini app](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gemini_2025/v1/web-96dp/logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png)

Gemini app

Use case:

Communicate with candidates

The team has made its hiring decisions. You open the Google Doc with notes on each candidate. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

I am writing an email to a job candidate who just finished the interview process. Create a template for an offer letter for the [selected candidate] for the [position] with a request to schedule a call to discuss benefits, compensation, and start date.

I am writing an email to a job candidate who just finished the interview process. Create a template for an offer letter for the [selected candidate] for the [position] with a request to schedule a call to discuss benefits, compensation, and start date.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

Now, you want to generate personalised, empathetic email copy to send to the job candidates who will not receive an offer. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

I am writing an email to job candidates who finished the interview process, but who were not selected. Help me write a rejection letter for [candidate] for the [position]. Use an empathetic tone.

I am writing an email to job candidates who finished the interview process, but who were not selected. Help me write a rejection letter for [candidate] for the [position]. Use an empathetic tone.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

HR Manager

Use case:

Conduct employee engagement and satisfaction surveys

You are in charge of building a survey that will go out to all employees. You want to brainstorm ideas on questions to ask. You visit the Gemini app and type:

I am an HR manager in charge of running our enterprise-wide survey at [company] to gauge employee engagement and satisfaction. Generate a list of questions I can use to build the survey.

I am an HR manager in charge of running our enterprise-wide survey at [company] to gauge employee engagement and satisfaction. Generate a list of questions I can use to build the survey.

Copied to clipboard.

![Gemini app](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gemini_2025/v1/web-96dp/logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png)

Gemini app

Your company has completed its annual employee engagement and satisfaction survey. Now, you want to clean up the data before you analyse it. You go to the Gemini app, upload the relevant file and type:

Help me clean my employee survey spreadsheet. Specifically, fill any blank values in the name column with "Anonymous," and if the region column shows Headquarters, replace that with HQ. Finally, remove any rows where the satisfaction column is blank. Please generate a new file for me with my cleaned data.

Help me clean my employee survey spreadsheet. Specifically, fill any blank values in the name column with "Anonymous," and if the region column shows Headquarters, replace that with HQ. Finally, remove any rows where the satisfaction column is blank. Please generate a new file for me with my cleaned data.

Copied to clipboard.

![Gemini app](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gemini_2025/v1/web-96dp/logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png)

Gemini app

Use case:

Create individualised learning and development plans

You have all of your company's learning resources stored in your Google Drive. For each new hire, you want to create a tailored learning and development plan. To do this, you prompt Gemini in the Drive side panel. You type:

Create a personalized learning and development plan for a new hire who needs to learn about [topic]. Organize it by day and suggest relevant files.

Create a personalized learning and development plan for a new hire who needs to learn about [topic]. Organize it by day and suggest relevant files.

Copied to clipboard.

![Drive](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/drive_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Drive

Use case:

Onboard employees

The recruiters have just filled the company's two open roles. Now, you're in charge of ensuring that the candidates have a smooth onboarding experience. You need help in structuring information for the new hires, so you open a Google Sheet and prompt Gemini in the Sheets side panel. You type:

Create a table that outlines a new employeeâs first-week schedule, including key meetings, training sessions, and introductions. Provide a column for key contacts and priority level (low, medium, high) for each activity.

Create a table that outlines a new employeeâs first-week schedule, including key meetings, training sessions, and introductions. Provide a column for key contacts and priority level (low, medium, high) for each activity.

Copied to clipboard.

![Sheets](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/sheets_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Sheets

Gemini in Sheets returns a formatted Google Sheet that you can now fill in with key contacts, meetings and activities. The conditional formatting makes it easy for you to sort tasks by priority level with colour-coded visual cues. Next, you need to create ways for the team to bond. You open a new Google Doc and prompt Gemini in the Docs side panel. You type:

Design a team-bonding activity, such as an office scavenger hunt, to have team members work together during their team meeting.

Design a team-bonding activity, such as an office scavenger hunt, to have team members work together during their team meeting.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

Gemini in Docs provides suggestions that help you brainstorm about the scavenger hunt. You tweak the outputs and get the idea approved by the team lead. Now, you need to communicate with the new hires about their first day when they will meet the team. You open Gmail and prompt Gemini in Gmail by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Draft an email to the new employees on the [team] to meet the rest of their team and explain the team-building purposes of the meeting.

Draft an email to the new employees on the [team] to meet the rest of their team and explain the team-building purposes of the meeting.

Copied to clipboard.

![Gmail](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gmail_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Gmail

Use case:

Communicate key findings and draft follow-up surveys

Now that you've finished onboarding new employees, you need to focus on ensuring that the latest company research data is easily understood by leadership. You're committed to creating a welcoming environment for all employees where they can develop their skills. You open the Google Doc with the finalised report. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Draft an email to senior leadership that summarizes the key findings from our [report]. Include a short introductory paragraph with bullet points on the most important findings.

Draft an email to senior leadership that summarizes the key findings from our [report]. Include a short introductory paragraph with bullet points on the most important findings.

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

Gemini in Docs returns a summary with bullet points. You edit it and then use it to email the leadership team. As a follow-up action, you want to understand how changes made to company policies impact the employee experience. You open Gemini in Docs to begin drafting a survey. You select **Help me write** and type:

Draft an anonymous employee survey with questions and answer options to monitor company progress on [topics].

Draft an anonymous employee survey with questions and answer options to monitor company progress on [topics].

Copied to clipboard.

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

first\_page

#### Project management

As the conductor of complex, ever-evolving projects, your mission is to navigate timelines, coordinate teams, and ensure your programs deliver the intended impact.

This section provides you with simple ways to integrate prompts in your daily tasks.

###### Getting started

First, review the general prompt-writing tips in the â[How to write effective prompts](/resources/ai/writing-effective-prompts/)â section.

Each prompt below is presented with an accompanying scenario to serve as inspiration for how you can collaborate with Gemini for Google Workspace. The prompt iteration example shows how you could write follow-up prompts to build on the initial generated response.

###### Prompt iteration example

Use case:

Generate user acceptance tests

Your team completed the registration form for a new website, and now you need to generate user acceptance tests (UATs). To start, you visit the Gemini app and type:

- Legend
- Task
- Context

Create a table with 10 user acceptance tests (UAT)

for the website registration form.

Create a table with 10 user acceptance tests (UAT)

for the website registration form.

Copied to clipboard!

![Gemini app](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gemini_2025/v1/web-96dp/logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png)

Gemini app

![A project manager prompts Gemini for 10 user acceptance tests. Gemini returns a table with the tests. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/9fRBdFZt3d9rDvYoDN9iCCIAysYM_PDWpV2vViJ9BPd-h6d2SNzqKBrmAxvxDm_L3hBxkI0CB5qCN1BH3NkU4KDNi57_NaedlrgI=e365-pa-nu-rw-w1368)

You think the results are a helpful starting point, so you copy the results to a Google Sheet before drafting an email to your colleague who is running the UATs. You want to explain what they need to do. You continue your conversation with the Gemini app. You type:

- Legend
- Task
- Context

Draft an email

to [my colleague] who is running this UAT and explain what they need to do next.

Draft an email

to [my colleague] who is running this UAT and explain what they need to do next.

Copied to clipboard!

![Gemini app](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gemini_2025/v1/web-96dp/logo_gemini_2025_color_2x_web_96dp.png)

Gemini app

![The project manager prompts Gemini for an email explaining next steps with the user acceptance tests. Gemini drafts an email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/kjprtDURJVPsMi6rRFhZez9euFciigbxRmv7kQ9CrzrMar1NePhuFoAbUnGcTeqANGpjvbRA5hND70R9DtJroZpmJeKEDmF7lLkt=e365-pa-nu-rw-w1368)

The drafted email provides a helpful starting point, so you export the results to Gmail, and you make edits directly before sending the message to your colleague.

###### Example use cases

---

Project manager

Use case:

Report on project status

You just had a lengthy call with all of your project stakeholders, and now you want to summarize what was discussed and follow up with assigned action items. In the Google Doc with the meeting transcript, you prompt Gemini in Docs. You type:

Summarize this call transcript in a short paragraph. In bullet points, highlight the action items, decisions made, and owners for each item based off of [call transcript].

Summarize this call transcript in a short paragraph. In bullet points, highlight the action items, decisions made, and owners for each item based off of [call transcript].

Copied to clipboard!

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

You need to update your manager based on the activity from the last call. You want to templatize how your project status updates are delivered. You open a new Google Doc, and you prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Draft a project status update email template to send to my manager. Include sections for a summary of key accomplishments this week, any challenges faced, and the top three priorities for next week.

Draft a project status update email template to send to my manager. Include sections for a summary of key accomplishments this week, any challenges faced, and the top three priorities for next week.

Copied to clipboard!

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

The team just hit its key milestones an entire week early. Itâs been a challenging project, so you want to gather everyone to celebrate together. You open Gmail and prompt Gemini in Gmail by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Write an invitation for a team lunch to celebrate the progress made on a project and include [date, time, and location]. Thank them for all of their hard work and acknowledge that this has been a challenging project.

Write an invitation for a team lunch to celebrate the progress made on a project and include [date, time, and location]. Thank them for all of their hard work and acknowledge that this has been a challenging project.

Copied to clipboard!

![Gmail](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/gmail_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Gmail

Use case:

Create a project retrospectiveÂ

Youâve just wrapped the project, and your senior leadership team needs a project retrospective. To kick-start the process of gathering feedback, you open a Google Doc and prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write.** You type:Â

I need to write a report detailing the successes, failures, and lessons learned from [project]. Draft a list of 20 questions to guide a cross-team process investigation. Include questions to uncover what worked, what didnât, specific process breakdowns, technical issues, communication gaps, or any other potential contributing factors to the problem or success of the project.

I need to write a report detailing the successes, failures, and lessons learned from [project]. Draft a list of 20 questions to guide a cross-team process investigation. Include questions to uncover what worked, what didnât, specific process breakdowns, technical issues, communication gaps, or any other potential contributing factors to the problem or success of the project.

Copied to clipboard!

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

The questions give you a great starting place. You edit them before sharing with the team for their input. After you gather everyoneâs feedback, you want help structuring the report. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write.** You type:Â

Summarize this document in two paragraphs. Include high-level information about the projectâs goals, the main contributors, the outcomes of the project, and any key successes or failures.

Summarize this document in two paragraphs. Include high-level information about the projectâs goals, the main contributors, the outcomes of the project, and any key successes or failures.

Copied to clipboard!

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

Use case:

Develop an issue tracker and related communications

You need to create a project issue tracker to keep track of risks and solve them in a timely manner. You want to create a template quickly, so you open a new Google Sheet and prompt Gemini in the Sheets side panel. You type:

Create a spreadsheet to track project issues, including descriptions, status, assigned owner, and action items for resolution.

Create a spreadsheet to track project issues, including descriptions, status, assigned owner, and action items for resolution.

Copied to clipboard!

![Sheets](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/sheets_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Sheets

Before the project fully kicks off, you want to have standardized communication templates at your disposal. For example, you want an email that can be used if an issue arises. You open a new Google Doc and prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Draft an email template to announce when an issue arises and include causes, solutions, and timelines to resolve it.

Draft an email template to announce when an issue arises and include causes, solutions, and timelines to resolve it.

Copied to clipboard!

![Docs](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/productlogos/docs_2026/v2/web/192px.svg)

Gemini in Docs

You like the template that Gemini in Docs creates, and you want to create an additional, slightly different email template. In the same Google Doc, you prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting **Help me write**. You type:

Draft an email template to a stakeholder to escalate a critical project issue, outlining the impact and proposed solution.

Draft an email template to a stakeholder to escalate a critical project issue, outlining the impact and proposed solution.

Technical project manager

Use case:

Create a workback schedule

You are the technical project manager for a software release. You already have the scope of the project documented. Now, you want to get started on building a workstream tracker and workback schedule. You go to the Gemini app and type:

I am a [technical project manager] at [company] overseeing [project and brief project description]. The project has the following scope: [scope]. Our project goals are: [project goals]. Our project deliverables are: [project deliverables]. Our budget is [budget], and our delivery date is [delivery date]. Help me create a workback schedule to keep the team on track. Include dates for key milestones and demos.

## 119. Questrade Financial Group transforms productivity using Google Workspace with Gemini

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/questrade-financial-group-transforms-productivity-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

# Questrade Financial Group transforms productivity using Google Workspace with Gemini

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/questrade-financial-group-transforms-productivity-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Questrade Financial Group transforms productivity using Google Workspace with Gemini

July 25, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questrade_Gemini_Hero_image.max-2500x2500.jpeg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questrade_Gemini_Hero_image.max-2500x2500.jpeg)

##### Adel Majumder

Senior Manager of Organization Learning, Development and Change, Questrade

##### Angela Mpala

Brand Manager, Questrade

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

“Our two- to three-year goals now feel more like six-month goals, because Gemini helps us work smarter, compress timelines, and bring our objectives nearer.”

**Snapshot:**Questrade Financial Group, a Canadian group of companies, adopted Gemini to increase productivity and improve our competitive edge. With it, we are:

- Increasing efficiency, **enabling employees to focus on strategic initiatives**
- **Democratizing content creation and coding**

- **Saving hours of time** enabling business users to build solutions in AppSheet, with the help of Gemini

- **Saving two days of writing time per blog**with Gems

  ---

### The mission and challenge

[Questrade Financial Group](https://www.questrade.com/) provides securities and foreign currency investment, professionally managed investment portfolios, mortgages, insurance, real estate services, financial services, and more, in pursuit of our mission to help Canadians become more financially successful. Our innovative, customer-centric approach allows us to offer better, simpler, and more cost-effective ways for our customers to take control of their money.

We’re innovative with our technology, too, both to provide better services to our customers and to improve how we work, which is why we adopted [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/) as our productivity and collaboration platform in 2019. When the pandemic hit, Workspace put us ahead of the curve. The platform empowered our employees to communicate, collaborate, and work effectively to continue delivering the financial services our customers expect.

Having established a strong collaborative foundation in Workspace, we continued to explore new technologies to give us a competitive edge. We soon realized that embedding generative AI into our operations was the logical next step. As a financial services organization, we take the security of our data incredibly seriously, so we needed a solution that would keep our data private and secure. The fact that [Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/) wouldn’t use our data to train its models gave us the confidence that we could use it securely and our data would remain our own.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questraders_working_together_on_a_project.max-2100x2100.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questraders_working_together_on_a_project.max-2100x2100.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questraders_working_together_on_a_project.max-2100x2100.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Questraders_working_together_on_a_project.max-2100x2100.jpg)

Questrade appointed a group of AI Innovators to guide new users on how to use Gemini

### The switch to Gemini

We implemented Gemini for its potential to transform how our teams work and deliver even more effective services for our customers. By working with cloud solutions consultancy and Google Premier Partner [SADA](https://sada.com/), An Insight company, we were able to speed up the launch of our pilot. We joined the Gemini early adopter program and gave access to a select group of tech-forward pioneers from across the organization, who became our Questrade AI Innovators. To ensure a smooth and successful trial experience for these Gemini early adopters, SADA implemented a comprehensive change management program. This program included multiple training sessions, answering our users’ questions during office hours, weekly tips and videos, engaging trial participants in a dedicated Google Chat space, and collecting responses from surveys to let us measure our progress in Gemini adoption. This helped prove the value of the tool, enabling us to roll out Gemini with confidence across the company.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_image.max-2200x2200_SAOXBba.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_image.max-2200x2200_SAOXBba.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_image.max-2200x2200_SAOXBba.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_image.max-2200x2200_SAOXBba.jpg)

Questrade uses Gemini to Streamline tasks, allowing staff to focus on strategic initiatives

Our internal AI enablement and change team provided invaluable support as we did so. We also leveraged the expertise of our AI Innovators to guide our new Gemini users. To ensure relevance for all, we developed custom training tailored to each department. These sessions covered essential topics like prompt engineering, included role-play scenarios specifically for our mortgage team, and demonstrated how our executive team could utilize Gemini to extract instant insights from complex financial statements.

Employees now use Gemini to streamline time-consuming and repetitive tasks, giving them more time to focus on strategic initiatives. For example, teams use Gemini to generate speaker notes for [Google Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/slides/) presentations, brainstorm ideas, conduct comprehensive research, and summarize lengthy documents. They also use it to synthesize information from various files on [Google Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/drive/), saving them considerable time when searching  for relevant material. Meanwhile, when employees need to consume lengthy reports, they can use [NotebookLM](https://notebooklm.google.com/) to generate an engaging audio version of the material, which they can listen to while performing other tasks, boosting their productivity.

Gemini has also helped us  enhance how we communicate. Employees use [Gems](https://blog.google/products/gemini/google-gemini-update-may-2024/#personalize-gems) to write content—a blog post, for example, that might have previously taken two days to research and write can now be drafted in a couple of hours. Meanwhile, users with English as a second language use Gemini to quickly draft English-language emails without worrying about making mistakes, which puts them on an equal footing with native English speakers. Gemini democratizes coding too, enabling less technical users to easily create intelligent applications with [AppSheet](https://cloud.google.com/appsheet?hl=en), helping build solutions and workflows that would previously have taken hours in a matter of minutes.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Google_Workspace_Blog_Hero_images_7.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Google_Workspace_Blog_Hero_images_7.max-2200x2200.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Google_Workspace_Blog_Hero_images_7.max-2200x2200.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Google_Workspace_Blog_Hero_images_7.max-2200x2200.png)

Questrade offers customized training sessions to enable every department to make the most of Gemini

### Looking ahead

As we expand and explore our use of Gemini, we continue to offer customized training sessions to our teams to ensure every department can make the most of this technology’s potential. We’re building on existing use cases, such as our generation of audio content with NotebookLM, and creating more Gems to increase our creativity and productivity. At the same time, we’re excited to discover new and exciting use cases to increase productivity and efficiency and enable our staff to focus more time on strategic and client-facing initiatives.

While we’re still early in our adoption of Gemini, as we look to the future, it’s rapidly changing our sense of what’s possible. Our two- to three-year goals now feel more like six-month goals, because Gemini helps us work smarter, compress timelines, and bring our objectives nearer. Ultimately, Gemini empowers us to dream bigger as an organization, making it a very exciting time for Questrade.

Posted in

- [Customer Stories](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories)
- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

## 120. Scale AI adoption with AI Boost Bootcamp

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/scale-ai-adoption-with-ai-boost-bootcamp?hl=en

# Scale AI adoption with AI Boost Bootcamp

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/scale-ai-adoption-with-ai-boost-bootcamp?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# Scale AI adoption with AI Boost Bootcamp

April 8, 2026

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/26836_WS_Boost_Bites_AI_Skilling_Blog_Hero.max-2600x2600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/26836_WS_Boost_Bites_AI_Skilling_Blog_Hero.max-2600x2600.png)

##### Deanne Chen

Google Workspace with Gemini Product Marketing Manager

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

To help your teams upskill and get more from their AI tools, we’re introducing [AI Boost Bootcamp](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1674), a new training series available on [Google Skills](http://skills.google/) — our new home for AI learning and more. The training is designed to:

- Accelerate AI and agentic work transformation by training your teams in under 50 minutes.
- Make it easier to track your progress on Google Skills.

### **Closing the AI skills gap**

Buying AI tools is easy; integrating them into your teams’ daily work to fuel transformation is the real hurdle. According to a [recent Deloitte study](https://www.deloitte.com/us/en/what-we-do/capabilities/applied-artificial-intelligence/content/state-of-ai-in-the-enterprise.html), closing the AI skills gap is now a top priority, with 53% of companies investing in AI fluency and 48% on upskilling workers for applying AI in their roles.

We designed the AI Boost Bootcamp series to help close that gap, allowing teams to scale AI learning and adoption across their entire organizations. We’re kicking off the series with a course that’s designed for knowledge workers: [**How to Use Gemini at Work 101**](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1674). Here’s what is covers:

- Overview and how to find Gemini across Google's tools for work
- Project management and planning with Gemini and NotebookLM
- Presentations and charts with Gemini in Slides, Sheets, and more
- Aligning stakeholders across meetings with AI notetaking, scheduling, and more
- Communicating with speed and precision using *Help Me Write* in Gmail, and Gemini Gems for repetitive tasks
- Getting started with AI agents and agentic work with Gemini Enterprise

### **How we designed the course**

AI Boost Bootcamp is based on Google’s own proven, internal training and builds on [AI Boost Bites](https://cloud.google.com/transform/introducing-ai-boost-bites-from-google?e=48754805), which offers quick, actionable tips on AI productivity. We heard from customers that they’re looking for AI best practices bundled as a concise, practical learning journey. AI Boost Bootcamp covers the most important knowledge you need to make the most of Google’s AI tools for work, such as Google Workspace with Gemini, NotebookLM, the Gemini app, and Gemini Enterprise.

### **Track progress and earn credentials**

For a structured learning experience, every learner can track their progress and test their knowledge on [**Google Skills**](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1674). When they’ve successfully completed the series, they’ll earn an official skill badge to share on social media to showcase their proficiency.

Help your whole team amplify their potential with [AI Boost Bootcamp](https://www.skills.google/course_templates/1674).

## 121. Supporting our EU customers with their DPIAs: Google's commitment to privacy and security with Google Workspace with Gemini

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/dpia-support-for-google-workspace-with-gemini?hl=en

# Supporting our EU customers with their DPIAs: Google's commitment to privacy and security with Google Workspace with Gemini

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/dpia-support-for-google-workspace-with-gemini?hl=en

Identity and Security

# Supporting our EU customers with their DPIAs: Google's commitment to privacy and security with Google Workspace with Gemini

August 25, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GWS_Blog_header_Digital_sovereignty_no_tit.max-2500x2500_8hm3i3K.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/GWS_Blog_header_Digital_sovereignty_no_tit.max-2500x2500_8hm3i3K.png)

##### David Lee

Group Product Manager, Google Workspace

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

At Google, user privacy and security are foundational to everything we do, especially when it comes to generative AI. We are more committed than ever to ensuring users feel safe and confident when using Google Workspace with Gemini, a dedication reinforced by our [intention to sign the European Union AI Act Code of Practice](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/identity-security/google-clouds-commitment-to-eu-ai-act-support?e=0).

We understand that new technologies may require that customers carry out Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs), which can be complex. Drawing on our substantial experience in supporting customer DPIAs, including our [successful assessments](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/eu-public-sector-dutch-approval-and-new-capabilities) in the Netherlands, we are firmly committed to helping customers with their compliance journeys.

To support this, we've published a new DPIA resource: [Supporting Your Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) for Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/learning/content/gemini-dpia-support-guide). This support guide is designed to assist your organization in preparing your DPIAs for Gemini in Workspace apps and the standalone Gemini app, supplementing our existing [DPIA Cloud Resource Center](https://cloud.google.com/privacy/data-protection-impact-assessment?e=0). While your organization, as the data controller, is responsible for conducting the DPIA, this support guide provides valuable information to help you complete yours.

Here are some key highlights from the new support guide, intended to provide information on Gemini's security and privacy features for addressing potential risks:

- **Foundational security:** Gemini automatically applies Google Workspace data handling practices, keeping customer data within your tenant, and employs a layered defense strategy against various attack vectors. We also adhere to [ISO/IEC 42001](https://cloud.google.com/security/compliance/iso-42001?e=0&hl=en) for AI Management Systems.
- **Robust data protection:** Gemini integrates with Workspace controls like [trust rules](https://support.google.com/a/answer/10621317?hl=en), [Information Rights Management (IRM)](https://support.google.com/a/answer/9656855?product_name=UnuFlow&sjid=16230191034105272886-NA&visit_id=638762643105374618-2259026318&rd=1&src=supportwidget0#irmfaq&zippy=%2Cdoes-gemini-respect-dlp-irm-policies), and [Client-Side Encryption (CSE)](https://support.google.com/a/answer/10741897?hl=en).
- **Granular controls:** Administrators have [extensive controls](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15698295) to enable/disable Gemini features and manage conversation history.
- **Risk mitigation:** Gemini comes with [built-in](https://support.google.com/a/answer/16118940?sjid=11504695768799864288-NA) protections to mitigate AI-specific risks like hallucinations, biases, and prompt injections, and includes prominent end-user warnings to double-check outputs.
- **Monitoring:** Google Workspace provides tools for administrators to monitor [Gemini usage and activity](https://developers.google.com/workspace/admin/reports/v1/appendix/activity/gemini-in-workspace-apps) through reports and audit logs.
- **Enterprise contractual commitments:** Gemini in Workspace apps and the Gemini app are [Workspace Core Services](https://workspace.google.com/terms/user_features/) by default, meaning they automatically benefit from our robust contract terms, including the [Cloud Data Processing Addendum](https://cloud.google.com/terms/data-processing-addendum). This means that you control your data and Google does not use Customer Data in Google Workspace services, including Gemini, for advertising purposes, among other [enterprise privacy commitments](https://cloud.google.com/privacy?e=0).

By leveraging Google's comprehensive controls and implementing your own policies and best practices, you can confidently deploy Workspace with Gemini while maintaining a strong security posture and ensuring data protection.

We encourage you to explore the new DPIA support guide today!

Posted in

- [Identity and Security](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security)
- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)

For customers undertaking Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs) concerning the use of Gemini in Workspace and Gemini app within your organizations, we are making available the information and other resources set out in this support guide to help you complete the DPIA for your use of Gemini. It supplements and can be used together with our [DPIA Resource Center](https://cloud.google.com/privacy/data-protection-impact-assessment).

Enter your information and click "Download" to access a detailed support guide outlining how Gemini has been designed to protect your Customer Data and supplemental information to assist your organization in preparing for your DPIA.

## 123. The real impact of AI at work

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

# The real impact of AI at work

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

![Google Gemini Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-473ShPjmRqoqrHHWswK8q3-965cf19f896b503831bdbcfbf917b9db-Spark_Static_LOOP_LottieWorking_Compressed__1_.gif)

# The real impact of AI at work

Discover how the worldâs leading organizations have transformed everyday work â shifting from hype to measurable impact with AI.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-CA)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-business_transformation-hero-en-CA)

[Highlights](#highlights)

[Customer Success](#customers)

[Resources](#resources)

## Moving beyond AI optimism

Our global survey reveals that although employees are all-in on AI, executive optimism outpaces reality on the ground. Discover how leading organizations are truly transforming work with AI, moving beyond time savings to boosting innovation, creativity, and accelerating business outcomes.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-CA)

![Graph demonstrating the real impact AI adoption is having on the workplace.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YVSM4HQZBE92cdq_mLs63pLu5RWBs_4Un_DAc0i6IQL-sRZrzC_jZ7CVPR5UfikZ43xdazP_EKQorggz87unp_l4cjl5CuvYoLL-YQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-CA)

72%

Nearly three quarters of orgs are in the early stages of AI transformation.

2X

Highly transformed orgs are more than two times likely to report a boost in innovation, creativity, and business acceleration.

84%

Surveyed knowledge workers want their organizations to prioritize AI more.

## Transformation pioneers

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held foodservice distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

"Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialized AI solutions for foodservice."

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

![A Gordon Food Service truck parked in front of a warehouse.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/997NOT1W6j8llp2FoOm03gZYaJZbSgh8yRtCLNqKr4dBHzKi4kl29ixSlxzfQ6J8wn6ExAdgwwg6vtjG19I6XcLv4GrafuiizCyzzg=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

"After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, which gives our employees time to work on other important initiatives."

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

![Three work colleagues in a meeting, happily discussing something around a table.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CotqT9EhGWX9M5P8AuwoicEO_Rcg5HNPNGrlJkkiYbP_mfc5_O9xpNFctWFOvVdDi1qlFfBAxQMYS1BiUoOz0Dmj286N43y3T-0=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities such as creating infographics, smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

"One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.â

Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience & Workspace Workplace, BBVA

  How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

  BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

  BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities such as creating infographics, smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.

  [Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

  "One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.â

  Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience & Workspace Workplace, BBVA

  ![A couple looking at a laptop screen together, smiling.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/1u7zQmoOMu04flTdtYmP_0s3OBRp38GW1St0xAQDWKh9GEDGpgsOm-H_y8iMg6Ow2wgSsMzui4JZg_Qcic_nWnCZfe0zmKCX8oc=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

"After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, which gives our employees time to work on other important initiatives."

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

  "One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.â

  Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience & Workspace Workplace, BBVA

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held foodservice distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

"Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialized AI solutions for foodservice."

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

"After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, which gives our employees time to work on other important initiatives."

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

## 124. The real impact of AI at work

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

# The real impact of AI at work

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

![Google Gemini logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-473ShPjmRqoqrHHWswK8q3-965cf19f896b503831bdbcfbf917b9db-Spark_Static_LOOP_LottieWorking_Compressed__1_.gif)

# The real impact of AI at work

Discover how the world's leading organisations have transformed everyday work â shifting from hype to measurable impact with AI.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-GB)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-business_transformation-hero-en-GB)

[Highlights](#highlights)

[Customer success](#customers)

[Resources](#resources)

## Moving beyond AI optimism

Our global survey reveals that although employees are all-in on AI, executive optimism outpaces reality on the ground. Discover how leading organisations are truly transforming work with AI, moving beyond time savings to boosting innovation, creativity and accelerating business outcomes.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-GB)

![Graph demonstrating the real impact that AI adoption is having on the workplace.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YVSM4HQZBE92cdq_mLs63pLu5RWBs_4Un_DAc0i6IQL-sRZrzC_jZ7CVPR5UfikZ43xdazP_EKQorggz87unp_l4cjl5CuvYoLL-YQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?hl=en-GB)

72%

Nearly three-quarters of orgs are in the early stages of AI transformation.

2x

Highly transformed orgs are more than two times more likely to report a boost in innovation, creativity and business acceleration.

84%

Surveyed knowledge workers want their organisations to prioritise AI more.

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held food service distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

'Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialised AI solutions for food service.'

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

![A Gordon Food Service lorry parked in front of a warehouse.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/997NOT1W6j8llp2FoOm03gZYaJZbSgh8yRtCLNqKr4dBHzKi4kl29ixSlxzfQ6J8wn6ExAdgwwg6vtjG19I6XcLv4GrafuiizCyzzg=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held food service distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

'Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialised AI solutions for food service.'

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

'After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, giving our employees time to work on other important initiatives.'

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

![Three work colleagues in a meeting, happily discussing something around a table.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CotqT9EhGWX9M5P8AuwoicEO_Rcg5HNPNGrlJkkiYbP_mfc5_O9xpNFctWFOvVdDi1qlFfBAxQMYS1BiUoOz0Dmj286N43y3T-0=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

Globe Telecom dials up productivity with 80% adoption of Gemini

Globe Telecom, the largest mobile telecommunication company in the Philippines, embraced Google Workspace with Gemini, empowering staff to maximise daily work with AI.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/live/i2Qvl6gb50k?si=UU1C2cGlkvLyOaLb&t=603)

'Gemini helps spur innovation at Globe Telecom with 92% of users reporting feeling inspired to explore new and innovative ways of working.'

Francis Pugeda, Director, AI Group, Globe Telecom

![Young woman sitting on a train smiling. She has headphones on and is holding her mobile phone in both hands, suggesting that she is working on her way home.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/LdEk8V4iPy6yIsrb9IEawERwg3FO0WV6wpyPxK_jA-rMsAqihAPT-TooiueBZzDPAXqTFYD44nhIR0mdwWkpW_k7cjUZGAYkFCo=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Globe Telecom dials up productivity with 80% adoption of Gemini

Globe Telecom, the largest mobile telecommunication company in the Philippines, embraced Google Workspace with Gemini, empowering staff to maximise daily work with AI.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/live/i2Qvl6gb50k?si=UU1C2cGlkvLyOaLb&t=603)

'Gemini helps spur innovation at Globe Telecom with 92% of users reporting feeling inspired to explore new and innovative ways of working.'

Francis Pugeda, Director, AI Group, Globe Telecom

How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

[Read the blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-natura-used-google-workspace-new-collaboration-approach?hl=en-GB)

'The future of work will be defined by people automating monotonous, operational tasks so that they can focus on analysing information. With Google Workspace with Gemini, we're seeing this change in real time.'

Renata Marques, CIO, Natura

![Woman standing in front of a bathroom mirror and applying moisturiser to her face.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/l5AheiuCU96zlT50tDmPcHd0tx_VM03XPx2yWP52UsBtVoR9ZSmcFyRJl5Ja6Wfjtz7O2ttXyARrvRaTK7d1I_Hytd31ExS0oJuH=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

[Read the blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-natura-used-google-workspace-new-collaboration-approach?hl=en-GB)

'The future of work will be defined by people automating monotonous, operational tasks so that they can focus on analysing information. With Google Workspace with Gemini, we're seeing this change in real time.'

Renata Marques, CIO, Natura

BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities in tasks such as creating infographics and smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive and Meet.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

'One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know that it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive and Meet.'

Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience and Workspace Workplace, BBVA

![A couple looking at a laptop screen together, smiling.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/1u7zQmoOMu04flTdtYmP_0s3OBRp38GW1St0xAQDWKh9GEDGpgsOm-H_y8iMg6Ow2wgSsMzui4JZg_Qcic_nWnCZfe0zmKCX8oc=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience and Workspace Workplace, BBVA

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held food service distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

  [Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

  'Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialised AI solutions for food service.'

  Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

- ![BBVA customer logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6VuPj6Q0nF8LAyj6FQHe5j-c14457765425fc0a3256ffcea032192b-BBVA_Mobile_White.svg)

  BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

  BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities in tasks such as creating infographics and smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive and Meet.

  [Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

  'One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know that it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive and Meet.'

  Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience and Workspace Workplace, BBVA

  ![A couple looking at a laptop screen together, smiling.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/1u7zQmoOMu04flTdtYmP_0s3OBRp38GW1St0xAQDWKh9GEDGpgsOm-H_y8iMg6Ow2wgSsMzui4JZg_Qcic_nWnCZfe0zmKCX8oc=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

## 125. The real impact of AI at work

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

# The real impact of AI at work

Source: https://workspace.google.com/ai/business-transformation?hl=en

![Google Gemini Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-473ShPjmRqoqrHHWswK8q3-965cf19f896b503831bdbcfbf917b9db-Spark_Static_LOOP_LottieWorking_Compressed__1_.gif)

# The real impact of AI at work

Discover how the worldâs leading organizations have transformed everyday work â shifting from hype to measurable impact with AI.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-business_transformation-hero-en)

[Highlights](#highlights)

[Customer Success](#customers)

[Resources](#resources)

## Moving beyond AI optimism

Our global survey reveals that although employees are all-in on AI, executive optimism outpaces reality on the ground. Discover how leading organizations are truly transforming work with AI, moving beyond time savings to boosting innovation, creativity, and accelerating business outcomes.

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism)

![Graph demonstrating the real impact AI adoption is having on the workplace.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YVSM4HQZBE92cdq_mLs63pLu5RWBs_4Un_DAc0i6IQL-sRZrzC_jZ7CVPR5UfikZ43xdazP_EKQorggz87unp_l4cjl5CuvYoLL-YQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

[Read the report](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism)

72%

Nearly three quarters of orgs are in the early stages of AI transformation.

2X

Highly transformed orgs are more than two times likely to report a boost in innovation, creativity, and business acceleration.

84%

Surveyed knowledge workers want their organizations to prioritize AI more.

## Transformation pioneers

![Gordon Food Service Company Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1HWqOfW73Ua0JW4Fz29TnX-9d8d6dcef0df4666abec2041af6f4be1-GordonFoodService_Mobile_White.svg)

![Globe Telecom Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6ADi0nqD2xzr18BIpgxU99-ba26ebd8685210b562bbf649de64ae12-Globe_Mobile_White.svg)

![BBVA Customer Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6VuPj6Q0nF8LAyj6FQHe5j-c14457765425fc0a3256ffcea032192b-BBVA_Mobile_White.svg)

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held foodservice distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

"Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialized AI solutions for foodservice."

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

![A Gordon Food Service truck parked in front of a warehouse.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/997NOT1W6j8llp2FoOm03gZYaJZbSgh8yRtCLNqKr4dBHzKi4kl29ixSlxzfQ6J8wn6ExAdgwwg6vtjG19I6XcLv4GrafuiizCyzzg=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held foodservice distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

"Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialized AI solutions for foodservice."

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

"After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, which gives our employees time to work on other important initiatives."

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

![Three work colleagues in a meeting, happily discussing something around a table.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CotqT9EhGWX9M5P8AuwoicEO_Rcg5HNPNGrlJkkiYbP_mfc5_O9xpNFctWFOvVdDi1qlFfBAxQMYS1BiUoOz0Dmj286N43y3T-0=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

Globe Telecom dials up productivity with 80% adoption of Gemini

Globe Telecom, the largest mobile telecommunication company in the Philippines, embraced Google Workspace with Gemini empowering staff to maximize daily work with AI.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/live/i2Qvl6gb50k?si=UU1C2cGlkvLyOaLb&t=603)

"Gemini helps spur innovation at Globe Telecom with 92% of users reporting feeling inspired to explore new and innovative ways of working."

Francis Pugeda, Director, AI Group, Globe Telecom

![Young girl sitting on a train smiling. She has headphones on and is holding her mobile phone in both hands, suggesting she is working on her way home.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/LdEk8V4iPy6yIsrb9IEawERwg3FO0WV6wpyPxK_jA-rMsAqihAPT-TooiueBZzDPAXqTFYD44nhIR0mdwWkpW_k7cjUZGAYkFCo=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

[Read the blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-natura-used-google-workspace-new-collaboration-approach)

"The future of work will be defined by people automating monotonous, operational tasks, so they can focus on analyzing information. With Google Workspace with Gemini, weâre seeing this change in real time."

Renata Marques, CIO, Natura

![Woman standing in front of a bathroom mirror, as she applies moisturizer to her face.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/l5AheiuCU96zlT50tDmPcHd0tx_VM03XPx2yWP52UsBtVoR9ZSmcFyRJl5Ja6Wfjtz7O2ttXyARrvRaTK7d1I_Hytd31ExS0oJuH=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities such as creating infographics, smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

"One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.â

Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience & Workspace Workplace, BBVA

![A couple looking at a laptop screen together, smiling.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/1u7zQmoOMu04flTdtYmP_0s3OBRp38GW1St0xAQDWKh9GEDGpgsOm-H_y8iMg6Ow2wgSsMzui4JZg_Qcic_nWnCZfe0zmKCX8oc=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Equifax securely launches Gemini to global workforce, saving teams hours per day

Equifax, a leading global credit bureau, adopted Google Workspace with Gemini to boost productivity while meeting strict security and compliance needs.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6MWXXcGiLec)

"After a trial, 90% of users saw an increase in work quality and quantity. Almost every business unit saved over an hour per day, which gives our employees time to work on other important initiatives."

JK Krug, VP of digital employee experience, Equifax

Globe Telecom dials up productivity with 80% adoption of Gemini

"Gemini helps spur innovation at Globe Telecom with 92% of users reporting feeling inspired to explore new and innovative ways of working."

Francis Pugeda, Director, AI Group, Globe Telecom

How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

[Read the blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-natura-used-google-workspace-new-collaboration-approach)

"The future of work will be defined by people automating monotonous, operational tasks, so they can focus on analyzing information. With Google Workspace with Gemini, weâre seeing this change in real time."

Renata Marques, CIO, Natura

![Woman standing in front of a bathroom mirror, as she applies moisturizer to her face.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/l5AheiuCU96zlT50tDmPcHd0tx_VM03XPx2yWP52UsBtVoR9ZSmcFyRJl5Ja6Wfjtz7O2ttXyARrvRaTK7d1I_Hytd31ExS0oJuH=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

How Natura used Google Workspace for a new collaboration approach

Natura, based in Brazil and operating across 14 Latin American countries, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to transform how employees work.

[Read the blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-natura-used-google-workspace-new-collaboration-approach)

"The future of work will be defined by people automating monotonous, operational tasks, so they can focus on analyzing information. With Google Workspace with Gemini, weâre seeing this change in real time."

Renata Marques, CIO, Natura

BBVA transforms global collaboration and compliance with Workspace

BBVA, a global bank with 140,000 employees, uses Gemini to boost its capabilities such as creating infographics, smart queries on engineering contracts and regulations, or clarifying internal risk policies. Employees transform work with Gemini embedded in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CCBOxxsRKM&list=PLU8ezI8GYqs5fu9fDU6dIkyxKzK3Jeppq&index=5 )

"One of our main learnings from our pilot is that once we implement Gemini for all of our employees, we know it will be useful from the first day because we found quick wins that our employees can use easily in Gmail, Drive, and Meet.â

Jose Antonio Salmeron, Collaboration Architect, Tech Experience & Workspace Workplace, BBVA

Gordon Food Service fuels digital transformation

Gordon Food Service is one of North America's largest privately held foodservice distributors. It focused on a comprehensive AI strategy that includes broad adoption of Workspace and the deployment of Gemini Enterprise.

[Watch the video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YEkyJaFmQ6o)[Read the press release](https://www.googlecloudpresscorner.com/2025-10-09-Gordon-Food-Service-Fuels-Digital-Transformation-and-AI-Powered-Growth-with-Gemini-Enterprise-and-Google-Workspace)

"Workspace integrates AI directly, making our processes better and our people more effective in serving customers. We're using Gemini Enterprise to empower our developers to build the next generation of specialized AI solutions for foodservice."

Brendan Bonthuis, Chief Information Officer, Gordon Food Service
