## 126. Thoughtworks: Boosting productivity, professionalism, and collaboration with Gemini for Google Workspace

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/thoughtworks-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

# Thoughtworks: Boosting productivity, professionalism, and collaboration with Gemini for Google Workspace

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/thoughtworks-gemini-google-workspace?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Thoughtworks: Boosting productivity, professionalism, and collaboration with Gemini for Google Workspace

May 23, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_Image__thoughtworks_1.max-2500x2500.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Hero_Image__thoughtworks_1.max-2500x2500.png)

##### Jessie Xia

Global Chief Information Officer, Thoughtworks

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

At [Thoughtworks](https://www.thoughtworks.com/en-au), we live and breathe strategic consulting, integrating design and technology into our services. Well-versed in leveraging the latest technologies to improve our customers’ offerings and operations, we’ve delivered success for some of the world’s most recognized brands, from introducing new ways of [working at Spotify](https://www.thoughtworks.com/en-us/clients/spotify-partnership) to helping New Zealand’s largest online marketplace, [Trade Me](https://www.thoughtworks.com/en-us/clients/trade-me), become an innovative, customer-led organization. We also embrace new technologies to streamline and improve our own internal processes, communications, and outputs.

To do this, we’ve established long-term relationships with technology providers that align with our culture and commitment to innovation. When [Google Cloud](https://cloud.google.com/) announced the infusion of generative AI into [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/) through the [Gemini for Workspace Enterprise](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/13952129?sjid=14666477751085865918-AP&visit_id=638366495505272759-2791944775&p=duet-help&rd=1) add-on, we jumped at the chance to explore this offering.

Today, we use the full range of Google Workspace tools, including [Google Docs](https://www.google.co.uk/docs/about/), [Google Sheets](https://www.google.co.uk/sheets/about/), [Google Chat](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/welcome-new-google-chat), and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_au/products/gmail/), to collaborate and serve our customers. Over the 15 years since we first deployed the suite, we’ve been a trusted tester that has helped guide Workspace development, so working with Google Cloud on Gemini for Google Workspace Enterprise was a natural step.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/tw_google-blog_1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/tw_google-blog_1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/tw_google-blog_1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/tw_google-blog_1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

### Piloting Gemini for Google Workspace Enterprise

We saw many ways this technology could support our business, including helping our consultants produce well-written and structured thought leadership pieces for external consumption. It would also further our strategic plan to infuse generative AI into everything we do. This includes the services we offer to our clients, such as customer experience, product development, and enterprise modernization, and our own corporate functions, such as matching staff with opportunities and client requirements.

Thoughtworks is a flat organization where trust is high and this trust extends to long-standing partners like Google Cloud. This meant we could quickly proceed with Gemini for Google Workspace once we completed our standard legal and security reviews.

We are now piloting Gemini for Google Workspace Enterprise with about 50 Thoughtworkers, with plans to extend its use further across our business. This would bring the power of Gemini to more than 10,000 employees across 19 countries supporting customers in industries such as financial services, healthcare, and retail.

### Helping employees draft higher quality content faster

As a non-native English speaker, I’ve used the Help me write prompt in Gemini to deliver more polished written content, such as blogs and emails, faster. I create drafts in Docs and prompt Gemini to improve the grammar and phrasing, then make adjustments to shorten the text and customize the tone to be more formal or casual.

Previously, I would find it hard to begin composing something and it would take a few days to write once I got started. **Now, I find it easier to start writing and I can finish a blog post on a familiar topic in just 30 minutes. I've also noticed that even my unassisted writing is improving. Gemini is teaching me through its recommendations.**

We’ve been collecting feedback from Thoughtworkers throughout the pilot and our people are  surprised by how good it is. Over the course of testing, we continue to get better responses from the product. Overall, Gemini for Google Workspace significantly improves the confidence of non-native English speakers in their writing, which improves the frequency, professionalism, and quality of their written communications. Our native English speakers benefit too. One team member, who is a strong writer, shared that Gemini has helped him polish his written English further, enabling him to draft even more compelling content.

### Improving communication productivity with Gemini

From our work with Gemini to date, we’ve identified an extremely strong use case for a business like ours. With offices around the globe and many people communicating in non-native languages, the solution improves our internal and external communications.

Our teams can now work faster, more efficiently, and with greater confidence, and they are more inclined to document and share their great ideas. This helps enable us to generate insights quickly across projects and contribute to our internal knowledge base. And since Gemini is embedded in Google Workspace and included in our enterprise account, we also do not have to sanitize written generative AI outputs to remove confidential content. This removes all the speed bumps and allows us to get on with our work.

Looking forward, we are extremely excited about the stronger integration of Gemini into Gmail. It can generate email messages in the author’s distinctive voice, avoiding the somewhat bland output generated by standard AI while also enhancing productivity.

In the long term, we expect Gemini to help us leverage our knowledge base, thought leadership, and insights more effectively. Combined with client knowledge, this will help us provide better, more efficient consulting services to help our clients become more customer-centric, navigate digital transformation, modernize data platforms, and realize the benefits of generative AI. Ultimately, this will help us realize our vision of having an extraordinary impact on the world through our culture and technology excellence.

## 127. Transforming HR workflows with AI

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/turing-transforming-hr-workflows-ai?hl=en

# Transforming HR workflows with AI

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/turing-transforming-hr-workflows-ai?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# Transforming HR workflows with AI

August 8, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492g_-_Hero_image_templates_-_AI_at_Work_.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492g_-_Hero_image_templates_-_AI_at_Work_.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Taylor Bradley

VP of Talent Strategy and Success, Turing

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

Before joining Turing as VP of Talent Strategy and Success, Taylor Bradley led strategic HR programs at IPO-stage and high-growth companies. He’s also a recognized voice on the future of work, a CNBC Workforce Executive Council member, and host of the TroopHR podcast.

---

**“The biggest barrier to AI adoption isn’t technology — it’s the inertia of the status quo.”**

When [Turing](https://www.turing.com/) CEO, Jonathan Siddharth, said that we needed to onboard 800 new people in the span of a single week, I told him we would “AI our way out of this.” Looking back, this was the beginning of truly scaling HR operations with AI, not just to meet the immediate demands but to lay the foundation for creating an AI-forward culture. Below are five ways we’ve embraced this moment of HR transformation with AI.

### 1. Onboarding talent at scale with the help of AI

In early 2024, Turing needed to hire and train people more quickly to meet the demand for our services. That was when we designed Turing University, powered by AI, to route talent to multiple onboarding paths based on role, skill set, and the required speed of deployment. It’s a bit like the London Underground — multiple lines run under one central system.

To build this system, we created videos of engineering leaders onboarding new talent, used those videos to train a proprietary LLM, and then our model generated interactive learning modules for new hires. These included work simulations, sandbox environments for hands-on practice, and knowledge assessments for both formal exams and proficiency checks.

The new onboarding program took just three hours to create instead of the 2-5 weeks we used to spend putting this type of program together. Thanks to these AI-driven innovations, Turing onboarded over 5,000 people in the second half of 2024.

### 2. Empowering our talent with Gems

[Gems](https://gemini.google/overview/gems) are customized versions of Gemini that you can tailor to specific types of tasks, like coding, deep research, or data analysis. We’ve developed multiple career-focused AI assistants tailored to specific technical roles, which help upskill and validate technical proficiency for hundreds of team members.

For broader impact, in our Thrive Together program, we launched Google’s premade Gemini Career Builder Gem, which delivers highly personalized career guidance, motivation, and learning support. We paired it with training on how to use the Gem effectively, and alongside Turing’s curated library of self-paced technical courses, the Gem empowers team members to grow their skills in measurable ways without increasing HR headcount.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492a_LI_Newsletter__Reshaping_HR_workflow.max-1500x1500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492a_LI_Newsletter__Reshaping_HR_workflow.max-1500x1500.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492a_LI_Newsletter__Reshaping_HR_workflow.max-1500x1500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5492a_LI_Newsletter__Reshaping_HR_workflow.max-1500x1500.jpg)

Thrive Together Gem delivers highly personalized career guidance and learning support.

### 3. Optimizing training programs

At Turing, we’re AI agnostic, so we always select the best AI tool for the job. To help us improve, we built a Gem to analyze feedback on how the training modules were working.

We discovered that some of our talent, which is spread around the globe, found it difficult to understand the accents of their trainers. That insight led us to embrace synthetic voices. With synthetic voices, we can create audio tracks with different accents, languages, and even dialects for each region. Now we can change the script, click publish, and launch the updated module in a matter of minutes.

### 4. Retaining talent

With the release of Gemini 2.5, we’ve been able to better personalize employee development programs and streamline staffing workflows. And the embedded experience within Google Workspace has helped increase adoption and daily usage among team members — from Gmail to Sheets.

All of these aspects contribute to higher employee satisfaction and retention. Team member satisfaction rose 32% in the first half of this year, setting a company record. Our top-scoring drivers: Turing University and manager effectiveness.

### 5. Automating HR support

Our people ops team saw support ticket volumes surge from 5,000 to 18,000 per quarter after 4,000 new team members joined in six months. Existing workflows broke down under the strain of such hypergrowth.

During a two-day hackathon, our team developed and launched a new AI model. The model was trained on internal knowledge to draft replies, which were then reviewed by our staff. This preserved oversight while speeding response times and supporting alignment with our policies and culture.

**After only two working days of development, the custom model** **reduced ticket processing time by 33%.** Since then, we’ve built Gems that are on track to automate 60% of the 52,000 annual tickets by year end. That frees up the rest of our team to create agentic workflows that automate other key HR tasks.

### Creating an AI-forward culture

All of these technology implementations created new efficiencies for HR operations. But the biggest barrier to AI adoption isn’t technology — it’s the inertia of the status quo. As an AI-native HR executive, I have two roles when it comes to AI: boosting workforce productivity and creating an AI-forward culture.

That’s why our people ops specialists receive targeted training to understand how AI can augment — not replace — their expertise. That gives them the confidence to lead this transformation. It’s critical for AI and human intelligence to work alongside each other. AI tools should complement, not replace, the work and expertise of an HR team. Having an “informed human in the loop” is at the foundation of our long-term plans for transforming HR workflows with AI.

## 128. Use generative AI for customer service

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/customer-service?hl=en

# Use generative AI for customer service

Source: https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/customer-service?hl=en

# Use generative AI for customer service

Generative AI aids customer service by automating responses, helping to reduce agent burnout and enhance customer trust.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_customer_service-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_customer_service-hero-en)

## How AI tools in Google Workspace benefits customer service

Gemini works across Google Workspace apps to help quickly make sense of large amounts of information and seamlessly generate first drafts. From building customer profiles to [assisting with messaging](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing/), Gemini can help provide faster service to customers and make greater use of your teamâs resources.

![Gemini summarizes an email and can suggest a reply](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/UJvhw8XUU1K6r9Xr2axeR7tdW2UZ5mhLlDXHycuQjs1ykU6YPQIVLgqIFmEBzIJhIeqZ2HR52xaXK0uldUH1vUnv41yh8LdESB8=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Enhance customer satisfaction and improve client retention

Utilize Gemini to help transcribe and summarize customer interactions. Use this to help craft customer profiles and draft timely responses, which can help enhance satisfaction and retention.

## Reduce agent burnout

Gemini helps streamline customer service tasks by crafting effective responses to common customer questions in [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) and Google Docs, reducing customer service agent burnout during periods of peak customer activity by getting answers in front of customers faster.

![Gemini creates a draft of FAQs, shown with man at laptop](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4Z7yZLS9xqXBHvOkk6wN8LShIudjVV0CRP0c-thnerVzq4j9Lsc0qLkiLdCOOuDSab0z_azHmp3_mAAKdWn3UVvwTjifcFClcHUFAw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

### Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Generative AI is helping customer service teams respond faster and do more with fewer resources. From helping to craft timely, personalized responses to customer questions to helping reduce response times and customer agent burnout, generative AI has become a valuable tool to customer service teams.

  Beyond assisting with answering customer queries, generative AI can also be used to transcribe video calls, extract and summarize information from documents to help outline clear next steps, provide a record of service and build more accurate customer profiles to better anticipate current and future needs.
- There are a variety of ways AI is being used to provide faster, more efficient customer service. Gemini can be used as an intelligent virtual assistant, capable of helping customer support agents write answers to customers in a fast and precise way. This can help ease the burden on customer service agents, allowing them to focus their efforts on more personalized services.
- One of generative AIâs most impressive qualities is its ability to analyze large amounts of text and pull out relevant information and commonalities that can help improve processes. In customer service, generative AI can be used to analyze documents, job tickets, and transcripts to create accurate customer profiles that pinpoint their wants and needs. With this information, customer teams can proactively craft timely responses and action plans to streamline processes and increase customer satisfaction.
- Today, customer service teams are using generative AI to analyze large amounts of customer data to better predict behaviors and respond in ways that will help reduce agent burnout and increase customer satisfaction. Having fast, more accurate insights into customer wants and needs can allow service teams to boost customer engagement and serve them with more timely and personal responses to questions.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## 131. Use generative AI for HR

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/hr?hl=en

# Use generative AI for HR

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/hr?hl=en

# Use generative AI for HR

Use Gemini as your AI powered assistant to help transform HR: from drafting jobs to onboarding, speeding up hiring and enhancing policies.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_hr-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_hr-hero-en-CA)

![Gemini suggests email reply options about the hiring process](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AP8TrkfMNM5u3htIIiONfGvo6FjEoLC4l8f42Pl0nKbofW_S9pdDX1mh4sbJ6GasvZ7Aej0yUwHRU7zQ7SNJfg7mfZgfQJSWSfk=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How AI tools in Google Workspace benefits human resources

HR teams can use Gemini to save time on a variety of tasks, including recruiting efforts, onboarding new hires, updating training materials for existing personnel, drafting company policies, and workforce planning.

## Save time on recruiting

Prompt Geminiâs [help me write](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-writing/) to create job descriptions for open roles within your organization. Gemini can also help streamline your hiring process by quickly analyzing resumes, providing summaries to help you pinpoint qualified candidates, and keep track of your interview pipeline.

![Gemini creates a job description using âhelp me writeâ, shown with woman on laptop](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HGdoJu1w8VevxE7SKUGgd6ceZlxSTGCe_ERJhFAEc6Wq-0ueGZ6kpJ9xh-2F8FxLCNFdn_GAR2LNrh8Gf548Cwyse27R7omteFc=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![Gemini creates an onboarding checklist with âhelp me organizeâ, shown with a man at laptop](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/KFgfnLa9t44o8k4bdA99_asvZFk2iusIzAYiOeQyUcoFadBNAJ4B4ASvXnc4djQh_8N4KiGB0tgD5a61OcXC9N6npsEexNzHH-FV=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Automate the onboarding process

Use Gemini to create onboarding checklists to get new hires up-to-speed quickly. Use [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) to create a first draft of training tasks, then refine the list accordingly.

## Customize training

Use Gemini to update training materials or customize training documentation for specific roles, making them more engaging and relevant. In addition to updating training materials, Gemini can help you with original images to illustrate information.

![Gemini creates a slide using a prompt in Google Slides](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/JjLDJS6uISX-mtPlMP_w_nzIgh1gFVCHYFyck8t8bq2gXwwLNP_T9SZkBU6lsZyestarIijOGy9ZZe_nrfZ19Nt-i4DqBJHKkMn0=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

### Effective use cases of generative artificial intelligence for HR

![Icon Search ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-4GrvEMro1Z1j8jyqdSc2JI-c5e9da682e3d482ae3dbee0ce1c5607f-AI_for_HR_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Improving_talent_acquisition_efficiency.svg)

Improving talent acquisition efficiency

Gemini helps to streamline hiring: craft job posts, summarize resumes, and identify top candidates fast.

![Icon Checklist ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-74U81n20Dpx6oMMFQHUf3u-ff0d7d93547a6fe8d342a6d763db8012-AI_for_HR_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Effective_performance_management.svg)

Effective performance management

Create training materials and checklists that can then be used to measure employee performance with more objective, data-driven, and actionable criteria.

![Icon Spreadsheet](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5Fkkpf5F0Y9rQuksfQWVgD-d69f0ed542e56dfdf5a6b7925321dd12-AI_for_HR_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Faster_decision_making_at_scale.svg)

Faster decision making at scale

Gemini works across Google Workspace apps to help you create, analyze, and summarize information across [emails](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/ai/), [documents](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/), and more to help you make faster, more informed decisions.

### Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Generative AI saves HR time by quickly creating job postings, evaluating resumes, and can help forecast hiring needs.
- From hiring to employee growth, generative AI helps create objective criteria for performance reviews. It can also help you draft courses, webinars, and more to help employees level up their skill sets.
- Generative AI is poised to play a role in helping HR professionals save time on recruiting efforts, more efficiently finding new talent to fill open roles and aid in onboarding. Beyond tapping into generative AIâs capabilities for recruiting purposes, it can also be used to update training materials and craft more effective messaging around internal policies that affect your organization.

- Generative AI saves HR time by quickly creating job postings and evaluating CVs, and can help forecast hiring needs.
- From hiring to employee growth, generative AI helps create objective criteria for performance reviews. It can also help you draft courses, webinars and more to help employees level up their skill sets.
- Generative AI is poised to play a role in helping HR professionals save time on recruiting efforts, more efficiently finding new talent to fill open roles and aid in onboarding. Beyond tapping into generative AI's capabilities for recruiting purposes, it can also be used to update training materials and craft more effective messaging around internal policies that affect your organisation.

## 134. Use generative AI for marketing

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/marketing?hl=en

# Use generative AI for marketing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/marketing?hl=en

# Use generative AI for marketing

AI is changing the marketing landscape, giving teams and individuals the tools that they need to get more done faster.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_marketing-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_marketing-hero-en-GB)

![Person on laptop using Gemini to write a job description.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/JEvJlZXEHgRUpvCHtNLOQFb2gIf6xiu0c7Y2PlJQdI4fqDYNCbypWovbjwX9TJ36IP-j3S7QTJHT3XM4Kg6rgHwMQyTE2OstxUXm=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How AI tools in Google Workspace benefit marketing

With generative [AI tools in Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/) you can quickly craft messaging, evaluate large amounts of information, summarise documents or emails, and automate regular tasks. This gives marketers time to focus on higher-value strategic and creative elements of their work.

![Person on laptop using Gemini to help write an email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u21xNJSwZn_MmPtq885AJPvXydos5MOwOdxLoWZfHrIdLfRlrIG1DmUM_3pqFUpwrUO3p_avTC9AUunOGuGL4l3Op2rmipRtfLuKDA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Helps you write

With Gemini, you can quickly create first drafts of emails, blog posts, business proposals, ad copy and more.

[Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/) can also quickly summarise emails and craft replies.

## Helps you create images

'Help me visualise' in [Google Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/slides/) allows you to enter a simple prompt to generate a custom image. You can further customise by using 'Add a style' to create visuals that feel on-brand and complement your messaging in exciting new ways.

![Person on a laptop uses Gemini to generate an image of a giraffe in front of the Eiffel tower.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/39WpbADD0bWS42WpvmNQnCIE12GdnNhma5WDsagn2E05z2HeaBZHly_drES0Ccq-vd6TBJDS3aQ-9Lh09xHbojDm46PX7mxMLA9b=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![Two workers use Gemini to create a detailed project tracker in Sheets.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/tsIxosa8uhHfuphHL8S4IzPfcyhOFaUQL-wJ8RYmm5IXgGw_d6TdXP74p0FstyqqIHDMv--jEs02ETo1DUBEl0_fD4DVdA_PoN9A=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Helps you organise

With just a few words, [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) can help you quickly create a project tracker for your upcoming campaign launch or any other project.

## Helps you connect

[Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-meetings/) helps you look and sound your best on customer or agency calls and can even help translate the conversation across multiple languages.

![A woman uses Gemini appearance settings to adjust lighting levels and video framing in Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/jddkfvYLoH-7OYC1tRNHg5RyhC3rgHz70yY68kSjzwFkQ3wnZCS5faJrtyxURMj8HJFYDZMgmCQ6L-IAZv2AFl61dCUiVQmhkTT5=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## High-impact use cases of generative AI in marketing

![Line trending upwards ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6OLG3ZRFIHAaMtfBHrj2nm-63fcdd01843261c83dffb50d90de0519-AI_Marketing_TemplateMultiColumn_Icon_1.svg)

Improving campaign performance

Use generative AI to analyse campaign performance, identify improvement areas and craft iterations for A/B testing.

![Line trending downwards](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3RE2HyWajA5sDc7QlERCIm-b41bfdcbb5c296440b71c5eacbb992f5-AI_Marketing_TemplateMultiColumn_Icon_2.svg)

Lowering content creation costs

Use [generative AI](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-writing/) to quickly create a first draft and increase your output without having to scale up your resources.

![Person icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1ZfeAqhTNo3QVcrHyx8bG5-d563631fb3b36bd700d297af4ff11f67-AI_Marketing_TemplateMultiColumn_Icon_3.svg)

Deliver personalisationâ¨at scale

Craft targeted, personalised messaging with generative AI's ability to analyse large amounts of customer data.

### Learn how to use generative AI to supercharge your marketing efforts

[Learn more](https://services.google.com/fh/files/misc/gws_gemini_marketing_whitepaper_online.pdf)

#### Curious about generative AI in marketing?

See our FAQ to learn more.

Expand all

- Generative AI is just like any other marketing tool in that it has benefits and limitations:Â

  - Generative AI can help marketers save time, automating tasks like generating meeting and email summaries, data analysis and content creation.Â
  - You'll still need to fact check AI-generated content, as a generative AI platform is only as knowledgeable as the data used to train it.Â
  - Generative AI can assist with understanding customer behaviours and improving ad targeting based on historical campaign data.Â
  - Generative AI is best used for repetitive tasks, giving marketers more time to exercise their creativity when crafting marketing campaigns and strategies.Â
  - Because generative AI collects and analyses large data sets based on customer behaviours, it's important to be transparent about data collection and protection measures to reassure customers that their information is safe.Â

  With GoogleÂ AI, we've reaffirmed [our commitment to protect user data and privacy](https://cloud.google.com/privacy?hl=en-GB). Your privacy is our priority. Your Google Workspace content â including emails, documents, recordings and more â will not be shared with other users without permission. We never sell, delete or export your data. Additionally, while you may use Google Workspace and Gemini to generate your own ad campaigns, Google does not collect, scan or use your content in Google Workspace services for advertising purposes.Â

  [Learn more about how Google protects your data in the age of generative AI](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/protecting-your-data-era-generative-ai?hl=en-GB).
- Generative AI can help sales and marketing professionals save time and be more productive at every stage of an engagement. Generative AI can be used to create RFPs and nurture leads with more personalised content. It can be used to create sales materials, [email marketing assets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-email-marketing/) and summarise meeting notes with clear takeaways and identifying follow-up opportunities. It can also help generate long-form and short-form content for marketing campaigns, analyse data to inform customer segments, and help measure and improve campaign performance.
- Generative AI can be used to tackle a variety of marketing tasks, including content creation and personalisation, as well as analysing customer behaviours and campaign performance.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

![A woman uses Gemini appearance settings to adjust lighting levels and video framing in Meet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/jddkfvYLoH-7OYC1tRNHg5RyhC3rgHz70yY68kSjzwFkQ3wnZCS5faJrtyxURMj8HJFYDZMgmCQ6L-IAZv2AFl61dCUiVQmhkTT5=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

### Learn how to use generative AI to supercharge your marketing efforts

[Learn more](https://services.google.com/fh/files/misc/gws_gemini_marketing_whitepaper_online.pdf)

#### Curious about generative AI in marketing?

See our FAQs to learn more.

Expand all

- Generative AI is just like any other marketing tool in that it has benefits and limitations:Â

  - Generative AI can help marketers save time, automating tasks like generating meeting and email summaries, data analysis, and content creation.Â
  - Youâll still need to fact check AI-generated content, as a generative AI platform is only as knowledgeable as the data used to train it.Â
  - Generative AI can assist with understanding customer behaviors and improving ad targeting based on historical campaign data.Â
  - Generative AI is best used for repetitive tasks, giving marketers more time to exercise their creativity when crafting marketing campaigns and strategies.Â
  - Because generative AI collects and analyzes large data sets based on customer behaviors, itâs important to be transparent about data collection and protection measures to reassure customers their information is safe.Â

  With Google AI, weâve reaffirmed [our commitment to protect user data and privacy](https://cloud.google.com/privacy?hl=en). Your privacy is our priority. Your Google Workspace contentâincluding emails, documents, recordings, and moreâ will not be shared with other users without permission. We never sell, delete, or export your data. Additionally, while you may use Google Workspace and Gemini to generate your own ad campaigns, Google does not collect, scan, or use your content in Google Workspace services for advertising purposes.Â

  [Learn more about how Google protects your data in the age of generative AI](https://workspace.google.com/blog/identity-and-security/protecting-your-data-era-generative-ai).
- Generative AI can help sales and marketing professionals save time and be more productive at every stage of an engagement. Generative AI can be used to create RFPs and nurture leads with more personalized content. It can be used to create sales materials, [email marketing assets](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-email-marketing/), and summarize meeting notes with clear takeaways and identifying follow-up opportunities. It can also help generate long-form and short-form content for marketing campaigns, analyze data to inform customer segments, and help to measure and improve campaign performance.
- Generative AI can be used to tackle a variety of marketing tasks, including content creation and personalization, as well as analyzing customer behaviors and campaign performance.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

## 137. Use generative AI for sales

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/sales?hl=en

# Use generative AI for sales

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/sales?hl=en

# Use generative AI for sales

Generative AI boosts sales efficiency. AI tools in Google Workspace can help assist your sales teams to focus on selling more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_sales-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_sales-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini creates a summary table from a prompt with 'Help me organise', shown with three people at a computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d9iDM10MPwH892qyzEsbfQTzBl4kMVfcWNxhcGooTTGLO9zGXn735uZU45HTxGv_7Dgw06-eFYys6TJOAbtgiBpMJak-8rfUOhlB=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How AI tools in Google Workspace benefit sales

Gemini works across Workspace apps to help streamline sales by organising prospects, generating proposals and [marketing campaigns](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-email-marketing/), and crafting effective outreach for customer engagement.

![Gemini creates copy from a prompt with 'Help me write', shown with a man on phone](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/J5Cxiivp6hREKZaLy__W_uFfMsigrSgv5PuZKmyaAvnN9YePLmEpyTWMW47YbVVs3AomUspwjs7uqJTIf-UHf6TX0oPERnrrVEs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

## Improves efficiency in sales process

As your sales assistant, Gemini helps to tailor messaging for different prospects, expediting sales processes, from outreach to proposals, freeing time for increased focus on sales.

## Quickly create sales documents and materials

Generative AI is transforming sales by rapidly processing text. Gemini helps to extract useful information from documents to craft summaries and customises images for [presentations](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/presentation-ai/), freeing up sales teams to focus on generating revenue.

![Gemini creates an image from a prompt with 'Help me visualise', shown with man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/j6q_Mt52ko70kqW6St1BFGir8rrk3O7S75EEoi-ExcT7X_QPix7YkHv-wq7cLG7avo0ILOIbdUMq8MVRm1zjMLCMgNHR7v9i0wU=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

![Gemini writes a business proposal with prompt, shown with a man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/kHpE9wek4kKIOOiWiiNsCxQ-X8p4iwRYzBEe1lrT15cozaEkX-04-qV1c2H81WPLpQNFgIvExKOqu6LBjAJqsfBUkgwgD8_8ZP1l=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

## Minimise repetitive work

Gemini can help you streamline repetitive, administrative tasks â giving your sales team more time to nurture qualified leads. Use Gemini to assist in crafting outreach messages, organising leads, outlining a business proposal and more.

### Effective use cases of generative artificial intelligence in sales

![Data-informed decision-making icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-qP2FW3zVIL7pxwAC8ioMq-596daa42f8e5fa243ed78e6ea0b053f6-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Data_informed_decision_making.svg)

Data-informed decision making

Gemini in Google Docs and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/) swiftly summarises crucial information for quick sales decisions.

![Enhanced opportunity management icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-4BMsJ2K8ZBMEMyjQMQjioa-43802ccdc74ca552982aa1526be5e8ad-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Enhanced_opportunities_management.svg)

Enhanced opportunities management

Gemini in Sheets can automatically create tables to help organise opportunity tracking and data review, improving accuracy in reports.

![Presentation icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1wpjOUHjncW8UdpylVax5W-2b9302f8e2661c124c42e9f53ed822fa-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Optimize_sales_engagement.svg)

Optimise sales engagement

Gemini can assist in optimising sales engagement by quickly summarising relevant customer information from long threads.

### Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Generative AI can help sales professionals streamline sales processes, helping them organise and track sales and customer information, conduct outreach with personalised messaging, and put together business proposals automatically and based on text prompts. Generative AI can also be used to help sales teams more accurately run sales forecasts, pinpointing inaccuracies and summarising information in an easily digestible way.
- Generative AI can help B2B sales professionals boost their productivity, assisting with creation of sales materials, organising and tracking contacts and leads, and even writing outreach and proposals tailored to prospects.
- Generative AI can help sales teams save time on more time-consuming administrative tasks, allowing them to focus on the more strategic elements of their job. Use Gemini to help accelerate research and help create sales materials so that you can spend less time keeping track of leads and analysing lengthy reports, and devote more time to nurturing leads and making meaningful connections with customers.

## 139. Use generative AI for sales

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/sales?hl=en

# Use generative AI for sales

Source: https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/sales?hl=en

# Use generative AI for sales

Generative AI boosts sales efficiency. AI tools in Google Workspace can help assist your sales teams to focus on selling more.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_sales-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_sales-hero-en)

![Gemini creates a summary table from a prompt with âhelp me organizeâ, shown with a three people at a computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d9iDM10MPwH892qyzEsbfQTzBl4kMVfcWNxhcGooTTGLO9zGXn735uZU45HTxGv_7Dgw06-eFYys6TJOAbtgiBpMJak-8rfUOhlB=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How AI tools in Google Workspace benefits sales

Gemini works across Workspace apps to help streamline sales by organizing prospects, generating proposals and [marketing campaigns](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-email-marketing/), and crafting effective outreach for customer engagement.

![Gemini creates copy from a prompt with âhelp me writeâ, shown with a man on phone](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/J5Cxiivp6hREKZaLy__W_uFfMsigrSgv5PuZKmyaAvnN9YePLmEpyTWMW47YbVVs3AomUspwjs7uqJTIf-UHf6TX0oPERnrrVEs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

## Improves efficiency in sales process

As your sales assistant, Gemini helps to tailor messaging for different prospects, expediting sales processes, from outreach to proposals, freeing time for increased focus on sales.

## Quickly create sales documents and materials

Generative AI is transforming sales by rapidly processing text. Gemini helps extract useful information from documents to craft summaries and customizes images for [presentations](https://workspace.google.com/resources/presentation-ai/), freeing up sales teams to focus on generating revenue.

![Gemini creates an image from a prompt with âhelp me visualizeâ, shown with man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/j6q_Mt52ko70kqW6St1BFGir8rrk3O7S75EEoi-ExcT7X_QPix7YkHv-wq7cLG7avo0ILOIbdUMq8MVRm1zjMLCMgNHR7v9i0wU=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

![Gemini writes a business proposal with prompt, shown with a man at computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/kHpE9wek4kKIOOiWiiNsCxQ-X8p4iwRYzBEe1lrT15cozaEkX-04-qV1c2H81WPLpQNFgIvExKOqu6LBjAJqsfBUkgwgD8_8ZP1l=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

## Minimize repetitive work

Gemini can help you streamline repetitive, administrative tasks â giving your sales team more time to nurture qualified leads. Use Gemini to assist in crafting outreach messages, organizing leads, outlining a business proposal, and more.

### Effective use cases of generative artificial intelligence for sales

![Data informed decision making icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-qP2FW3zVIL7pxwAC8ioMq-596daa42f8e5fa243ed78e6ea0b053f6-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Data_informed_decision_making.svg)

Data-informed decision making

Gemini in Google Docs and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) swiftly summarizes crucial information for quick sales decisions.

![Enhanced opportunity management icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-4BMsJ2K8ZBMEMyjQMQjioa-43802ccdc74ca552982aa1526be5e8ad-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Enhanced_opportunities_management.svg)

![Presentation icon ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1wpjOUHjncW8UdpylVax5W-2b9302f8e2661c124c42e9f53ed822fa-AI_for_Sales_TemplateMulticolumn_Icon_Optimize_sales_engagement.svg)

## 140. WebFX: Powering collaboration, innovation, and idea generation with Duet AI in Google Workspace

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-webfx-uses-duet-ai?hl=en

# WebFX: Powering collaboration, innovation, and idea generation with Duet AI in Google Workspace

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/how-webfx-uses-duet-ai?hl=en

Customer Stories

# WebFX: Powering collaboration, innovation, and idea generation with Duet AI in Google Workspace

January 11, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/WebFX_hero.max-2500x2500.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/WebFX_hero.max-2500x2500.png)

##### Catelin Carey

Senior Vice President, WebFX

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

**Editorial note: Duet AI for Google Workspace is now Gemini for Google Workspace. [Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/gemini-for-google-workspace).**

---

[WebFX](https://www.webfx.com/) was founded in a college dorm room by William Craig, an ambitious student with a belief that working together will take you far. This collaborative spirit has helped our company thrive for 27 years and has supported our team’s steady growth from 50 to over 500 people in the last decade.

Our clients rely on us to deliver tech-enabled SEO, paid search and social advertising, and ecommerce solutions that help them succeed. But, to better serve our clients, we first have to equip our team with the right tools to do their best work. To empower our people to connect, build, grow, and deliver the results our clients expect, we rely on the suite of collaboration tools in [Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/).

We started using Workspace over 10 years ago, and the platform continues to power all the work we do, both internally and externally. It’s like a mini assistant that handles menial tasks so our team can focus on creative and strategic pursuits. It’s automated, integrated, and so embedded into our processes that we are quick to use new features as they become available. Here’s how we’re using Google Workspace to empower our employees to do more in the new era of work and how we’re adopting Duet AI in Google Workspace to supercharge our productivity.

### Embracing the power of automation to accelerate productivity

As early adopters of Google Workspace, we use Google [Docs](https://www.google.ca/docs/about/), [Sheets](https://www.google.ca/sheets/about/), and [Slides](https://www.google.ca/slides/about/) for everything from internal project planning to delivering client work, providing a single source of truth that eliminates the need for version control. With Google [Drive](https://www.google.com/intl/en_ca/drive/), we can easily organize folders and manage access across all of our clients in one easy-to-navigate place. Google [Meet](https://meet.google.com/) provides a means for face-to-face interaction with integrations across [Gmail](https://www.google.com/gmail/about/) and Google [Calendar](https://calendar.google.com/), making it simple to schedule meetings with colleagues and clients.

We were also exploring the efficiencies that AI creates, such as supporting idea generation and helping us quickly build outlines. So when we were invited to join the Google Workspace Labs program for [Duet AI in Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/duet-ai), we jumped at the chance to test Google’s new generative AI capabilities, and discover how this tool could support our team and our customers.

Duet AI in Google Workspace plugs into our existing Google Workspace framework, giving us access to enriched features that build on our collaborative approach to work. We were sold by its ability to support our team through time-saving features, from content brainstorming in Docs and Gmail to creative support in Slides or project planning in Sheets. We were thrilled by the fact that it offers all these capabilities integrated in the tools we’re already using. It’s already powering the work we do and how we do it, and consistently opening new doors for what we can achieve together.

### Duet AI creates scalable opportunities for shared success

After testing Duet AI in Google Workspace with a smaller group, we formally invested in the tool and rolled it out across our organization. Every employee has access to it, with each team finding its own unique ways to use it to support daily functions.

Our client-facing teams use the “Help me write” feature in Docs to generate ideas and develop outlines. The “Shorten” feature within Docs, for example, helps with our everyday client-facing messaging. Our clients are busy and we aim for their interactions with us to be the easiest part of their day, which starts with clear and concise communication. Another example has to do with that feeling that content is easier to edit than to create from scratch. When we’re stuck on an email or on how to best phrase a particular message, using Help me write to brainstorm and have the tool iterate our content has been a helpful starting point. Duet AI in Google Workspace helps us save time by accelerating project planning, email writing, and so much more. Having a tool that can transform our loosely-written ideas into content that is presentable both internally and to customers is a super power added to our organization. It preserves our precious time to focus on other things that are going to have a bigger impact, such as coming up with ideas in the first place.

What we’ve learned is that generative AI is only as effective as the people using it. It’s a vehicle that helps us create better work on a tighter timeline, but we still have to drive it ourselves. By giving our employees access to this innovative technology, they’re able to level up the work they already do and discover new ways of working that we never would’ve imagined.

By nature, digital marketing is an evolving industry. The way we helped our clients succeed 10 years ago looked very different from what we do today. But it’s not our years of experience that make us a strong agency. It’s our willingness to learn and evolve the way we work to do better for our clients, today and in the future.

## 141. Welcome to Beyond the prompt : Our new series on getting the most out of Gemini for Workspace

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/welcome-to-beyond-the-prompt?hl=en

# Welcome to Beyond the prompt : Our new series on getting the most out of Gemini for Workspace

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/welcome-to-beyond-the-prompt?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# Welcome to Beyond the prompt: Our new series on getting the most out of Gemini for Workspace

April 19, 2024

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Beyond_the_prompt_Image_1_Blog_header_2436.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Beyond_the_prompt_Image_1_Blog_header_2436.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### The Google Workspace Team

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

Embracing a new technology and a new way of working can feel both exciting and challenging. This new series is designed to help you get started — and inspired — with generative AI. We’ll regularly post short tips, tricks, and suggestions on how to improve your use of [Gemini for Google Workspace](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/gemini-for-google-workspace) to increase your productivity, creativity, and quality of work. 

From the very beginning, Google Workspace was built with collaboration at its core. Whether it’s in a shared Google Doc or a quick sync over Google Meet, Workspace helps you collaborate in real time and asynchronously with other people so you can do your best work.

Now, you can also collaborate with AI using Gemini for Workspace to help you write, organize, visualize, accelerate workflows, have richer meetings, and much more — all while using your favorite apps like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Slides, and soon, [Google Vids](https://youtu.be/4SCjXcBeW1E). So let’s get started with our first tip.

### What’s in a prompt?

To realize the full benefits of generative AI, you need to write effective prompts. But what exactly is a prompt? You can think of it as a conversation starter with your AI-powered assistant. Like any good conversation, you might have follow up questions, requests, and thoughts.

This in turn might lead you to write several prompts as the conversation progresses. While the possibilities are virtually endless, there are consistent best practices that you can put to use today.

There are four main areas to consider when writing an effective prompt. You don’t need to use all four, but using a few will help! When crafting prompts, aim to include the following:

- **Persona** — Who is asking for the information?
- **Task** — What do you need Gemini for Workspace to do for you?
- **Context**— Any additional information Gemini could use to generate a more specific response
- **Format** — How do you want Gemini to format its output (in bullet points, images in a specific style, etc.)?

With these four areas, the possibilities are virtually endless.

Let’s look at an example prompt.

Imagine you’re writing a travel blog and need an image to accompany your post. You open a new Google Slide and you prompt Gemini in Slides by selecting *Create image with Gemini*.

In Slides, go to: Insert→Image→Create image with Gemini.

Once you see the area below, type in your prompt:  
Create an image of a plane flying above the clouds over mountains and rivers during sunrise that I can use in a blog to promote my travel company.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-16_at_2.48.26PM_OTWXuDA.max-600x600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-16_at_2.48.26PM_OTWXuDA.max-600x600.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-16_at_2.48.26PM_OTWXuDA.max-600x600.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Screenshot_2024-04-16_at_2.48.26PM_OTWXuDA.max-600x600.png)

Putting our prompt to work in Slides

Gemini generates images and now you can simply select your favorite and insert it into your Slide.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/travel_blog_image_of_plane.max-600x600.jpeg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/travel_blog_image_of_plane.max-600x600.jpeg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/travel_blog_image_of_plane.max-600x600.jpeg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/travel_blog_image_of_plane.max-600x600.jpeg)

Here’s our favorite image for the travel blog.

Generative AI and all of its possibilities are exciting, but it’s still new. The example prompts in this series are meant for illustrative purposes. Remember that responses will vary from one user to another, and from one prompt to another.

If you're ready for the next post in the series, you can find Part 2 [here](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-4-tips-boost-collaboration-gemini). Or you can catch up on Parts [3](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-3-rethinking-prompt-engineering), [4](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-4-using-gemini-workspace-your-sales-research-assistant), [5](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-5-marketers-conquer-blank-page), and [6](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-part-6-personalize-customer-service-responses). Or consider downloading the [Prompting guide 101 ebook](https://inthecloud.withgoogle.com/gemini-for-google-workspace-prompt-guide/dl-cd.html) and [get started with Gemini for Workspace today](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/).

# What chess can teach leaders about AI enablement

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_Blo.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_Blo.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Pat McCarthy

VP of Google Workspace Sales

##### Try Google Workspace at No Cost

Get a business email, all the storage you need, video conferencing, and more.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en)

In business, as in chess, we’re taught that success comes down to thinking multiple moves ahead, anticipating your opponent’s next move, and seeing the whole board. For a long time, we’ve viewed the ability to master that board as the ultimate symbol of human intellect.

All of that changed in 1997 when early AI, dubbed Deep Blue, defeated Gary Kasparov, the reigning world champion of chess. A machine outplayed the best player in the world, causing many to predict that people would lose interest in chess.

Was this “checkmate” for human chess players? Not even close.

The opposite happened: Chess is more popular today than at any other time in history. World Chess Championships attract tens of millions of viewers, while AI vs. AI matches draw a tiny niche audience.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000.png)

Not only that, but today’s chess players are playing at a higher level than 30 years ago, with more than three times as many grandmasters. This is largely thanks to the analysis and training methods made possible by AI.

What AI has done for chess — elevating the game without replacing the players — it’s now doing for business at scale. When leaders embrace AI thoughtfully and strategically across their organizations, they can help every employee outdo themselves, becoming grandmasters in their own right, whether they pull insights from a spreadsheet, talk to customers, or present to the board.

### **Developing a dual-track strategy for AI enablement**

To win at chess, you have to be good at the small, incremental gains as well as the sudden combinations that change the board. In chess we call the first capability “positional play” and the second “tactical play.” As a metaphor for AI enablement, this works well.

**Positional play** means equipping every employee with AI tools that make their daily tasks easier and faster. It’s about optimizing existing workflows and consolidating productivity gains. Examples of this are [all around us](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/how-our-customers-transform-work-with-ai?e=48754805). It might be a medical clinic using Gemini in Gmail to explain medical terms in patient emails, a global technology company using NotebookLM to make performance reviews 90% more efficient, or a fashion retailer reducing the time it takes to create engaging web product copy from 30+ hours to 30 minutes per month. All of these come from real-world use cases our customers have embraced.

These kinds of daily, incremental gains create a solid foundation for boosting productivity across the entire organization. They also boost employee confidence, satisfaction, and engagement, according to [our recent global survey](https://workspace.google.com/learning/report/content/beyond-ai-optimism?e=48754805#from-saving-time-to-expanding-potential-8) of knowledge workers and business decision makers. Organizations that are highly transformed by AI prove that the biggest gains from adopting AI aren’t about saving time — they’re about expanding potential.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000_fVHuh5z.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000_fVHuh5z.png)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000_fVHuh5z.png](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/5522f_GWS_What_chess_can_teach_leaders_inl.max-2000x2000_fVHuh5z.png)

**Tactical play** is about driving game-changing impact. It means reinventing how the company operates instead of optimizing existing workflows. A few years into the AI revolution, this is less common. In fact, in that same survey, only 3% of organizations have truly transformed through AI. But they’re seeing outsized results: they report more than double the innovation, creativity, and ability to accelerate new products and services to market.

So why aren’t there more tactical chess moves happening? Because that 3% figure reflects the limitations of the recent past, an era of siloed productivity gains driven by chatbots. We are now entering the era of the agentic workplace. Instead of just embedding AI into existing workflows — that email to a customer or slide deck for the CEO — entire workflows can be reimagined with agents.

### **Why shared context is key to agentic transformation**

AI agents pursue goals rather than just answering prompts. Imagine an agent that aggregates customer sentiment across all your channels, recommends solutions, builds the strategy deck for your review, and projects the bottom-line impact. This represents a true human-AI collaboration at scale, fundamentally changing how we move across the board.

However, this vision is often held back by a lack of shared context.

When agents bounce between dozens of disconnected applications to find relevant data and act on it, they often hit a "context wall." They’re unable to travel with the context they need, grinding productivity to a halt. This affects humans too: if your email can’t talk to your file system, your AI-generated insights and outputs remain limited. To break through these silos, enterprises need a unified, secure platform where humans and agents can collaborate across all application boundaries.

### **Winning at AI adoption**

To win at chess — and AI adoption — you have to be able to play positionally and tactically at the same time, and the two modes of play are deeply intertwined. It’s your daily, positional investments that actually create the opportunities for those tactical strikes down the line. Good tactics flow from a good position on the board. For the 3% of organizations that are truly transformed by AI, it’s no accident that 74% of them continuously refine AI frameworks to optimize workflows over time. Like any grandmaster, they’re constantly reassessing the board.

Posted in

- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)
- [Productivity and Collaboration](https://workspace.google.com/blog/productivity-collaboration)

# Work is better with Gemini

Source: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai?hl=en

# Work is better with Gemini

Gemini is the AI-powered assistant from Google, built right into Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and more, with enterprise-grade security and privacy. Discover how you can focus on what you do best by collaborating with Gemini.

## 146. Working at the speed of fashion trends with Duet AI

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai?hl=en

# Working at the speed of fashion trends with Duet AI

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai?hl=en

AI and Machine Learning

# Working at the speed of fashion trends with Duet AI

November 16, 2023

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Adore_Me_Ranjan_Roy_Blogheader_2436x1200.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Adore_Me_Ranjan_Roy_Blogheader_2436x1200.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Ranjan Roy

VP of Strategy, Adore Me

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

Editorial note: Duet AI for Google Workspace is now Gemini for Google Workspace. [Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/gemini-for-google-workspace). This post also appears in our LinkedIn newsletter [AI@Work with Google Workspace](https://www.linkedin.com/newsletters/ai-work-with-google-workspace-7087479673143656448/).

---

[Adore Me](https://www.adoreme.com/) is an inclusive intimate apparel company with a mission to celebrate women for who they are. Our global teams use Google Workspace to connect and collaborate in service of that mission, creating products and experiences that support women through every stage of life.

As the Vice President of Strategy, I’m responsible for streamlining operations and enabling our team to quickly bring products to market while never losing sight of our customer’s needs. When we joined the Trusted Tester program for Duet AI in Workspace, I was hopeful it would create efficiencies. Now I can say it has truly supercharged how we work.

Generative AI in Gmail, Google Docs, and Google Slides has not only accelerated our product launches, but has also enhanced customer service and made our internal communications more inclusive.

### Working at the speed of fashion trends — from 40 hours to one

One of Adore Me’s priorities is to consistently launch new products that reflect the diversity of our customers. We often release more than 80 items per month, and it’s important that each one has a unique product description.

Each of our copywriters used to spend 30-40 hours per month writing those descriptions, but AI cuts that time down to about an hour. We use [Vertex AI](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai?hl=en) from Google Cloud to develop useful first drafts that our writers finesse before sending to our development team. This frees up our writers to spend more time on pie-in-the-sky ideation. Meanwhile, Duet AI helps us quickly update our website and mobile apps with new products and features by giving our developers and UX designers the ability to draft their own copy.

We've also been able to speed up the planning phase of our campaigns with [help me organize](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/13676332?hl=en&sjid=8564469467013962035-NA). By entering a simple prompt like, “Create a project plan for a full-funnel marketing campaign around a spring product launch,” we get a first draft of a plan in Sheets to kickstart the project. And the results get better with every prompt. If the initial Sheet is missing a variable, we add feedback and Duet AI makes the change for us. This collaborative process helps us work even faster next time.

### Exceed customer expectations

Adore Me is always looking for new ways to connect with women, both through our styles and our customer experience. In a recent panel at [Google Cloud Next](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fp1t_SOw0sA), we highlighted our customer service team’s new initiative: using generative AI to craft personalized stylist notes based on individual preferences, purchase history, and product reviews. This helps our customers feel even more seen and valued.

### Make communication more inclusive

With employees worldwide, Adore Me uses Duet AI’s real-time [translations in Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/blog/product-announcements/duet-ai-in-workspace-now-available) to break down language barriers and create a more inclusive workplace. That way, employees can focus on sharing their perspective instead of translating their thoughts. And even if someone can’t attend a meeting, they can stay informed. Meet automatically transcribes the conversation into a Doc, which Duet AI summarizes in just a few seconds.

### Making room for what matters

Adore Me is excited to continue using Duet AI to work smarter and create more time to prioritize what matters most to us: our customers. From operations and internal communication to marketing and customer service, Duet AI is permanently transforming the way we fulfill our mission.

Posted in

- [AI and Machine Learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning)
- [Productivity and Collaboration](https://workspace.google.com/blog/productivity-collaboration)

## 147. Zoppas Industries adopts Google Workspace with Gemini to boost global collaboration and efficiency

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/zoppas-industries-workspace-with-gemini-global-collaboration-and-efficiency?hl=en

# Zoppas Industries adopts Google Workspace with Gemini to boost global collaboration and efficiency

Source: https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/zoppas-industries-workspace-with-gemini-global-collaboration-and-efficiency?hl=en

Customer Stories

# Zoppas Industries adopts Google Workspace with Gemini to boost global collaboration and efficiency

September 16, 2025

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Zoppas_Thumbnail.max-2500x2500.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Zoppas_Thumbnail.max-2500x2500.jpg)

##### Alvise Fontana

IT Practice Lead, Zoppas Industries

##### Google Workspace Newsletter

Keep up with the evolving future of work and collaboration with insights, trends, and product news.

[SIGN UP](https://workspace.google.com/?source=gafb-blog_article-body-en#newsletter)

“Having a tool for every daily task is the kind of improvement we could not have made without Google Workspace. It makes everything easy. We can communicate with colleagues, schedule meetings, search for files, and more, all in one place.”

**Snapshot:** Zoppas Industries, a leader in thermal management solutions, uses Google Workspace with Gemini to increase employee collaboration and drive faster, more consistent client service. Learn how Zoppas Industries:

- **Successfully rolled out Google Workspace with Gemini** across the organization, automating repetitive workflows to improve productivity
- Improved communication, reduced friction, and **enabled faster knowledge sharing for 8,000 global employees**
- Supports **faster time-to-market** for its clients

---

### **The mission and the challenge**

From coffee makers and vending machines to electric cars and satellites, [Zoppas Industries](https://zoppasindustries.com/en/) is a key player in electrical heating and thermal management applications that are part of everyday life. Founded in 1963, the company now operates 15 production sites across Europe, Asia, and the Americas, providing solutions for domestic appliances, industrial applications, and the commercial sector. We attribute our growth to our constant transformation over the years and our ability to bring sustainable innovation to our customers.

One of our biggest transformations began in 2015 when we wanted to address concerns with our existing email provider, including spam, phishing, and ransomware attacks. This led us to Gmail, which opened the door to Google Workspace, a platform that allowed us to reimagine how we collaborate globally. Google Workspace gave us a comprehensive solution that went beyond our initial security challenges to meet our goals for boosting productivity, improving collaboration, and unifying our tools. Now, ten years later, Workspace has enabled digital literacy within our company so we can innovate faster.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Zoppas_Thumbnail.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/Zoppas_Thumbnail.max-2200x2200.jpg)

Zoppas Industries uses Google Workspace with Gemini to empower teams with seamless solutions to do their jobs and meet customer needs.

### **The switch to Google Workspace and Gemini**

We first replaced our existing email system with Gmail to increase security and improve the way we communicate. We then identified another pain point: fragmented tools for managing documents and data, and for collaborating with global teammates. Since we were already using Gmail, Google Drive was a natural next step into the Workspace ecosystem. It enhances our security with access controls and simplified document management so everyone can find the files they need with ease. We also expanded our solutions to include Google Meet and Chat to enable face-to-face and real-time collaboration from anywhere. We recently brought AI into the fold with [Gemini](https://deepmind.google/models/gemini/) to supercharge productivity.

To ensure consistency in using Workspace with Gemini, we first trained our team managers, bringing digital transformation from the top down. The increase in productivity and improved communication led to a companywide rollout. The [Gemini App](https://deepmind.google/models/gemini/) is already accelerating key processes for our 8,000 employees, including supplier research, training, generating meeting summaries, and creating and reviewing content. We believe that Gemini is helping us enhance the way our employees collaborate.

We’re now exploring [Agentspace](https://cloud.google.com/products/agentspace), a new agentic AI platform for unlocking expertise and efficiencies across workflows. This solution understands natural language, provides comprehensive answers, and automates tasks, helping us work smarter, faster, and more consistently. Since our customers prioritize time to market, we believe this will be key in our ability to meet their needs for the future.

Overall, having a tool for daily tasks and workflows is the kind of improvement we could not have made without Google Workspace. We can easily communicate with colleagues, schedule meetings, search for files, and more — all in one place. The accessibility of the Workspace tools — available at the click of a button in your browser or email — also contributes to faster innovation.

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/People_1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/People_1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

![https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/People_1.max-2200x2200.jpg](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-cloudblog-publish/images/People_1.max-2200x2200.jpg)

Zoppas Industries applies its technical expertise across industries, using Google Workspace to collaborate on a global scale.

### **Looking ahead**

As a long-time Google Workspace customer, we’re excited to fully embrace new tools like Gemini and Agentspace to serve our clients on the timelines they expect. Integrating these new features and products into our creative processes will support our commitment to innovation and our goal to embrace the next generation of AI-powered productivity.

Decades ago, the Internet was a doorway to a new way of working. Workspace has built a new doorway — one that gives everyone access to the tools they need to do their jobs, collaborate seamlessly, and helps us all create a stronger company culture.
